name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Sign on to protect our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Our elections are the crucial facet of our democracy and voting is a fundamental right that must be protected.
Sign this petition to demand urgent action to protect the upcoming elections and our right to have a say in our government through voting >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump just handed control of U.S. election infrastructure to a known 2020 conspiracy theorist — and Congress is doing nothing to stop it.
Heather Honey, a far-right operative who pushed Trump’s lies about election fraud, has been appointed to a key Department of Homeland Security role overseeing how our elections are secured. She helped push sham audits, spread false claims in court, and even worked to seize voting machines in Pennsylvania . Now she’s in charge of protecting the very elections she tried to undermine.
Election officials across the country are begging for more funding to secure our voting systems — but the opponents of voting rights who control Congress refuse to act. Instead, they’re greenlighting a takeover by people who want to sabotage the next election from inside the system.
Tell Congress: Don’t let 2020 election deniers rig the 2026 elections. Block their appointments and provide funding to protect our elections and our democracy now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
This is all part of a coordinated plan by Trump and his allies to rig the rules ahead of 2026. And with MAGA in control of Congress, they might just get away with it.
We can’t stand by and let that happen. Congress must launch an immediate investigation into Honey’s appointment and pass emergency funding to protect our elections from partisan interference. The longer they stall, the greater the risk of chaos and manipulation in 2026.
We know what Trump and his loyalists did in 2020. We saw the lies, the lawsuits, the violent attack on the Capitol. Now they’re trying again—with more power and fewer safeguards. Congress has a choice: stand up for democracy or enable its destruction.
Add your name today to demand urgent action. The integrity of our next election depends on us stepping up to defend our democracy >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100125_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=Np1u2aioMYaSIbM1s8B2gHNQQaHDeUD1ASLlerqYliTHn4ZWqdKBSwPYvCfR4LMZyM179uECmUld8eJ4uN%2Byop%2FZxuyqZjDE5rqFkU%2FhSkTfu%2F%2BVc7cfKybgUoXOGNZEN1nQJl4jNDVYP6aB7TLHjRKG2rFewpLDUZHgRVPQoMLhod73aEN4MKfEknFhTlyWPodqF5mD%2F4LTXa85iIkw9k1vuG%2BFDMy1Kq%2BzBzQ4hxi3Yw7MjCiZ0EZp%2B8iZUEuXLIkNVyUxBTy0ZPxL43EzP4aOo2j3Z09AKmBNg4Dz%2BVHr49f5emRD6EVrAbOZWL9R9HffjOpHBNXwxDkjSOVvHysfz5x0Weu9kc9sm0Fc%2F3BesqX6NW3IRDXdQvEqsOX4WRS1exQQPmIvgOHidRtq8Y8zRdCrgIV5vXrTbnmxjsE%3D .

name: Time Sensitive Letter (via VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor’s STARK Warning >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our jaws are on the floor...
| _Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=6&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL) **If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=7&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=8&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=9&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=10&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94448?t=11&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21379%2E878179%2EGwG-ZL)

name: CADEM VOTA
subject: A message to young Latinos:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/Removal420.png]
A message to young Latinos:
Half of all new eligible voters in the U.S. are Latino, and here in California, nearly one in three eligible Latino voters is between the ages of 18 and 34 . That makes us one of the youngest and fastest-growing voting groups in the country, which means young Latinos have the power to shape California’s future like never before.
The November 4th statewide special election is our opportunity to do something. We’ve seen the harm the Trump administration has inflicted on our communities across California, from targeting Latino families with cruel immigration policies to rolling back opportunities for young people. These attacks have gone unchecked since day one because MAGA Republicans control every branch of government and continue to enable Trump.
Prop 50 is our chance to fight back. It's how we protect our families, our future, and the community that raised us. When everything is on the line, we have to show up. This is it. We must pass Prop 50.
https://linktr.ee/cadem [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
TAKE ACTION WITH VOTA [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
Through our VOTA program, the California Democratic Party is leading the charge to engage Latino voters and meet them where they are. Here’s how you can take action with VOTA:
* Make calls in English and Spanish [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833417] on Thursdays and Sundays.
* Join phonebanks 6 days a week [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833391] and talk directly with voters.
* Find a canvass near you [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/map/?lat=36.7378&lon=-119.7871&tag_ids=27747&zoom=5.0] or host one in your neighborhood.
* Share information on social media in English or Spanish [https://app.sosha.ai/toolkit/stopelectionrigging-7a15] with ready-to-go graphics and captions. Make sure to tag @cademocrats & @YesonCA50!
In addition to getting out the vote, we’re also protecting it. Our Voter Protection Team helps ensure elections remain fair and safe, but we need more bilingual English-Spanish speakers to ensure ALL voters are protected. If that’s you, join our Voter Protection Team today [https://fs3.formsite.com/CADEM2011/CADEMVOTERPROTECTIONTEAM/index?nvep=&hmac=&emci=8c5339e9-f79e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] .
I hope you will consider getting involved in this critical election. It starts with us.
Gracias,
Andrea Guzman & VOTA Team
https://instagram.com/cademocrats [https://instagram.com/cademocrats] https://bsky.app/profile/cademocrats.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/cademocrats.bsky.social] https://www.tiktok.com/@californiademocrats [https://www.tiktok.com/@californiademocrats] https://twitter.com/CA_Dem [https://twitter.com/CA_Dem] https://www.threads.com/@cademocrats [https://www.threads.com/@cademocrats] https://www.facebook.com/cadems [https://www.facebook.com/cadems]
Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee.
California Democratic Party
1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811
United States

name: Office of the Governor
subject: The Federal Government has Shut Down
body:
Trump failed to make a deal. Now families across Maryland are left with the fallout.
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/01000199a257cdbc-b6c12008-e3b5-49b6-8459-d001d32e4f23-000000/bRWljc76uojY49JidXeUXvaJBraVXaHbmXyfOQDpZSM=425)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=OL-RI9a3eeY/1/01000199a257cdbc-b6c12008-e3b5-49b6-8459-d001d32e4f23-000000/Xj01QDUMQseaWYM5Co44eWS16A8b7fTLfwyMQz50U1I=425)
---
At 12:01 this morning, the federal government shut down. Not by accident, but by choice.
Washington failed to govern, Donald Trump failed to make a deal, and now families across our state are left to deal with the fallout.
This shutdown will have staggering impacts for our state — health coverage left in limbo, wages lost, programs shuttered, projects scrapped.
But here in Maryland, we will not stop protecting each other.
We’re going to keep our state government open.
We’re going to protect critical programs like Medicaid and food assistance.
And we’re working to ensure that no one is foreclosed on or evicted simply because Washington won’t do its job and would rather force people to go without a paycheck.
If you’re a federal worker, a veteran, or a family impacted by this shutdown — or even if you know someone who is — visit [go.md.gov/FederalShutdown](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fresponse.maryland.gov%2Ffederalpublicservants%2Fshutdown/1/01000199a257cdbc-b6c12008-e3b5-49b6-8459-d001d32e4f23-000000/bESVpq0EFKn2LNe7qWbJmZI7r_jMU3Nf6Jj9-bg52hg=425).
There, you’ll find resources, protections, and support available right now.
We’ve faced hard times before. We’ll face them again.
**But as one Marylander told me:****_Thank God we’re in Maryland._**
May God Bless the Great State of Maryland and may we all continue our work to Leave No One Behind.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| |
* * *
---
|
---
|
---
---

clean_body: Trump failed to make a deal. Now families across Maryland are left with the fallout. | | | | | | | At 12:01 this morning, the federal government shut down. Not by accident, but by choice. Washington failed to govern, Donald Trump failed to make a deal, and now families across our state are left to deal with the fallout. This shutdown will have staggering impacts for our state — health coverage left in limbo, wages lost, programs shuttered, projects scrapped. But here in Maryland, we will not stop protecting each other. We’re going to keep our state government open. We’re going to protect critical programs like Medicaid and food assistance. And we’re working to ensure that no one is foreclosed on or evicted simply because Washington won’t do its job and would rather force people to go without a paycheck. If you’re a federal worker, a veteran, or a family impacted by this shutdown — or even if you know someone who is — visit . There, you’ll find resources, protections, and support available right now. We’ve faced hard times before. We’ll face them again. But as one Marylander told me:Thank God we’re in Maryland. May God Bless the Great State of Maryland and may we all continue our work to Leave No One Behind. Your Governor, Wes Moore | | | | | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe .

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021ye7lg96wegis2bsfepy2c5t22zb584k34dpbdbroul77e72khe9htsv6qce5rf9n8rsu3r4scs4znwswhqntufls93rczc5m9yeih2lr0od80ww0d3nak73q41m257vt7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3hbhh&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. name: The Democrats
subject: How we got here:
body:
---
Derek, Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. Now, the entire government is shut down on their watch. Here’s how we got here: Republicans put forward a government funding bill that failed to protect millions of Americans from cuts to their health care. **So congressional Democrats fought back. They voted against it.** Democrats are doing the job they were elected to do: fight for their constituents, work to lower costs, and protect necessities like health care. And we’ll keep fighting back at every turn — doing what we can to defend services like Social Security and Medicaid, defending our democracy as Republicans redraw maps, and preventing more damage and destruction from Trump and his allies. [**If those who control Congress and the White House won’t stand up for us, we have to stand up for each other. If protecting health care for millions of people is worth $7 to you, that’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC today to support Democrats’ work:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251001_4711_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4711_22930333__KWYQq&akid=4711%2E22930333%2E_KWYQq) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251001_4711_fr&refcode2=4711_22930333__KWYQq&akid=4711%2E22930333%2E_KWYQq)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251001_4711_fr&refcode2=4711_22930333__KWYQq&akid=4711%2E22930333%2E_KWYQq)**
---
****
Right now, Republicans are counting on all of us being exhausted from the day-to-day news cycle. They want us all to tune out and give up.
We can’t do that. But we’ll need your help to send a powerful message: _Democrats aren’t done fighting._
[**Use this link to help send that message loud and clear.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251001_4711_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4711_22930333__KWYQq&akid=4711%2E22930333%2E_KWYQq)
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Katie Porter
subject: Republicans shut down the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
It’s going to take all of us, doing everything we can, to stand up to Trump.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40226%2E3422442%2EZymJGa)
**Republicans just shut down the federal government, Peter.**
**Why? Because they’re refusing to fund health care programs that save lives.** They already made the biggest cuts to health care in our lifetimes; now, they want to raise insurance costs for millions of Americans. I can’t stress this enough: _these cuts will cost lives._
That is absolutely unacceptable. Democrats are right to refuse to rubber-stamp a budget that keeps these devastating cuts in place.
For months, Republicans in Congress have gone it alone—wreaking havoc on our country and standing back as Donald Trump raises costs and slashes programs that help Americans get by. **When the government officially shut down last night, where were the House Republicans? Nowhere to be seen.**
Protecting our health care is going to take all of us, doing everything we can, to stand up to Trump. Whether that means fighting these massive cuts in Congress, or electing leaders in California who are willing to take bold stands to protect our health care.
**[As governor, I’ll make sure our state always fights to protect Californians — including from the attacks lobbed at us by Donald Trump. subject: Voter registration deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
We don’t have much time

| | | | |

Hey friend, it's Scott. I'll keep this quick.
The voter registration deadline in New Jersey is on October 14th, that is less than 2 weeks away.
My team is on the ground and we’re making some big voter registration gains in New Jersey and Pennsylvania before the elections in November. **_[I’m reaching out to you because we need sponsors to help fund our efforts on the ground](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bh4T/?__vbtrk=MzI0MDM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MDM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
With all of the amazing things President Trump is doing in the White House, Republicans are getting complacent and I’m worried if we don’t turn things around we’re going to lose these elections. I’m doing everything I can to wake people up, and I would be really grateful if you’d sponsor one of my voter registration staff for just an hour or two.

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: Hi, checking in again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P
body:
Do I have your best contact?| | | __Click here if you wish to unsubscribe__
---
Dear Peter, >From the bottom of my heart, I'd like to thank you for the honor and privilege of serving as your lieutenant governor for the people of our great state. Public service means everything to me. I LOVE traveling our state and hearing directly from Alaskans like you, absorbing your struggles and dreams alike. _It's the stories of hard work, growth, and grit that can only be found right here in Alaska that keep me going!_ **Alaska's greatness is worth fighting to preserve for future generations.** As a grandmother of 11, that mission is personal to me. I've always been sincere and direct with you, and you know I will never feed you cheap poll-tested lines that say a lot but mean nothing. _You are smarter than that._ For now, let me say this -**I hear you.** **_[Please take a moment to ensure I have the most up-to-date and direct information for you in my contacts.](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=a7413d955b744165ae5778bcf3247b23&_e=u97OYPwuzSDBUCKRW5Lt9sEEcWhbblJGVZsOHKTyCQ3W3IhAqxsuFF-QyTJ0CPsbYPA3dmX6PcdXC9gAFhR_sMAfR3Gl6Gp9DVW4GILvt597x4C-rpL1a7avp3h6aYFK9-4ChwZTEFaxRI-pXJdf5xm3F5ZpCt2NY3ETpP6pY7yLNPEjApPkMGGMvR1kJ0OMdx17CByIqfD5lmPA-FLLMaxUTwkdOYBsutMfbNCKlWrNlwsY_P1dddJM0rqMNk4TKJhYwhrOcps_npF3i6REP5Y7XizE_zlJT96cT0HGXXPQ_QnFQUBIBEW6RQSHTHAFAyn1P74jO_fCXwYBP54x0A%3D%3D)_** Over the coming months, I would like you to be among the first to receive important updates on the issues that matter most—and some exciting announcements, too! _North to the Future._

clean_body: Do I have your best contact?| | | Click here if you wish to unsubscribe Dear Peter, >From the bottom of my heart, I'd like to thank you for the honor and privilege of serving as your lieutenant governor for the people of our great state. Public service means everything to me. I LOVE traveling our state and hearing directly from Alaskans like you, absorbing your struggles and dreams alike. It's the stories of hard work, growth, and grit that can only be found right here in Alaska that keep me going! Alaska's greatness is worth fighting to preserve for future generations. As a grandmother of 11, that mission is personal to me. I've always been sincere and direct with you, and you know I will never feed you cheap poll-tested lines that say a lot but mean nothing. You are smarter than that. For now, let me say this -I hear you. Over the coming months, I would like you to be among the first to receive important updates on the issues that matter most—and some exciting announcements, too! North to the Future. | | Nancy Dahlstrom P.S. Please take a moment to follow my social media channels so you don't miss even more from me! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725,Eagle River, Alaska 99577

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Friends, we all know this: government shutdowns are bad for the American economy and the American people.
Millions of people in California and all around the country rely on government services every day, and our economy depends on a functioning federal government.
As we enter the second day of this reckless shutdown, I am strongly urging Congress to pass a funding bill that reopens the government and tackles the health care crisis that Trump’s so-called big, beautiful bill plunged us into.
A huge part of my work since Trump’s second term began has been protecting access to health care. As Trump has tried to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, claw back public health research funding, and illegally cut congressionally appropriated funds from state health programs — we’ve fought back every step of the way.
Now, Congress has a chance to protect health care and lower costs. To refuse to do so at the expense of its own operation is both irresponsible and immoral.

—Rob

name: Andrea Guzman
subject: I see firsthand the impact of your donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear team,
We did it. Thanks to you, we hit our fundraising goal just a few minutes before midnight yesterday.
I want to take a moment to say thank you.
Your support proved that our grassroots movement is stronger than the MAGA machine trying to defeat Proposition 50.
Here’s the truth: Opponents of Prop 50 are funded by just a handful of dark money donors. One of them alone has already poured $30 MILLION into Trump’s election-rigging scheme.
But our side is different. Our movement is powered by thousands of Californians — giving $5, $10, $25 at a time — to fight back against Trump and his billionaire allies. That’s how we reached our goal. That’s how we’ll pass Prop 50.
And that’s how we’ll show the country what real people-powered democracy looks like.
We’re not slowing down. I work a lot with our organizing team, so I see firsthand the impact of your donation.
Every canvass, every phonebank, every voter conversation between now and Election Day is fueled by your support.
Right now, we are seeing how important it is to flip the U.S. House and put a “check” on this White House. Today’s reckless government shutdown is the direct result of Donald Trump refusing to reverse devastating healthcare cuts — with House Republicans marching in lockstep right behind him.
But thanks to you, we are going into the first inning of that U.S. House fight energized and ready to win on Prop 50. We can’t do it without you!
Gracias,
Andrea

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: There is so much happening I don't know where to start...
body:
Less than five weeks to election day, help me raise $5,000

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/259aa8e5cffb/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6421789?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# There is so much happening I don’t know where to start.
---
| | The government has shut down because our healthcare is being used a political pawn by Republican elected officials, we’re fighting the most extreme anti-abortion bill in our state’s history because our healthcare is being used as a political pawn by our Republican elected officials, hundreds of generals were berated by the highest office in the land held by Republican elected officials, and we have dozens of local elections we need to stay focused on right here at home. I started this newsletter to help folks digest the onslaught of news and political activity in our nation, our state and our community. And that’s what I intend to keep doing, every week, with a focus on education, action, and community engagement.
I had drafted a reflection on the one year anniversary of Helene to share in my newsletter this week. To remind folks that many are still building back, fighting for aid and that our community is so much more resilient than we realize. And to truly take a moment and celebrate how we all came together to help one another.
Helene spurred me to join a telethon for the Red Cross at WYFF the week of the hurricane and to get more involved with disaster response, preparedness, awareness and long term recovery on a local level. Which is why I'm thrilled to share that I’ve joined the board of the Red Cross of South Carolina as a liaison for the Upstate. Here is a [reflection](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ef70f66f4c&e=edbde6c9b1) from our Executive Director, Jaime Raichel and the [one year report](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=37d62bc3ba&e=edbde6c9b1) since Helene.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=539f9fa379&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Read More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0c67baea23&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | I’m also celebrating the extraordinary welcome Spartanburg gave to the South Carolina Sister Senators on Monday evening at Wofford. Over 250 people came out to hear their story and [support their documentary](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=df7cecc8eb&e=edbde6c9b1). I’m grateful to Dr. Samhat and the staff, students, and professors at [Wofford College ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1ac734315d&e=edbde6c9b1)who are supporting these important ‘Candid Conversations’ fostering civil discourse across the political isle. Two of the former Senators testified at the state house today. [You can listen to their testimony here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=464693f515&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=48d74f66dd&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Watch the Sister Senators Panel](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a27b914616&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Check out my latest podcast with Josh Burstein
---
| |

Kathryn sits down with political strategist, comedian, and creative force Josh Burstein for a wide-ranging conversation about politics, media, and resilience. From his early days with the Obama campaign to his stand-up comedy in Trump country, Josh reflects on how humor can help people process trauma and chaos in today’s volatile climate. The two discuss the fallout from political violence, the fragility of democracy, and why local action matters more than ever. With insights on late-night satire, grassroots organizing, and finding joy in the fight, this episode offers both perspective and a call to community engagement.
---
| [Listen Up](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ef4260bfbe&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d062362a4d&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
# Early voting starts October 21
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & this Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=013cef347c&e=edbde6c9b1).

Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=18e3e44d5f&e=edbde6c9b1)

# Support women running for office in Spartanburg October 7 at Art & Elections Event
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f043a92b43&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
There are some incredible women running for local elections here in Spartanburg. Join Alix Refshauge and Cathryn Judice at Ridge Gallery on Tuesday, October 7 - 146 E Main Street for a chance to meet a few of them, learn about upcoming elections, and enjoy some local art!
---
| [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=383e1d7ede&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | |
[**Hegseth & Trump delivered a scathing ultimatum to hundereds of Generals this week. **](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3c7fdc3ab2&e=edbde6c9b1)[**Portland troop deployment expected to cost nearly $4 million** ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eea4b3fc6e&e=edbde6c9b1)[**The government shutdown today. Here’s what you need to know.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=38a7055b29&e=edbde6c9b1)

Not all of government will shut down - those deemed essential workers continue as normal, although without pay for the time being.
* Border protection, law enforcement, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents, in-hospital medical care and air-traffic control workers are expected to continue to operate as usual.
* While social security and Medicare cheques will still be sent out, benefit verification and card issuance may stop.
* Government employees deemed non-essential are temporarily put on unpaid leave. In the past, these workers have then been paid retrospectively.
* That means that services like the food assistance programme and federally-funded pre-school and institutions like the Smithsonian museums will likely be curtailed or closed.
* Several agencies, like the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the National Institutes of Health (NIH) are likely to furlough many workers, affecting ongoing research and experiments already in progress.
* National parks and forests remained open during the last shutdown, but with few or no staff. This led to vandalism, littering and looting of historical sites, park advocates said.
* There could also be travel delays. Flight systems might "need to slow down, reducing efficiency", a representative from Airlines for America has warned. Passport agencies have warned that it could take longer than usual to process travel documents.
* Mail will still be delivered and post offices will remain open because the US Postal Service does not depend on Congress for funding.

---
| |
# A statement from the SCDP
---
|
---
| | | | |
---

| |
From the Sister Senators to the State House, our community showed up for women's rights this week. Monday night Spartanburg joined Wofford's Candid Conversation series to support the S.C. Sister Senators - legislators who crossed party lines to fight for women's healthcare rights in the state of South Carolina. We heard their story, engaged in the fight for our rights that continued today at the state house, and helped carry the torch forward. We raised over $12,000 for their documentary, telling the story of perseverance no matter the risk. Let's help them get this film to the finish line - support their efforts at [**https://www.sistersenatorsfilm.com.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=003bc04126&e=edbde6c9b1) Thank you to Rep Rita Allison, Susu Johnson, Dr. Nayef Samhat and the extraordinary staff at Wofford for making the evening possible.
**Please call your Senators and tell them we won't stand for Senate Bill 323 that persecutes women, doctors, and even pastors.**[**Learn more here.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=44b98603fd&e=edbde6c9b1) Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7af4ada01b&e=edbde6c9b1).

clean_body: Less than five weeks to election day, help me raise $5,000 | | | | | | | | | | | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate. | | There is so much happening I don’t know where to start. | | The government has shut down because our healthcare is being used a political pawn by Republican elected officials, we’re fighting the most extreme anti-abortion bill in our state’s history because our healthcare is being used as a political pawn by our Republican elected officials, hundreds of generals were berated by the highest office in the land held by Republican elected officials, and we have dozens of local elections we need to stay focused on right here at home. I started this newsletter to help folks digest the onslaught of news and political activity in our nation, our state and our community. And that’s what I intend to keep doing, every week, with a focus on education, action, and community engagement. I had drafted a reflection on the one year anniversary of Helene to share in my newsletter this week. To remind folks that many are still building back, fighting for aid and that our community is so much more resilient than we realize. And to truly take a moment and celebrate how we all came together to help one another. Helene spurred me to join a telethon for the Red Cross at WYFF the week of the hurricane and to get more involved with disaster response, preparedness, awareness and long term recovery on a local level. Which is why I'm thrilled to share that I’ve joined the board of the Red Cross of South Carolina as a liaison for the Upstate. Here is a from our Executive Director, Jaime Raichel and the since Helene. | | | I’m also celebrating the extraordinary welcome Spartanburg gave to the South Carolina Sister Senators on Monday evening at Wofford. Over 250 people came out to hear their story and . I’m grateful to Dr. Samhat and the staff, students, and professors at are supporting these important ‘Candid Conversations’ fostering civil discourse across the political isle. Two of the former Senators testified at the state house today. | | | | Check out my latest podcast with Josh Burstein | | Kathryn sits down with political strategist, comedian, and creative force Josh Burstein for a wide-ranging conversation about politics, media, and resilience. From his early days with the Obama campaign to his stand-up comedy in Trump country, Josh reflects on how humor can help people process trauma and chaos in today’s volatile climate. The two discuss the fallout from political violence, the fragility of democracy, and why local action matters more than ever. With insights on late-night satire, grassroots organizing, and finding joy in the fight, this episode offers both perspective and a call to community engagement. | | | Early voting starts October 21 Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays | | Join me every Saturday at 10am & this Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! . | | | Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll | | | | | | | | | | **Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**** October 4 International Festival October 6 - SPCDP Monthly Meeting - meet Spartanburg’s new Sheriff October 7 - Art & Elections Event @ The Ridge Gallery 6pm October 6-17 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary October 18 - No Kings Rally in Spartanburg October 21 - Senate 12 Primary Election Day October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00 November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.) November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff November 10: SPCDP Monthly Meeting November 18 Run off elections December 1: State-wide Candidate Forum 6-7:30pm SCC Downtown Campus | | Support women running for office in Spartanburg October 7 at Art & Elections Event | | There are some incredible women running for local elections here in Spartanburg. Join Alix Refshauge and Cathryn Judice at Ridge Gallery on Tuesday, October 7 - 146 E Main Street for a chance to meet a few of them, learn about upcoming elections, and enjoy some local art! | | | | | CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online. | | | | | | Not all of government will shut down - those deemed essential workers continue as normal, although without pay for the time being. Border protection, law enforcement, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents, in-hospital medical care and air-traffic control workers are expected to continue to operate as usual. While social security and Medicare cheques will still be sent out, benefit verification and card issuance may stop. Government employees deemed non-essential are temporarily put on unpaid leave. In the past, these workers have then been paid retrospectively. That means that services like the food assistance programme and federally-funded pre-school and institutions like the Smithsonian museums will likely be curtailed or closed. Several agencies, like the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the National Institutes of Health (NIH) are likely to furlough many workers, affecting ongoing research and experiments already in progress. National parks and forests remained open during the last shutdown, but with few or no staff. This led to vandalism, littering and looting of historical sites, park advocates said. There could also be travel delays. Flight systems might "need to slow down, reducing efficiency", a representative from Airlines for America has warned. Passport agencies have warned that it could take longer than usual to process travel documents. Mail will still be delivered and post offices will remain open because the US Postal Service does not depend on Congress for funding. | | A statement from the SCDP | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | From the Sister Senators to the State House, our community showed up for women's rights this week. Monday night Spartanburg joined Wofford's Candid Conversation series to support the S.C. Sister Senators - legislators who crossed party lines to fight for women's healthcare rights in the state of South Carolina. We heard their story, engaged in the fight for our rights that continued today at the state house, and helped carry the torch forward. We raised over $12,000 for their documentary, telling the story of perseverance no matter the risk. Let's help them get this film to the finish line - support their efforts at Thank you to Rep Rita Allison, Susu Johnson, Dr. Nayef Samhat and the extraordinary staff at Wofford for making the evening possible. Please call your Senators and tell them we won't stand for Senate Bill 323 that persecutes women, doctors, and even pastors.** Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. All rights reserved.

# **['Go to church': Elon Musk amplifies Erika Kirk's call for Christian revival](http://trk.libertyledger.-TG_kzpwfTA)**
---
Over the past year, Elon Musk's public comments and X activity have subtly shifted to include more frequent references to Christianity, such as sharing biblical wisdom and promoting forgiveness, while stopping short of declaring himself a true believer.'I think this notion of forgiveness is important; I think it's essential.'Turning Point USA CEO Erika Kirk wrote in a post on X over the weekend, "Go to church," and Musk shared her comment. name: Troy Downing
subject: It's not your fault.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,

I hate to say it, but we missed our critical Q3 fundraising goal.

I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. But the response has been deafening silence.
My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.
As you know, Democrats will stop at nothing to stand in the way of President Trump’s agenda – including shutting down the government.
They’re also throwing millions into battleground races nationwide to flip our razor-thin House Majority and take control.
I have to face the facts: If we don't defend every single seat in 2026, our conservative Majority will be lost, and President Trump's agenda will be over.
I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.
If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.
[Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES – I’M IN!
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Your support would be a godsend.

Sincerely,
Troy DowningConservative Veteran| |

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: JOIN THE TEAM TO STOP RADICAL CHRIS TAYLOR!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Patriot,

Wisconsin’s Supreme Court is at stake, and we cannot let far-left activist Chris Taylor [http://christaylorforwi.com] turn it into a platform for her extreme agenda. As one of the most liberal legislators, she’s prioritized radical views over justice.

Taylor’s shocking disregard for Wisconsinites is clear: she voted NO on Marsy’s Law TWICE [https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/2025/08/06/rebecca-bradley-blasts-judge-chris-taylors-opposition-to-marsys-law/85513000007/], and her campaign treasurer challenged this amendment, defying 75% of Wisconsin voters. Her anti-ICE bills pushed to ban facilities, grant illegal aliens in-state tuition, and restore driver’s licenses for non-citizens [https://thefederalist.com/2025/07/01/chris-taylor-is-the-lefts-anti-ice-pro-sanctuary-state-candidate-for-wi-supreme-court/]. The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/2025/08/28/bice-supreme-court-candidate-chris-taylor-ditches-own-recusal-bill/85820710007/] exposed her opportunism, flipping on recusal rules to access millions from special interests. Taylor bends principles for dark money, not justice.

The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/2025/08/28/bice-supreme-court-candidate-chris-taylor-ditches-own-recusal-bill/85820710007/] exposed her opportunism, flipping on recusal rules to access millions from special interests. Taylor bends principles for dark money, not justice.

We need YOUR help to stop her. Donate today [https://secure.winred.com/republican-party-of-wisconsin-fed/donate] to support a justice who upholds the rule of law and protects Wisconsin families. Every dollar counts to keep our court free from Chris Taylor's far-left extremism!

STOP RADICAL PROGRESSIVE CHRIS TAYLOR [https://secure.winred.com/republican-party-of-wisconsin-fed/donate]

The Republican Party of Wisconsin will continue exposing Chris Taylor for the radical liberal she is, but we need YOUR help!

Be a part of the winning team by DONATING TODAY. [https://secure.winred.com/republican-party-of-wisconsin-fed/donate]

-Team WisGOP

Senate Democrats voted again Wednesday morning [to block a stopgap funding bill](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ8Gd452AZtQUPyNu_ztlRYJS-C0hsiQRHn7U3KPcO3M6JPm-zqtJ585l-t_v5Hrsa6Fno2pd9rXSIF2z-xfNcbGtW6-cuv1tkqQ04gwglyDz_xa9RBcJJKkBnJoJqsB0JohOUB1MX7SE9rZhgvMwRirPIQA57NHOWT3piGARMBZ6YM6GhuOOM8KUSNEoYFC7nU_fNdceqLIr_qg_XCp28Au9X5rQv0TchFy6YlSZn53Qi6pbvQ-JOTSqPhOQi7TpFAqO_4GY7yXkMt1PGfmsaV7D_VZxkf9bIfdhdszM-c2G6Hhuvn8YQ_9T7IeTv4EAAD__3OTfUM), the third time in two weeks they've voted against the measure, as federal agencies braced for widespread layoffs.

# Thursday, October 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1950, Charles M. Schulz's _Peanuts_ comic strip debuted in just seven U.S. newspapers. It would eventually run in more than 2,600. The cartoonist almost named Charlie Brown's dog Sniffy—not Snoopy—but another comic dog already had that name. [See the first ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO3CAQBOCnwZ1Py2IbX0ERKaL706a0OLOciTBYsHeW8_TR5RX-fjTfaH5_LV8uppifv9xOhkNZMp0tETPVJZCn6lJyVwmhpVJ2V1LjciwIOPYSesDFu5iuZei8CURIqiMj9XgfAORdd5uRs1KTWgeFDwWjmkevJ4kB0CPM8rF20XzaJABKkJMabmrWdz_LaVJSDhKCGIB85FJvf0rMvFFIV3lTva1l75LZmI8m1A-BVqA9z_P2ao6Ld9cnINA2LvUSaCkzVXYx75RZoP2wAq0EgRakQHuQyy9ufculHFevx97lHN9Um6tXv26uJmp9W7dX-ivQaj2AUjMA6I-tLD8qBaF-bkdXjT_OmFJskxYDPHcX0_-9_K2T3wb_BQAA__-rio1T)[_Peanuts_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO3CAQBOCnwZ1Py2IbX0ERKaL706a0OLOciTBYsHeW8_TR5RX-fjTfaH5_LV8uppifv9xOhkNZMp0tETPVJZCn6lJyVwmhpVJ2V1LjciwIOPYSesDFu5iuZei8CURIqiMj9XgfAORdd5uRs1KTWgeFDwWjmkevJ4kB0CPM8rF20XzaJABKkJMabmrWdz_LaVJSDhKCGIB85FJvf0rMvFFIV3lTva1l75LZmI8m1A-BVqA9z_P2ao6Ld9cnINA2LvUSaCkzVXYx75RZoP2wAq0EgRakQHuQyy9ufculHFevx97lHN9Um6tXv26uJmp9W7dX-ivQaj2AUjMA6I-tLD8qBaF-bkdXjT_OmFJskxYDPHcX0_-9_K2T3wb_BQAA__-rio1T)[ comic strip here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO3CAQBOCnwZ1Py2IbX0ERKaL706a0OLOciTBYsHeW8_TR5RX-fjTfaH5_LV8uppifv9xOhkNZMp0tETPVJZCn6lJyVwmhpVJ2V1LjciwIOPYSesDFu5iuZei8CURIqiMj9XgfAORdd5uRs1KTWgeFDwWjmkevJ4kB0CPM8rF20XzaJABKkJMabmrWdz_LaVJSDhKCGIB85FJvf0rMvFFIV3lTva1l75LZmI8m1A-BVqA9z_P2ao6Ld9cnINA2LvUSaCkzVXYx75RZoP2wAq0EgRakQHuQyy9ufculHFevx97lHN9Um6tXv26uJmp9W7dX-ivQaj2AUjMA6I-tLD8qBaF-bkdXjT_OmFJskxYDPHcX0_-9_K2T3wb_BQAA__-rio1T). Today’s edition is packed with newsy nostalgia, from a story about AOL finally ending its dial-up internet to a _Throwback Thursday_ look at 51 of the coolest cars ever made, and [forgotten desserts like shoofly pie](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OszAQAJ_GdKBd2-GncPE1dPnaK5ET1sSnhUV4Bcrbn3KvcP1oRpqv-3SPmfO2_I8rBU0ybXQVJlU6pkQzHZE5viWlwiJrFC4q-2TB3mqEGuw0x8zvyVdzSESWXEUBu9vgAXDoqlcYfAsxud72BPiIDikRED5vyZFLQFUOHxsCWARsnW9c3w1zj23rED1CMh5ozipH8y150xclfstJR_OUteLwUt2Lcf-MHY0dr-tqNBbN26LxwfSBjB2xbzvfd8aOSY5FVGmrz7xpXKjeM9WJ4ylHMXasjjDvV2bOpe2Mh2WNmX9T-qc_Z7A_AQAA___mKHlr). If you’ve ever felt like background noise makes conversations exhausting, today's sponsor, [hear.com’s discreet German-engineered Horizon IX hearing aids,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT-PnDAQxT-N6XY1tllYCorVregu1UkprQGPYaIBr7A5xLePOJ0SKW2mfO9p_vzm57t7RxZexh84U5tDdAvtSShnWl0gTyuK4BFDSBLjjFFSji9nwNwuGi5gnEeWw5WFbwORIVtQq-tbUwLopi6mFm9lTVXTgLmTHay5GyDAugK0aLwfCm7PbhrAaNCVLa_2Xjf-rqvKal1qCKoE8pzjev0VeckTBTniJ63XIc6FtFPOr6TsQ5lOmW7f9-tE-GUq03llup5SdqfGy-iQfXKeE9zPvO1wyMo-H28fcFYDtrKPtw9lqi3PLsVtHUjZZ3_4b2kmz9us7BNDYGHM9G0MOL-Qx0XZ55YcLQ7lHOr-5Fx_-FO5CI9T7jfpLz5uvZD7e5I7MZw43L8bFWvrXzuLcKpqVcI4I8sXgfxfb_tsze8AAAD__6yiquA) could be the brain-boosting solution you’ve been waiting for.

## Senate Rejects Shutdown Funding Again
Senate Democrats voted again Wednesday morning [to block a stopgap funding bill](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ8Gd452AZtQUPyNu_ztlRYJS-C0hsiQRHn7U3KPcO3M6JPm-zqtJ585l-t_v5Hrsa6Fno2pd9rXSIF2z-xfNcbGtW6-cuv1tkqQ04gwglyDz_xa9RBcJJKkBnJoJqsB0JohOUB1MX7SE9rZhgvMwRirPIQA57NHOWT3piGARMBZ6YM6GhuOOM8KUSNEoYFC7nU_fNdceqLIr_qg_XCp28Au9X5rQv0TchFy6YlSZn53Qi6pbvQ-JOTSqPhOQi7TpFAqO_4GY7yXkMt1PGfmsaV7D_VZxkf9bIfdhdszM-c2G6Hhuvn8YQ_9T7IeTv4EAAD__3OTfUM), the third time in two weeks they've voted against the measure, as federal agencies braced for widespread layoffs. Russell Vought, director of the Office of Management and Budget, told House Republicans in a Wednesday call that [layoffs were coming in the next day](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8Gd0Re2-BQuPgbuvztlcjB69inhUXYJMrbn4juDa4baTSf9M3Xbbr5THl9_PcLuhp5WvFVCGvFfYoYcPdE_s0xFmJePFOpvE1Kqq4F2Uo1BZ_pPRkRXERUqAU6sN1gpITBiuRQWzvfowrWm1kOcx-v_WA8zh7uGC2I7E4aSKlAQq_NRV_tEK7Q9xrAgIyNkRhy5f3yzXmtCSO9-Yn7ZeZFkEu1bqXR_xo1NmqsCVMmOrtGjYkXPIU-8SjYqLHrNJgB2l-rtqSjBn6t7ZOPR6rtjttxpzz79VyJ3YXtlYly6W1j5GPx-QMX9U9vPZ36CQAA__879X8e) or two. Up to 750,000 federal employees are [expected to be furloughed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OpCAURp8GdxguUP4sWEwycVeT2c3SUHJRptFrAMv49h07_Qa9_pKT75x_z_FpQwzb_MeuaIqnccMzRywF0-jRYbIx2ou8z5FotRRzoX2UQj44CC7k6GyI16grZzyiRFWhgfbRayGgb6vFqEkJjVMHLUiB_uWs9xK7vu_A9g26KpibBkJIENAoXauu7V0HTaMANAjPtEAXCqX6P4WtLOjjRW9M9URrFc1Syp6Z-sXkwORgX9NtUM90z0wOfymGEqbM5JCXozg6N573hNZlfmwTpmLDVi7ujxTpmBd0_Nubn5Q-MGX-SmQdJm5XTGGyN6lQupgagmPqN8gGQGvdVMm4_Qwxhty0TIt5tSF-vSw_Svs28jMAAP__YA2PUA), and essential workers will have to work without pay for the duration of the shutdown, with the expectation of being paid retroactively when the government reopens. Members of Congress will still collect their pay. Meanwhile, the White House moved to pause billions of dollars in funding for blue states, including a freeze on [$18 billion earmarked for New York City](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuunTAURL8GOh_5wcMULtLQ3bQpkbG3DzsxNrI3B5Gvj8gv3Hq0RjPr19fyZTFiev-0OxgKeUlw1QhEUJYAHoqN0d45hBpz3m2OlfKxSC57JjjjcvEW4710rTcBQIJqwYixnzrOxTS2m3G8X9cVLPgVwCnVT25VMGqthXRaQovmaROcS8HFoLqX0uPktRgGJUQneGg6Dh4pl9fvjIk2CPHOHygvl_c2mo3oqI360ci5kfN1Xa-0uufFkzdyPnJEQlcbOVM594NZv2PCSsUS5vQwGxKwLZ8VWCgAf6EyodmKMWJOLMHF7lz-MId0M0yh2ErldHQWYOFMHtObFZesVN0kdVuMP66HrcPYdPy9W4z_t9K3BH-M_BcAAP__E9mThg) infrastructure projects. The money was paused hours after the shutdown began.
## National Guard Arrives in Oregon
President Trump said National Guard troops had arrived in Oregon, following [ongoing clashes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0OnDAQhJ_GdD75BwwULtLQXdqUyOD14WjxIrPcibePLkVeIO2MZj7p-_WcnyFjLq-fYQfPieYCnxOBGeqcIEINiOGmlE4k2gPhyXTMRplOaiWVmWPIeM9tE30CMGAb8LrvxlYpPfbN5l0_aFi0Wdp-tcoF2w9JOafiokxa09Jk_33TShmttLPtww79GAftnNW61SqJVkHMTPXxm3LhDRLe9Ib6WGlv0G_MxynsD2EmYSbeYMuI306YqQTOVALKE9arZr6FmbrOmm4YJddrP2QhuW6UV5DLxZJJnlCi_Ld7XaHGb3xQZQwlCjM11cfjkxHz6XrRqtce8l9gw_9l8O3NnwAAAP__oS-Fmg) at federal immigration offices, despite opposition from state officials. Reportedly, 200 Guard members were activated under federal authority on Saturday after [Trump declared](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9utDAQBPCnMZ3R2vwvXHwN3X1tSmTOy-FkYZG9OcTbR-QV0o000k-j-XhMDx8p7q__fkMnC087nplQBNO0YMDkifzFy5KJefNMWfiYLNhGG9Bgp-AjXVNdBLcgWqwKdKZrhhrADF2xOlMHM7e9RYB-nrsBOjD9c5htM2DftKGI7tYMgDVg2qouq74bQm_atjKmNrCoGjBE4VR-ctxlxYUufmMqn7wV5FaRI6vqn7KjsuN5nuXXIe-7VHa8aWVHGO7cKTtK-t4Onf2V9YpEOuMetCTmI-uDk5Dfg-aEL9716vdAqANvmCU-tWBKnGKWrK2yY5FcOM5IFHPbqRpem4_0O0r-9OTb2Z8AAAD__4Y9hxg) the city was descending into “lawless mayhem.” Troops began arriving in [Salem and Woodburn](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O2zAMgJ9G3hSQ8t9l8JCi8Ha3dOho6CzKUUGLgqTEzdsXbvsGt30AwQ_gx5_vy7sNHOL2YXeaqpcl0lGYaqW8eHKULbN9ifeFRXYrXKqkxYDpNYIGszgb-LV0jZs8kaG2oQnH_toB4HVs7lOPneuvCIA4ejDtCv0IFjv_iZ_tMEATptOGAAYBh7a7tG_j1b3hMLSIHYJXHZALVfLll4RY7-T5JU_Kl1X2hqd7ramo9qbMrMx8HMdlL_GcKTNT1I-izJyEQw3ridu5GneKVZmZbaVS9SO5E7Rk2iTqaGuQaFlvD5udZrKOsk4Ui_5XRlfRNYukou2drNPitaPE8vrvtVnfbvgx_55X1c6yBqfa79_OzHSUH5RTkyeXjsAcyjCqDrbdBv57UP3SF56T-RMAAP__5pid7g) on Tuesday, where they’ll undergo three days of crowd-control and use-of-force training before deploying to Portland later this week. A similar federal initiative is [underway in Memphis](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0TLgo1TUFzj7r_2Smt_WBJO6xBhLlbe_uTo3uDKkb4Zzcyvr_WLipTH7SdtHHqu64OPXbh3bmvmxI1E6F1z3qXWjarsvT5XBBy1AQ24JiryXt2QQmZGtgMH48erAzBXP9zD9-QpW08zTJBHExOAi5mR3GytYxhKONMMABowk3UXO_trms00WWOcgawccCq9tsvvWh79zlne9cXtEus2SLj3_tyV_aFwUbgcx3GRGkk23p73sp-QwoVaL1FY4XLuU7h8mFNSL_VBom9_qCVNrZUXif7nVriMiDqSQxiz0dZj0i5D1DO4SUdv8vyN88SGhxbS8ygiZZ-8cnDbqMinYv-vX18B_wYAAP__DAmJwQ), where U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi said the newly formed Memphis Safe Task Force has made 53 arrests and seized 20 illegal firearms in just two days.
## Famed Chimp Expert Jane Goodall Dies
Jane Goodall, the celebrated primate expert and anthropologist, has [died in California](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2K3DAQhJ9GvnnQ38jyQYdAMOSwueZo2lbLo6WtNpKYZd4-zEKeIMePgo-q-vOxfkCmXI7fcGLoideCX42wd6xrwogViODFKTViPoGpdb5WLfV9VHKUeo2Q6bXaIYaEqNEMGNR0n62Uap6GR_Au-Q0A5e63advv0mJUCu56U86ji0MOb5uSUiupnLE346c5euWcUcoqmYSVGHPnevvkXPoDE734ifW28zlQePR-NWF-CL0IvcC2vxfcDn7HQi-_SsdaoGcuQEIvn1BwPJgjEI0JTozjVfMJnYmP3PoIpT8qX_9w59KwPr8Fb44IcZyV0EvrXF_CLDkK81PJ2Ttv7DTUEK-vTJSbm4SVxwmZvqv2__r3GfTfAAAA__9PD5EU) during one of her speaking tours, according to the institute she founded. She was 91 years old. Goodall became famous for her study of chimpanzees in the wild in Tanzania, beginning at age 26, living and working among the animals she was studying.

Over time, she showed that primates display an [array of behaviors similar to humans](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOqLx7-DCxTbpsu2WyMTjxNHAILAS5e1X3Fe45dGRztH3_btNt1S5ro-_aaHYikwrfQ6m1mifCmXaE3P6SikHiyxJ-GiyTRq0GxQMoKecKn8n2-dYiDSZnqJCFyyACtg_ozcWnEcCa4IzXmvrC4aM6JyH4Gxf47mmALQC5Y29mBFDHpX3RimroHQWKNcm--UldW1PKvyVN-2Xuyw9x2dr29GZP52-dvqathPgrM6wt3pn6vT1lVYaHiI5MQ8y1zbg6MNoAo5OzXf0xqJCDb4gzQlw1v0e8_apzPXw2Fl4LKnyz2X7lad31P8DAAD__5EWd1o), such as the ability to develop individual personalities and make and use their own tools.

Her work is considered one of the major achievements of 20th-century scholarship. clean_body: Senate Democrats voted again Wednesday morning , the third time in two weeks they've voted against the measure, as federal agencies braced for widespread layoffs. | | | | | | Thursday, October 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1950, Charles M. Schulz's Peanuts comic strip debuted in just seven U.S. newspapers. It would eventually run in more than 2,600. The cartoonist almost named Charlie Brown's dog Sniffy—not Snoopy—but another comic dog already had that name. . Today’s edition is packed with newsy nostalgia, from a story about AOL finally ending its dial-up internet to a Throwback Thursday look at 51 of the coolest cars ever made, and . If you’ve ever felt like background noise makes conversations exhausting, today's sponsor, could be the brain-boosting solution you’ve been waiting for. | Senate Rejects Shutdown Funding Again Senate Democrats voted again Wednesday morning , the third time in two weeks they've voted against the measure, as federal agencies braced for widespread layoffs. Russell Vought, director of the Office of Management and Budget, told House Republicans in a Wednesday call that or two. Up to 750,000 federal employees are , and essential workers will have to work without pay for the duration of the shutdown, with the expectation of being paid retroactively when the government reopens. Members of Congress will still collect their pay. Meanwhile, the White House moved to pause billions of dollars in funding for blue states, including a freeze on infrastructure projects. The money was paused hours after the shutdown began. National Guard Arrives in Oregon President Trump said National Guard troops had arrived in Oregon, following at federal immigration offices, despite opposition from state officials. Reportedly, 200 Guard members were activated under federal authority on Saturday after the city was descending into “lawless mayhem.” Troops began arriving in on Tuesday, where they’ll undergo three days of crowd-control and use-of-force training before deploying to Portland later this week. A similar federal initiative is , where U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi said the newly formed Memphis Safe Task Force has made 53 arrests and seized 20 illegal firearms in just two days. Famed Chimp Expert Jane Goodall Dies Jane Goodall, the celebrated primate expert and anthropologist, has during one of her speaking tours, according to the institute she founded. She was 91 years old. Goodall became famous for her study of chimpanzees in the wild in Tanzania, beginning at age 26, living and working among the animals she was studying. Over time, she showed that primates display an , such as the ability to develop individual personalities and make and use their own tools. Her work is considered one of the major achievements of 20th-century scholarship. . body:
In the biblical story of Noah’s ark. Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth. Defend our Courts has found ourselves in
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001feEcuEiJg8Xu8lnC2gFCI_yAnSiQeiyuUhwb62H_4Rie7nzixwG7FK4mw7GGNBZEO-rzzot-2JJKI17FoR1U4gjy-we2m_18RwEs3HXM8fSugV5plcOCTd06PQRIph5fHz0jP_5qTbNVv78a_e4j_WnvSRazu0tNhm99TpzRt73Ulj3WKdwSsr6wxz9j_2FEMLqnX_yPAH25ssEZ1sRxX00awVJV4tiQ8-sgEh93v0k=&c=3K280VMwuuXMz93hYStiq7O88V16U16OPg96HKHHPfQLJSVXwbt4pA==&ch=TFqoVFFav3k7awxzuHCjGGKU8tezYIMxwprHryG2LT6zvYnUyYMflQ==)
---
| Peter,
In the biblical story of Noah's ark, Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth.
Defend our Courts has found ourselves in a similar situation to Noah within the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election. A race which if we lose will cost Democrats Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
This summer we received word of an impending demiurge of GOP spending aimed at washing away the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's State Supreme Court. Before anyone else, we began ringing the alarm bells and got to work on building the ark that would save this court.
Now our worst fears have come to fruition:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001feEcuEiJg8Xu8lnC2gFCI_yAnSiQeiyuUhwb62H_4Rie7nzixwG7FK4mw7GGNBZEO-rzzot-2JJKI17FoR1U4gjy-we2m_18RwEs3HXM8fSugV5plcOCTd06PQRIph5fHz0jP_5qTbNVv78a_e4j_WnvSRazu0tNhm99TpzRt73Ulj3WKdwSsr6wxz9j_2FEMLqnX_yPAH25ssEZ1sRxX8kOeFLun7xBRmmkY-QTOAw=&c=3K280VMwuuXMz93hYStiq7O88V16U16OPg96HKHHPfQLJSVXwbt4pA==&ch=TFqoVFFav3k7awxzuHCjGGKU8tezYIMxwprHryG2LT6zvYnUyYMflQ==)
---
| | | | To call it a flood is an understatement, what the GOP is throwing at us is nothing short of a Tsunami. They are treating this race like a presidential election.
Even in the deep blue city of Philadelphia, voters are having GOP canvassers knocks their doors multiple times a day, GOP vote no ads are filling social media and TV, and mailboxes are bursting with deceptive mailers using progressive language that say voting no will "defend democracy" and "protect women."
It is a flood of biblical proportions going down in a typically sleepy local Supreme Court race.
Defend Our Courts is scrambling to finish building the ark that will save the three Democratic justices. We've assembled an army of canvassers, are sending mail, and are running ads, but we need to continue scaling rapidly if we hope to be seaworthy by the day the great flood hits - Election Day, November 4, 2025.
[We have 33 days left. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to ensure that Democrats aren't washed away in the life or death fight to save swing state Pennsylvania?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001feEcuEiJg8Xu8lnC2gFCI_yAnSiQeiyuUhwb62H_4Rie7nzixwG7FK4mw7GGNBZEejPCdvnwHX0EeqkOZM8td21PrbfZ1dpW6erI0AHykjmSPNil0kiHto94P-c_PIxKChbV04lu4KJQBbB7B9BCbbM7Tanj-Y-Uidcvl_3mZw99fiR-qgY919xsw2hCOFyhfmejNXUNbc4UidH6Ym6JXm-I4izVKVoq-IxZK2TL0C3PxqcuwVv24g==&c=3K280VMwuuXMz93hYStiq7O88V16U16OPg96HKHHPfQLJSVXwbt4pA==&ch=TFqoVFFav3k7awxzuHCjGGKU8tezYIMxwprHryG2LT6zvYnUyYMflQ==)

Defend our Courts has found ourselves in | | | | | == | Peter, In the biblical story of Noah's ark, Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth. Defend our Courts has found ourselves in a similar situation to Noah within the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election. A race which if we lose will cost Democrats Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond. This summer we received word of an impending demiurge of GOP spending aimed at washing away the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's State Supreme Court. Before anyone else, we began ringing the alarm bells and got to work on building the ark that would save this court. Now our worst fears have come to fruition: | == | | | | To call it a flood is an understatement, what the GOP is throwing at us is nothing short of a Tsunami. They are treating this race like a presidential election. Even in the deep blue city of Philadelphia, voters are having GOP canvassers knocks their doors multiple times a day, GOP vote no ads are filling social media and TV, and mailboxes are bursting with deceptive mailers using progressive language that say voting no will "defend democracy" and "protect women." It is a flood of biblical proportions going down in a typically sleepy local Supreme Court race. Defend Our Courts is scrambling to finish building the ark that will save the three Democratic justices. body:
San Antonio Spurs legend Tony Parker is selling his 53-acre estate in Boerne for $20 million after enlisting one of the world’s top live streamers to boost its profile this summer.

| | |

# Thursday, October 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1928, child actor [George Robert Phillips McFarland](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnsbtYMCEmLihu4y632WJLNPEM8SgYLED5eftV9hW2PM1XnO-Lv6BESbf_uLFrr5B94meN3BoXv2GqklPIpWJkq0LOrUq6rx4UnA5aHRR4Qolvb3pyV0WT7tlpe5qMgslM_eroZM11WY7GaqIJgkUzotKjOSNZup57cR9MKwVaK4BxCBCWszGTCoHYauyMYpKWy9BWbvzCGuI7P7gMS9766NbW9tod_3UwdzBzGp5yl51JcMjl1sH86Q7mrx3T_e0vy4wlYqK-ONqfEqPU0XZG3TaU-Gu2v514OPgJAAD__8TNcvU) was born in Dallas. McFarland starred as the character Spanky in the popular _Our Gang_ series of short comedies, which was later renamed _The Little Rascals_ when syndicated for TV. We love dogs and the Aggies here at _The Texas Flyover_ , but we goofed up when we referred to Texas A&M’s live mascot as a Border Collie. Many readers reminded us that the “First Lady of Aggieland” is actually a [Rough Collie](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DEO2yAUgOHT4M3WgxA7DAxdvKVrRwvDw34qmAie4-T2VXuFXuD_pe_Xc3k6SnRsP11Gy59YlgOvlpAZ65Ld0agcsdTmEk4QS-FGx-99UaDuvYQe1BIcpe-iu2BXCEZ2aOV0NxqU0abb7U2vIAGmFb1BH-V4N49HWH1wBkfAtSP7NyYBlJSg1DhEFf1DawMxBpykExowEJc68I6MH9di-pY31sGX3CW7M7-auP0QahZqvq5rYJfPAcMp1Oxdfp2t9yXn8yD-CjVzdYGYytGEmt22Efb-THxWFGqu-EZKCYedc-qqDa-LUqI2TkLDlh2lf1f-P6u3VX8CAAD__65JgGc). We apologize for the error! At _The Flyover_ , we’ve tested plenty of skincare products—but [Nimi Skincare](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMuK4zAURL9G3sVcyfJrocVA4tVkBmYxTa-MYl3Fl-gRJCVO_r5x_0JvTxVVcD7O81mTo3D9oz2q8rJxDrhlh6Vgmr0OmWKwMWXtsAcbY8kUbussQLQHDgcQs9Hk3rOsjLqAGXmFivftKEGMcqxWNVg9WCMGvSwSORrgvLPQdLJd7MDbS0VqH-MAgnMQoqutsMsg5QjWGuy5ZhLQUImpLisWfOls3Ts-MdVL9JVTayn3zJpfTExMTNu21YE85RuFRSfcS3vSTI_i5xwfaUHWHKffn3__n_4x0e3Yo6GHZ83x5DW5Kilz38g5yl3PJFx3-H1WfqboqcRXAAAA__9a9XtO) has quickly become a favorite among our team. Proudly American-made and rooted in faith, family, and freedom, Nimi blends clean ingredients with real results you can see and feel.
