**From the Founder’s Desk:**
**Why I Want**** _Flyover_****Readers to Own**** _The Texas Flyover

_** When I decided to accept investors in _The Texas Flyover_ , one thing mattered to me more than anything: that our readers would have the chance to become our owners. If I had my druthers, [every single investor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO2zAMhZ9G3mJIsmzZg4YCqbf0XwK0m6BaVMxWl8Bibm9fuE2B7l3PR34gz9eTPTmMmC9fXAJDz1BshkeNQASbTS5XLDmUrboImodSqGL-uVrJZX8Q_MCl9Q7jy6rGm-_cT6IBI3Q_KS4nNTWrUXwcl95PU-g7Af3oQUOv-QJaa-3GoUGzywTnUggu5dAGGZZRqYmH4EELxxQHj1S2llYgeLoa4qvcYWuXkppoVqJrZd0nJmcmZ8x3qNT-KJhphX8md9zNN0q2ltu2AOuOnz0SlszksMcJPN4S644fjwz-cAKP7o0Wl64OL5l1x_mP8S8omSDTvnSe3xnBtlvO3-YPu78l-2Yz_vrAGLEOmil-SQ7j7-vp_zq_G_krAAD__1IultQ) in _The Texas Flyover_ would be a _Texas_ _Flyover_ reader. That’s why we’ve structured this offering with you in mind:
* **5% bonus shares** for all _Texas_ _Flyover_ readers who invest
* **An** **additional 5% and 10% bonus** for those investing larger amounts

Legally, the offering is open to any U.S. citizen. But my heart—and our strategy—are focused on keeping ownership in the hands of our readers. Right now, we’re less than $350,000 away from hitting 50% of our ultimate funding goal - but our Q3 deadline for 50% raised has passed and we are behind.

That’s why I’m asking our readers one more time: will you consider [investing in _The Texas Flyover_ today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO2zAMhZ9G3mJIsmzZg4YCqbf0XwK0m6BaVMxWl8Bibm9fuE2B7l3PR34gz9eTPTmMmC9fXAJDz1BshkeNQASbTS5XLDmUrboImodSqGL-uVrJZX8Q_MCl9Q7jy6rGm-_cT6IBI3Q_KS4nNTWrUXwcl95PU-g7Af3oQUOv-QJaa-3GoUGzywTnUggu5dAGGZZRqYmH4EELxxQHj1S2llYgeLoa4qvcYWuXkppoVqJrZd0nJmcmZ8x3qNT-KJhphX8md9zNN0q2ltu2AOuOnz0SlszksMcJPN4S644fjwz-cAKP7o0Wl64OL5l1x_mP8S8omSDTvnSe3xnBtlvO3-YPu78l-2Yz_vrAGLEOmil-SQ7j7-vp_zq_G_krAAD__1IultQ)?

But some of our readers are asking: **“How do I get a return on my investment?”
**
Here’s why _The Texas Flyover_ is different:
* **Already profitable after just two years (most start-ups never are)**
* **80% gross margins and 24% net income (exceptional margins)**
* **In the top 1% of media start-ups (proven strength)**

How investors could realize returns:
1. **A Sale** – Only to a partner who shares our values. (CNN or the**** New York Times need not apply.)
2. **Public Listing** – Shares traded openly on an exchange.
3. **Profit Distributions** (Dividends) – Because we’re already profitable, this is possible.

**Recap: Sale. Listing. Distributions.
**
My Closing Pitch

More than 1,450 _Flyover_ readers have already joined us as investors. We’re just $350K away from our next milestone. If you’ve been considering investing, now is the moment. Let’s finish this round together and make _The Texas Flyover_ a news company truly owned by its readers.

Will you be one of the investors who help us keep _The Texas Flyover_ reader-owned?

## Shutdown Could Impact 230,000 Texans
After Congress failed to pass a funding bill ahead of a Tuesday deadline to avoid a government shutdown, more than 230,000 Texans who serve in the military or work for the federal government [could be furloughed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEGPpSAQhH8N3jDQ4igHDu-wXjYz1z0alEbJIrxAv3Hev9_oX9hbJ12pr6r-fM6fNsSQti97oKEfn-eEZ41IhGU-bKohJ59LtREH4XOmGtLffQYBPZeCC5idDfE9q8aZRTgtGzRy6LUSoJVudjNoscIoOqHsqPsF9DoOvbNuGeXYLd3SBHOZSSFASgHw0Xrw66iUFt47HKRlSqALlEtLOxL-2OrjO39jadd8NNHsRM_KugeDicF0nmd71HT9GEyY-KsymK5SDKb73rEgtwU57ciXsG1YiYfjaVeqnDK_Edy9SkjbrdkuWDowEa_7i1w-E4PJFv54yK9fv7vSFOOeZ4gx1I-BKbEdNsQ7Hf3fpt8G_gUAAP__8eyMdw) or forced to work without pay. While workers will receive back pay when a funding bill is passed, some non-essential services may be temporarily disrupted or delayed. Pending appropriation bills also contain around $675 million earmarked for projects in Texas that [could be cut](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAMhp9G3hhIjGyfBw1dvF3XjgZjUbEaWQwk3fny9oXzCl0IAsT3kfz_fC6fFFPM99-0s2s_QZbMR03cGpdlp1yj5CClUuJRB5FWY35sC2rswWjQuHiK6bXYzrub9pPp2Jmxn6zGyU7d5rTtB_aBjBlH7j_sEOhKxg9XP3m_-lsX3SkzWqMxGnG4BAzrh7WTDsHzaEhZzT42KZe2ceMfqiG95JvLZZW9S25r7VnV9ZfCWeF8HMflUamdQ4Xz-Y3C-Y0pnM9VCmc9nf1Z6CZfDYaxhz2mFCUDU9mpPNhDkAJvEJ5F_vLaKsQKMUOK-02AKqyS74VrhZUKc67Q5KDioW5fzcuRFc5dcf55nO46jMrq-04xvS9v_5f3t8N_AQAA__-pk5YM) to secure the votes to reopen the federal government. The shutdown could affect staffing at airports and the state's two national parks, as well as [cause delays](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS8yAQg5_G7vAsGxLbBcXfuMvfXunZmCUwhyEDXEje_sZ5hetUSPpG-rquV_LBx_t_2lnXl01r5FYC18p53SkWn6JNuVDgEWxKtfj47VYEPAsJAnA15MN7Vb3RNzCz7FnL8TwrwFnNvdMb2NN4k2yR54lv44Vwk2RgMnLaLGLv9VEmAVBKQLwMFu02KTWDtYZHSZ0CNr6mPFTHlV9UbHinJ-dhS3sftKv1UbrTvw6XDpfW2mDTSx0zDkOHyyE7XCwbzhTE_cjGnWMVjooo7qcKk1oUjjMX0RxVsTPFIj6wPmvzaD4EXy5jp-C-kw8fdP3bYU-NvwEAAP__SpGCZA) in processing applications for grants, passports, and benefits programs. Immigration enforcement, military operations, and the mail shouldn't be significantly affected. In a statement, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz [blamed Democrats](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu8jAQwPGncTbQ3eHE8eDh0ydlo0srdYwMviNWnRjFBkKfvqKv0PU__Ib_53E8-pjicnnzM7u6SR4XfpTEtfI6zn4pMS-S1-ITG5Cca4nL1zQSULtD2AGNwcf0HHUT3AmCxYYdmtZqIKttMznpseukN9rzSXtrAFCk1aCNeOpC30T3whCAEIGo2wvJudfagkhgg15p4BBrXvd14sqbL5Ke-c7r_pznJrmp1mtRh3-KBkXD9qqKhndePjj8X2_fioZSfb0VRQNac0AL_aEFBI1kqG9WF66PmFIsnVEaLrOP6Zeufxtyd_QTAAD__xiHcWM) for blocking a bill that would have averted a shutdown, saying they want "_taxpayer-funded healthcare for illegal aliens and a reversal of the Republican reforms blocking handouts to able-bodied adults who refuse to work_."
## Tony Parker's Mansion Listed for $20 Million
San Antonio Spurs legend Tony Parker is [selling his 53-acre estate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQRk9jOiN71phQuNiGLttuiQY8DlYMjuxRCLdfEe0N_vqNnuZ9f-_THWOK--MPbuT4E_K001ETMVOZNtxrzHvIpWKiXoWcucb9uU6goJNaSQWTx5jOyTTezcoPuiGn-24wCgYzNKuDWzAd4LyARwxhtlpZsL631lN3030T3SXTSoHWCsC2AcJyM2ZQIXjqNQqjyEfOpeWVmD5YQzrzm0q75K1JbmV-VfHrt4BRwHgcR1sI03W_5E3AeAUJGBdKNJfIp7ywpMrIJGDkvJ_yheVJRX7t8n-2PJCpXERe-QLGpjj_OmJKsdpeGPXYMKbvF_yz7d4O_gUAAP__jqaFyg) in Boerne for $20 million after enlisting one of the world’s top live streamers to boost its profile this summer. Parker said he built the 13,297-square-foot mansion as a "dream house for my family" during his NBA career, but he's "spending more time in France now" since retiring in 2019. Earlier this year, Parker’s real estate agent suggested inviting Twitch streamer Kai Cenat to [spend a month broadcasting](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwZutn98Ql4Ghi7d07WgR8xNQMFhA4-Ttq0R9g84nfae77_NyNiGGdP0yG-n2cHlJdNRIrVFZNpNqyMnlUk2kCVzOrYZ08wsCyp5DD7hYE-JzEZ3VF7CKd6T5JJUAVEJ1XjtLzsLFjtIoPlmnVjOSvEiS1jgxii7oF8YBkHNAPA0O3fohhALnLE3cMAFkQ8tlaJ4aPUx18ZnvVIY1b13UvrW9svGT4cxwPo5jWH3J6ZUynH3eqDKcTWlhjcRwbjk9-92UG5X-zfV_O3uffyr1yGGSk1TD7veuaLsfIcZQTxMTcN1MiO_e9r-37hp_AwAA__-eZoAF) from the property, and it "went trending worldwide in the first 45 minutes." The estate includes a [sprawling private waterpark](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOpA9mB8XLm5Dl9tuiSZ4HKwYG9mjEN5-ldW-wXanODpH3_d1W27og4-P_7iT4bdLS6SzBGKmvOwYi0_RpVww0ChcSlx8fG4LCOgbKRoBi0UfrkXV1tyF1bImI8deKwFa6XoztE59pxFAaLdqOQ20dhPqQXad7RFd7c1nTAoBUgqAoXXg1kkpLZyzNEqslCDrOeWWN2J6Y3HhSi_K7Zr2OpiN-ShV96-CuYL5PM92vwpGjJyiT59SBXMmDFQYmSqYMbNfwydxildzYH5Sbu6JcqTmF7oBMY6TVl17bEedjT1OH4Ivw1gp8djRh597_pu0l4HvAAAA__9iBYIJ) with eight pools, speed slides, and a lazy river; a 6,000-square-foot gym with a basketball court and arcade; tennis and sand volleyball courts; and a fruit orchard with a tortoise pond. The mansion itself is equally impressive, boasting six bedrooms, nine bathrooms, a library, a media room, a meditation suite, a barber studio, and a 1,500-bottle wine room.
## Injured Firefighter Eager to Return to Work
Fort Worth firefighter Caleb Halvorson, 26, is recovering at Parkland Hospital after he was [seriously injured](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAYBOCnwR0W_MF2KCiucZdrr7Qw_L-NDkMEbJy8_cr7CluP9Glm_j2Whw0xpO2vPdC0N-Ul4VkjtoZlOWyqISfKpdqIk6CcWw3p_76AgIFLwQUs3ob4WVTnzSq8lh0aOQ1aCdBKd7uxtLr7tGrnpRpG8H6Ug_DT6iTd7KRFF8yFSSFASgEw9gTk7kppQeRxkpYpgT60XPq2Y8O3rRQ_-YWld_nootlbe1Z2-8NgZjCf59mn1Xk6r5jBfO1hMMfsbGQwUy6Nn7m0nVMoSGHbGxZe0F1kSBtfv0qqvORM3OUY7bMig_mmYRiGO4O5K8Y_zxBjqOPElNgOG-JPl_a7B18GvgMAAP__PjqGew) while responding to a fire last month. In a nearby hospital, his son—weighing just one pound nine ounces when he was born 13 weeks premature in June—is receiving treatment in the NICU. Halvorson thought he was going to die when he was [trapped for nearly two minutes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL2SpCAQfhrMsKAPdQwILjGbSy-0WuhWalGmgB1n3n7LeYVNv6--3__3-Y4hhmP9hzvZ-uI0H3SWSLVSnnc8SkgHp1ww0qA4pVrC8bXNoKCTWkkFs8cQ37NpvF2UH3VDVg_daBSMZmw2q51xC7px7NGw9zT4zt94Ace9v2G3NMFeZlop0FoB9C0Du5sxo2L2NGgURpEPNeW2blTphYXjOz0pty7tTbRbrY8i_vwVMAmYzvNs3VKuFRcvYPpIBEwXJGDilKs8U66b5JCJw7pVytJhpEVuGJ8pl3TI5TsfMpO7gt5yxYwrSZdixEchAVOTrX-cIcZQ-kEYte4Y4qdR_d2PTws_AQAA__9qsoum) under a collapsed garage roof on Sept. 3. He's undergone three surgeries for second and third-degree burns and a damaged knee, with several more to come. While he's currently using a wheelchair, Halvorson is determined to return to work as a firefighter. Before that, though, he's eager to see his son: "_It's tough, I miss the little guy_ ," [he said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlHSIIwJFFxC5ksvpGRpxqhOaFySDPbfb7HB_sBmHbzq6n7_bsvNhhjS46_d0NQ38ZLwKBFrxbxsNpXAiTgXG3GUxFxLSP_XBSQMQkkhYfE2xM-iW2_u0k-qRaPGYdISJj21q-md7XvphgGot2pCB0qNVxrvXo-9nfo2mLNMSQlKSYBLR0DuqvUkiTyOyjZaog-Vc1dXrPi2heKHd8yd462NZq31WZr-TwNzA_NxHB3xW583TqCB-YwNzJR5EwltFh5tXUXC4845CQoZKTzWilmUV97DjkU4jtE-Cwpi9yrof-jCqc3GP48QYyiXsdHysdkQv8fU3yncDXwFAAD__zTJiPM). Halvorson’s fellow firefighters call his survival "nothing short of miraculous." clean_body: San Antonio Spurs legend Tony Parker is selling his 53-acre estate in Boerne for $20 million after enlisting one of the world’s top live streamers to boost its profile this summer. | | | | | | Thursday, October 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1928, child actor was born in Dallas. McFarland starred as the character Spanky in the popular Our Gang series of short comedies, which was later renamed The Little Rascals when syndicated for TV. We love dogs and the Aggies here at The Texas Flyover , but we goofed up when we referred to Texas A&M’s live mascot as a Border Collie. Many readers reminded us that the “First Lady of Aggieland” is actually a . We apologize for the error! At The Flyover , we’ve tested plenty of skincare products—but has quickly become a favorite among our team. Proudly American-made and rooted in faith, family, and freedom, Nimi blends clean ingredients with real results you can see and feel. If I had my druthers, in The Texas Flyover would be a Texas Flyover reader. That’s why we’ve structured this offering with you in mind: 5% bonus shares for all Texas Flyover readers who invest An additional 5% and 10% bonus for those investing larger amounts Legally, the offering is open to any U.S. citizen. But my heart—and our strategy—are focused on keeping ownership in the hands of our readers. Right now, we’re less than $350,000 away from hitting 50% of our ultimate funding goal - but our Q3 deadline for 50% raised has passed and we are behind. That’s why I’m asking our readers one more time: will you consider ? But some of our readers are asking: “How do I get a return on my investment?” Here’s why The Texas Flyover is different: Already profitable after just two years (most start-ups never are) 80% gross margins and 24% net income (exceptional margins) In the top 1% of media start-ups (proven strength) How investors could realize returns: 1. Profit Distributions (Dividends) – Because we’re already profitable, this is possible. Recap: Sale. Listing. Distributions. My Closing Pitch More than 1,450 Flyover readers have already joined us as investors. We’re just $350K away from our next milestone. If you’ve been considering investing, now is the moment. Let’s finish this round together and make The Texas Flyover a news company truly owned by its readers. While workers will receive back pay when a funding bill is passed, some non-essential services may be temporarily disrupted or delayed. Pending appropriation bills also contain around $675 million earmarked for projects in Texas that to secure the votes to reopen the federal government. The shutdown could affect staffing at airports and the state's two national parks, as well as in processing applications for grants, passports, and benefits programs. Immigration enforcement, military operations, and the mail shouldn't be significantly affected. In a statement, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz for blocking a bill that would have averted a shutdown, saying they want "taxpayer-funded healthcare for illegal aliens and a reversal of the Republican reforms blocking handouts to able-bodied adults who refuse to work." Tony Parker's Mansion Listed for $20 Million San Antonio Spurs legend Tony Parker is in Boerne for $20 million after enlisting one of the world’s top live streamers to boost its profile this summer. Parker said he built the 13,297-square-foot mansion as a "dream house for my family" during his NBA career, but he's "spending more time in France now" since retiring in 2019. Earlier this year, Parker’s real estate agent suggested inviting Twitch streamer Kai Cenat to from the property, and it "went trending worldwide in the first 45 minutes." The estate includes a with eight pools, speed slides, and a lazy river; a 6,000-square-foot gym with a basketball court and arcade; tennis and sand volleyball courts; and a fruit orchard with a tortoise pond. The mansion itself is equally impressive, boasting six bedrooms, nine bathrooms, a library, a media room, a meditation suite, a barber studio, and a 1,500-bottle wine room. Injured Firefighter Eager to Return to Work Fort Worth firefighter Caleb Halvorson, 26, is recovering at Parkland Hospital after he was while responding to a fire last month. In a nearby hospital, his son—weighing just one pound nine ounces when he was born 13 weeks premature in June—is receiving treatment in the NICU. Halvorson thought he was going to die when he was under a collapsed garage roof on Sept. 3. He's undergone three surgeries for second and third-degree burns and a damaged knee, with several more to come. While he's currently using a wheelchair, Halvorson is determined to return to work as a firefighter. Before that, though, he's eager to see his son: "It's tough, I miss the little guy ," . Halvorson’s fellow firefighters call his survival "nothing short of miraculous." His wife, Haley, that "this could have been so much worse" and remains optimistic that "we will get back to a normal life eventually." | Flying together with our sponsor Jessica from The Flyover put it simply: “My skin is brighter, smoother, and deeply hydrated.” Nimi’s 3-step anti-aging routine is powered by a —clinically backed to restore the skin barrier, boost collagen, and visibly reduce fine lines. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: My son, Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
That’s why I’ve taken on RFK Jr. for his radical conspiracy theories, his anti-vaccine platform, and his blatant attacks on Americans who live with disabilities.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T979646a4-0ef4-4749-877b-c41df4bd9edb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Ben will always be my “why.” [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5b2b5d6-1673-42d9-8886-1f677efabfc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Ben is my 37-year-old son who was born with cerebral palsy. I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like Ben would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. attacking key rights and protections for the disability community, that mission has become more important than ever. That’s why I’ve taken on RFK Jr. for his radical conspiracy theories, his anti-vaccine platform, and his blatant attacks on Americans who live with disabilities. And I’ve stood up to Trump’s efforts to slash Medicaid and government services that the disability community relies on. Today, more than 70 million Americans report that they are living with a disability. It’s clear: We need leaders in the U.S. House and Senate who will fiercely advocate for disabled folks to have the access to the health care, caretakers, jobs, and lives that they deserve. [So I’m personally asking, Peter: Will you please chip in $10 or more — split between me and Blue Amp Action — to elect a wave of disability champions to Congress in 2026 who will stand up to Trump and RFK Jr.’s attacks?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T223c4f17-b81d-424c-afd9-93c48698dce7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ac00069-37f6-45e7-954f-6db3085cbb40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfaba0a03-fcba-42b4-9b08-fcd1d7b0115b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60b537e3-2dc5-4b62-8158-9c538c3188f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | I’ll always be fighting for folks like Ben to have a chance to succeed. Thanks for all your support. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3762846b-c7b9-46da-8988-724f2bf1e78a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Defend our Courts
subject: We're building an ark to save PA judges from flood of GOP $$$
body:
In the biblical story of Noah’s ark. Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DkLzrBCMXyZ4ycTPY3uzR7UrcSy6Coo2EgujLHIZsn8QRbCKXkcKP6-HLrMl4imTolrLL0jZEZdyxsO825DeBG838kBArD5gU5rbbVxd_NSpgfM-CVJvm1T4b0d5UaWAsncqnHRJ2egCcKyq-3JmkzLvjpFr239l2PbDOYK85ZSJl0YZy-CToWrHaooy9r58AVQ1wEzUYYRFEJzlK-Zegg-90xd099G81rbJ1x_M7w0=&c=0D7mLP5sler7Xm3F4-gr6ALfE7HUdEQv1gPCN9Q-WHMV4vlel6TsBg==&ch=zGUyd1sD3OqjHQMJf2x5xmJOIvwKuNxzQt6XpjWrfMDopoJXzqzgmw==)
---
| Friend, In the biblical story of Noah's ark, Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth.
Defend our Courts has found ourselves in a similar situation to Noah within the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election. A race which if we lose will cost Democrats Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
This summer we received word of an impending demiurge of GOP spending aimed at washing away the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's State Supreme Court. Before anyone else, we began ringing the alarm bells and got to work on building the ark that would save this court.
Now our worst fears have come to fruition:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DkLzrBCMXyZ4ycTPY3uzR7UrcSy6Coo2EgujLHIZsn8QRbCKXkcKP6-HLrMl4imTolrLL0jZEZdyxsO825DeBG838kBArD5gU5rbbVxd_NSpgfM-CVJvm1T4b0d5UaWAsncqnHRJ2egCcKyq-3JmkzLvjpFr239l2PbDOYK85ZSJl0YZy-CToWrHaooy9r58AVQ1wEzUYYRFEJzlK-ZegvPmiOZ6VZl1k-HfWMMDzSw=&c=0D7mLP5sler7Xm3F4-gr6ALfE7HUdEQv1gPCN9Q-WHMV4vlel6TsBg==&ch=zGUyd1sD3OqjHQMJf2x5xmJOIvwKuNxzQt6XpjWrfMDopoJXzqzgmw==)
---
| To call it a flood is an understatement, what the GOP is throwing at us is nothing short of a Tsunami. They are treating this race like a presidential election.
Even in the deep blue city of Philadelphia, voters are having GOP canvassers knocks their doors multiple times a day, GOP vote no ads are filling social media and TV, and mailboxes are bursting with deceptive mailers using progressive language that say voting no will "defend democracy" and "protect women."
It is a flood of biblical proportions going down in a typically sleepy local Supreme Court race.
Defend our Courts is scrambling to finish building the ark that will save the three Democratic justices. We've assembled an army of canvassers, are sending mail, and are running ads, but we need to continue scaling rapidly if we hope to be seaworthy by the day the great flood hits - Election Day, November 4, 2025.
[We have 33 days left. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to ensure that Democrats aren't washed away in the life or death fight to save swing state Pennsylvania?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DkLzrBCMXyZ4ycTPY3uzR7UrcSy6Coo2EgujLHIZsn8QRbCKXkcKP6-HLrMl4imTYxMx3_Sun15_WXUUwuaRhrcER5zn-StHQx3jLFCMp7LEu1NvCguJLI5d5bVN7JbyrhE2mZLSTGkRLOPFNaDQKmPqBFRm9rhhITL6ASalmx7ifwql4x5oNEYwCRcxPaiDeDtFZYX1FHkcYdI4CyW_opumA8fKagePjogZEHZCnIkG0N02YeaGyw==&c=0D7mLP5sler7Xm3F4-gr6ALfE7HUdEQv1gPCN9Q-WHMV4vlel6TsBg==&ch=zGUyd1sD3OqjHQMJf2x5xmJOIvwKuNxzQt6XpjWrfMDopoJXzqzgmw==)
---
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

clean_body: In the biblical story of Noah’s ark. Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth. | | | | | == | Friend, In the biblical story of Noah's ark, Noah receives a divine warning that a massive flood is coming and that he must quickly build an ark to save life on earth. Defend our Courts has found ourselves in a similar situation to Noah within the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election. A race which if we lose will cost Democrats Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond. This summer we received word of an impending demiurge of GOP spending aimed at washing away the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's State Supreme Court. Before anyone else, we began ringing the alarm bells and got to work on building the ark that would save this court. Now our worst fears have come to fruition: | | == | To call it a flood is an understatement, what the GOP is throwing at us is nothing short of a Tsunami. They are treating this race like a presidential election. Even in the deep blue city of Philadelphia, voters are having GOP canvassers knocks their doors multiple times a day, GOP vote no ads are filling social media and TV, and mailboxes are bursting with deceptive mailers using progressive language that say voting no will "defend democracy" and "protect women." It is a flood of biblical proportions going down in a typically sleepy local Supreme Court race. Defend our Courts is scrambling to finish building the ark that will save the three Democratic justices. We've assembled an army of canvassers, are sending mail, and are running ads, but we need to continue scaling rapidly if we hope to be seaworthy by the day the great flood hits - Election Day, November 4, 2025. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | As the saying goes, we're fighting like we're the third monkey on the ramp to Noah's ark... and brother it's startin' to rain. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0k18z9cnqpkav4s6fj9d2zqud136wd5jsdadip8xaij6f6zcv8ftfnigfdr874u87sa9rb6kx10s90aeyvwq517c3vtf&__stmp=t3i67p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ity9f96hyrnt8y3jrjefsl2v36s39g8mh87kumeq32qeh4vbwfa2lq3gd6m9umfvzexw900w2876meo7ng9juu1ntjiwedxxpbc6doj022rycrr7ggdgysu8ltdnsohbanjuclelw5uljq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=o40io4oxrrl5b1k3c9sgjxx5quvfpdprme62297879s6m746gf6cv2jzvnvaqojdlu3xm7cqurxguhranhwjtnlcnzpmkx6l337jqyx1pn97lxv16gz5wlh7e8x4t26ro0j041ipgj8k6u8awhwinuik76zt6ga312&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=64luld8ccj8xfypkqzc55tszebpd2zorjfl5vyq2e1v5onayqlrndi3ehnacipknu03c78fidpawt7ru8o1zvm7i68nbd4b011hpb91gwij5utc9xqm3pteozjndh3bld18uzj9dakfmyrtxvm2frettc3jf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3i67p&__onlt=h)

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: What is happening in the US & State Senate?
body:
Less than five weeks to election day, help me raise $5,000

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f897667b1c26/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6421811?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# There is so much happening I don’t know where to start.
---
| | The government has shut down because our healthcare is being used a political pawn by Republican elected officials, we’re fighting the most extreme anti-abortion bill in our state’s history because our healthcare is being used as a political pawn by our Republican elected officials, hundreds of generals were berated by the highest office in the land held by Republican elected officials, and we have dozens of local elections we need to stay focused on right here at home. I started this newsletter to help folks digest the onslaught of news and political activity in our nation, our state and our community. And that’s what I intend to keep doing, every week, with a focus on education, action, and community engagement.
I had drafted a reflection on the one year anniversary of Helene to share in my newsletter this week. To remind folks that many are still building back, fighting for aid and that our community is so much more resilient than we realize. And to truly take a moment and celebrate how we all came together to help one another.
Helene spurred me to join a telethon for the Red Cross at WYFF the week of the hurricane and to get more involved with disaster response, preparedness, awareness and long term recovery on a local level. Which is why I'm thrilled to share that I’ve joined the board of the Red Cross of South Carolina as a liaison for the Upstate. Here is a [reflection](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9752f630ec&e=edbde6c9b1) from our Executive Director, Jaime Raichel and the [one year report](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=67d3a3177d&e=edbde6c9b1) since Helene.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c171267bcd&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Read More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eb4feee08f&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | I’m also celebrating the extraordinary welcome Spartanburg gave to the South Carolina Sister Senators on Monday evening at Wofford. Over 250 people came out to hear their story and [support their documentary](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d12f21a042&e=edbde6c9b1). I’m grateful to Dr. Samhat and the staff, students, and professors at [Wofford College ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=96a6ca4f51&e=edbde6c9b1)who are supporting these important ‘Candid Conversations’ fostering civil discourse across the political isle. Two of the former Senators testified at the state house yesterday. [You can listen to their testimony here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=afe99696da&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5c4a91aa9d&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Watch the Sister Senators Panel](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=436c84ace7&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Check out my latest podcast with Josh Burstein
---
| |

Kathryn sits down with political strategist, comedian, and creative force Josh Burstein for a wide-ranging conversation about politics, media, and resilience. From his early days with the Obama campaign to his stand-up comedy in Trump country, Josh reflects on how humor can help people process trauma and chaos in today’s volatile climate. The two discuss the fallout from political violence, the fragility of democracy, and why local action matters more than ever. With insights on late-night satire, grassroots organizing, and finding joy in the fight, this episode offers both perspective and a call to community engagement.
---
| [Listen Up](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ba4d818f93&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8126306178&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
# Early voting starts October 21
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & this Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=db024967ac&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| [Knock doors with Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=30e9eb6d49&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c0eea945f0&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=37ca8dfc55&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Help me raise the final $5,000 for my campaign](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=821afda856&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
---

---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c49cb47d6b&e=edbde6c9b1)

---
| |
# Support women running for office in Spartanburg October 7 at Art & Elections Event
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c8fa816989&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
There are some incredible women running for local elections here in Spartanburg. Join Alix Refshauge and Cathryn Judice at Ridge Gallery on Tuesday, October 7 - 146 E Main Street for a chance to meet a few of them, learn about upcoming elections, and enjoy some local art!
---
| [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=aaf057bd62&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | |
[**Hegseth & Trump delivered a scathing ultimatum to hundereds of Generals this week. **](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f00409f144&e=edbde6c9b1)[**Portland troop deployment expected to cost nearly $4 million** ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7df940c8f4&e=edbde6c9b1)**The government shutdown yesterday. Here’s what you need to know.**

Not all of government will shut down - those deemed essential workers continue as normal, although without pay for the time being.
* Border protection, law enforcement, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents, in-hospital medical care and air-traffic control workers are expected to continue to operate as usual.
* While social security and Medicare cheques will still be sent out, benefit verification and card issuance may stop.
* Government employees deemed non-essential are temporarily put on unpaid leave. In the past, these workers have then been paid retrospectively.
* That means that services like the food assistance programme and federally-funded pre-school and institutions like the Smithsonian museums will likely be curtailed or closed.
* Several agencies, like the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the National Institutes of Health (NIH) are likely to furlough many workers, affecting ongoing research and experiments already in progress.
* National parks and forests remained open during the last shutdown, but with few or no staff. This led to vandalism, littering and looting of historical sites, park advocates said.
* There could also be travel delays. Flight systems might "need to slow down, reducing efficiency", a representative from Airlines for America has warned. Passport agencies have warned that it could take longer than usual to process travel documents.
* Mail will still be delivered and post offices will remain open because the US Postal Service does not depend on Congress for funding.

---
| |
# A statement from the SCDP
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=894b0aaa3f&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
From the Sister Senators to the State House, our community showed up for women's rights this week. Monday night Spartanburg joined Wofford's Candid Conversation series to support the S.C. Sister Senators - legislators who crossed party lines to fight for women's healthcare rights in the state of South Carolina. We heard their story, engaged in the fight for our rights that continued today at the state house, and helped carry the torch forward. We raised over $12,000 for their documentary, telling the story of perseverance no matter the risk. Let's help them get this film to the finish line - support their efforts at [**https://www.sistersenatorsfilm.com.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=be3bde840b&e=edbde6c9b1) Thank you to Rep Rita Allison, Susu Johnson, Dr. Nayef Samhat and the extraordinary staff at Wofford for making the evening possible.
**Please call your Senators and tell them we won't stand for Senate Bill 323 that persecutes women, doctors, and even pastors.**[**Learn more here.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2564748fa8&e=edbde6c9b1) Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b5123ab9af&e=edbde6c9b1).

---

I started this newsletter to help folks digest the onslaught of news and political activity in our nation, our state and our community. And that’s what I intend to keep doing, every week, with a focus on education, action, and community engagement. I had drafted a reflection on the one year anniversary of Helene to share in my newsletter this week. To remind folks that many are still building back, fighting for aid and that our community is so much more resilient than we realize. And to truly take a moment and celebrate how we all came together to help one another. Helene spurred me to join a telethon for the Red Cross at WYFF the week of the hurricane and to get more involved with disaster response, preparedness, awareness and long term recovery on a local level. Which is why I'm thrilled to share that I’ve joined the board of the Red Cross of South Carolina as a liaison for the Upstate. Here is a from our Executive Director, Jaime Raichel and the since Helene. | | | I’m also celebrating the extraordinary welcome Spartanburg gave to the South Carolina Sister Senators on Monday evening at Wofford. Over 250 people came out to hear their story and . I’m grateful to Dr. Samhat and the staff, students, and professors at are supporting these important ‘Candid Conversations’ fostering civil discourse across the political isle. Two of the former Senators testified at the state house yesterday. | | | | Check out my latest podcast with Josh Burstein | | Kathryn sits down with political strategist, comedian, and creative force Josh Burstein for a wide-ranging conversation about politics, media, and resilience. From his early days with the Obama campaign to his stand-up comedy in Trump country, Josh reflects on how humor can help people process trauma and chaos in today’s volatile climate. The two discuss the fallout from political violence, the fragility of democracy, and why local action matters more than ever. With insights on late-night satire, grassroots organizing, and finding joy in the fight, this episode offers both perspective and a call to community engagement. | | | Early voting starts October 21 Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays | | Join me every Saturday at 10am & this Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! . | | | Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll | | | | | | | | | | **Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**** October 4 International Festival October 6 - SPCDP Monthly Meeting - meet Spartanburg’s new Sheriff October 7 - Art & Elections Event @ The Ridge Gallery 6pm October 6-17 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary October 18 - No Kings Rally in Spartanburg October 21 - Senate 12 Primary Election Day October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00 November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.) November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff November 10: SPCDP Monthly Meeting November 18 Run off elections December 1: State-wide Candidate Forum 6-7:30pm SCC Downtown Campus | | Support women running for office in Spartanburg October 7 at Art & Elections Event | | There are some incredible women running for local elections here in Spartanburg. Join Alix Refshauge and Cathryn Judice at Ridge Gallery on Tuesday, October 7 - 146 E Main Street for a chance to meet a few of them, learn about upcoming elections, and enjoy some local art! | | | | | CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online. | | | | | | government shutdown yesterday. Here’s what you need to know. Not all of government will shut down - those deemed essential workers continue as normal, although without pay for the time being. Border protection, law enforcement, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents, in-hospital medical care and air-traffic control workers are expected to continue to operate as usual. While social security and Medicare cheques will still be sent out, benefit verification and card issuance may stop. Government employees deemed non-essential are temporarily put on unpaid leave. In the past, these workers have then been paid retrospectively. That means that services like the food assistance programme and federally-funded pre-school and institutions like the Smithsonian museums will likely be curtailed or closed. Several agencies, like the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the National Institutes of Health (NIH) are likely to furlough many workers, affecting ongoing research and experiments already in progress. National parks and forests remained open during the last shutdown, but with few or no staff. This led to vandalism, littering and looting of historical sites, park advocates said. There could also be travel delays. Flight systems might "need to slow down, reducing efficiency", a representative from Airlines for America has warned. Passport agencies have warned that it could take longer than usual to process travel documents. Mail will still be delivered and post offices will remain open because the US Postal Service does not depend on Congress for funding. | | A statement from the SCDP | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | From the Sister Senators to the State House, our community showed up for women's rights this week. Monday night Spartanburg joined Wofford's Candid Conversation series to support the S.C. Sister Senators - legislators who crossed party lines to fight for women's healthcare rights in the state of South Carolina. We heard their story, engaged in the fight for our rights that continued today at the state house, and helped carry the torch forward. We raised over $12,000 for their documentary, telling the story of perseverance no matter the risk. Let's help them get this film to the finish line - support their efforts at Thank you to Rep Rita Allison, Susu Johnson, Dr. Nayef Samhat and the extraordinary staff at Wofford for making the evening possible. Please call your Senators and tell them we won't stand for Senate Bill 323 that persecutes women, doctors, and even pastors.** Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. All rights reserved.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: We’ve never seen anything like this
body:
But we didn’t expect this...

| | |
---
Friend, We knew Charlie's mission would live on. _But we didn't expect this..._ In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkib9sp3mhd1t7qp2evv06sel5hmls7vc10b9m68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h60o72c9h2bs)
---
Young Americans -- from high schools to college campuses -- are raising their hands and saying: **_" I'm ready to lead."_** And thanks to you -- many of them already are. Friend, your prayers... your generosity... You've helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it's within reach.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7k8bns48ll577k6gre1vbf5bsfus78cunr0duno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h60o72c9h2bs)
---
Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before...And it's moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... **The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum.** **And Friend, behind every new chapter ... is someone like you -- making sure students have what they need to lead.** We are _deeply grateful_ for you. And we promise -- we're not slowing down.
---
**For Charlie,** Andrew Sypher
Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA
---
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrhul40u1bcbf8p2d98eac2h9str0jivc7foqu30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h60o72c9h2bs) **P.S.** If you've already helped -- by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor -- **thank you.** Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie's mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn't do this without you. But if you haven't had the chance yet -- _and you feel called to act..._ **Here is a powerful way you can help:** **[Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit-- including leadership tools, Constitutions, flags, and chapter gear -- for a new student chapter...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi85r86p0urp39gjpu723nacpmgohc1u01qpqono_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h60o72c9h2bs)** **Again, if you've already stepped forward to help -- ****_thank you._** Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation. For America.

name: Team Collins
subject: Schumer Shuts Down the Government… And Attacks Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Stand up against Schumer’s plan

Dear Friend,The day after shutting down the federal government, Chuck Schumer launched another vicious attack against Susan Collins.Instead of working to end the crisis and restore stability to our country, Schumer is more focused on spreading lies about Susan. He cares more about slandering her than restoring order in our nation and solving problems.

Government shutdowns are a needless burden on the American people. They create chaos, hurt families, and disrupt essential services for no good reason.Families who sacrifice to serve our country are now worrying about how to pay their bills, all because Washington politicians like Chuck Schumer are playing political games.[Susan Collins is one of the few leaders willing to put politics aside and work for solutions. She's fighting to restore stability, protect Maine families, and end this needless shutdown.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTAwMl9CVy1XVi4xMTQ1MTBfdDE3MTkyNDAtMTE0MiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTEwMDJfQlctV1YuMTE0NTEwX3QxNzE5MjQwLTExNDIifQ/j576QzjO1CmhIOvHxGJTRA)[Demand Chuck Schumer end his political charade and do what is right for the American people. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1e03965-02f5-4287-8707-e651db75b130?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump made history this past week by designating Antifa as a terrorist organization following years of causing chaos in different parts of the country under the false guise of fighting "fascism."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KCt2NYNuDRb5JHP77IQ1ex4lSAz00LukE1uLVVpKaW8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175063420)
The Order directs the Federal government to investigate, disrupt, and dismantle all illegal operations conducted by Antifa or any person claiming to act on behalf of Antifa. It also calls for investigating, disrupting, and dismantling the funding sources behind such operations," the White House said about the purpose for the order.
The order cites the movement's desire and actions designed to overthrow the U.S. government as justification for the designation.
While the loose-knit organization and its various cells were very active during the 2020 Black Lives Matter riots, not many faced serious prosecution for their crimes when compared to how many participated in that year's anarchy. More importantly, the networks that supported them were not dismantled. And so, they waited. They waited for years to find another movement to get behind to get back out into the streets.
There has been some involvement with the anti-Israel protests and riots in the aftermath of Hamas' attacks in Israel on October 7, 2023, but that did not have the same momentum as BLM. It was not until Trump returned to office and ordered the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol to start enforcing immigration laws once again.
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [RFK Jr drops AUTISM BOMSHELL on Big Pharma](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just took dead aim on Big Pharma... and he is **NOT** messing around.
In a prime-time press conference he took them to task on everything from Tylenol and autism to COVID vaccines...
And Big Pharma is _**HORRIFIED**_.
For the first time in decades, they're face-to-face with a politician their money _**CAN NOT**_ control. And that means their # 1 fear may be about to come true.
RFK Jr is now poised to EXPOSE **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
It's a secret that could cost them hundreds-of-billions in profit and dark money political donations...
Which is why they'll do everything in their power to stop you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. And they may just succeed...
So we're not taking any chances, we're revealing everything TODAY in **[this short video](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. It's not every day the US Secretary of Health and Human Services calls out one of Big Pharma's biggest cash cows. But that's exactly what RFK Jr just did. And they're terrified he's going to go one step further by revealing **[Big Pharma's Biggest Secret yet](https://substack.com/redirect/960dcc13-682d-4891-ac6f-b51937ab6493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Antifa has been very active in their fight against the Trump administration's enhanced efforts to arrest and deport all illegal aliens from the United States. With this year's riots kicking off in Los Angeles back in June, cells in different parts of the country have continued their "direct action" against the Department of Homeland Security, namely in the Pacific Northwest.
The ICE facility in Portland, Oregon has been in Antifa's crosshairs all summer. Similar to 2020 at the federal courthouse, local and state police have been ordered by the far-left government to not help federal police officers. This has allowed the Antifa radicals to have a better chance to avoid arrest and consequences.
But it is not just the Pacific Northwest that has experienced sustained operations by Antifa. The ICE processing site in Broadview, Illinois, located just outside Chicago, has been targeted by Antifa and far-left groups this entire month. With Operation Midway Blitz underway in the region, the building has experienced riots in an attempt to stop the operation.
A security fence had to be installed on the street to keep rioters from blocking the driveway. This has forced anti-ICE crowds to gather on another street that leads to the facility, resulting in federal agents battling the mob to keep the roadway clear.
To say the operational environment for the agents being extremely dangerous is an understatement. In the aftermath of the far-leftist shooting at ICE agents in Dallas, Texas, which only resulted in detainees being shot and killed, the crowd that gathered in Broadview had no qualms about keeping that type of threat at the forefront of agents' minds.
During the lull in the fighting, the anti-ICE crowd chanted "Arrest ICE!" and "Shoot ICE!" One man took the threat further by shouting: "Shoot the f**kers! Shoot the f**kers!"
It took until the early afternoon until members of the mob **[were arrested by federal agents](https://substack.com/redirect/4182f2ae-1d87-4fcd-ac11-56be850b4a0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for interfering with federal operations.
The terrorist designation is just the first phase in the Trump administration's crackdown. The experienced Antifa militants are already running scared because this is the first time any serious effort is being made to dismantle their networks.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec16f9e-4582-43d4-a18e-b2c19127fe15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While decentralized, it is not impossible to do so. For example, money always leaves a paper trail. Like most things, it will take time until the country starts seeing results.

Antifa militants are already running scared... | | | Oct 2| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- President Donald Trump made history this past week by designating Antifa as a terrorist organization following years of causing chaos in different parts of the country under the false guise of fighting "fascism." The Order directs the Federal government to investigate, disrupt, and dismantle all illegal operations conducted by Antifa or any person claiming to act on behalf of Antifa. It also calls for investigating, disrupting, and dismantling the funding sources behind such operations," the White House said about the purpose for the order. The order cites the movement's desire and actions designed to overthrow the U.S. government as justification for the designation. While the loose-knit organization and its various cells were very active during the 2020 Black Lives Matter riots, not many faced serious prosecution for their crimes when compared to how many participated in that year's anarchy. More importantly, the networks that supported them were not dismantled. And so, they waited. They waited for years to find another movement to get behind to get back out into the streets. There has been some involvement with the anti-Israel protests and riots in the aftermath of Hamas' attacks in Israel on October 7, 2023, but that did not have the same momentum as BLM. And they're terrified he's going to go one step further by revealing . (Piece continues) Antifa has been very active in their fight against the Trump administration's enhanced efforts to arrest and deport all illegal aliens from the United States. With this year's riots kicking off in Los Angeles back in June, cells in different parts of the country have continued their "direct action" against the Department of Homeland Security, namely in the Pacific Northwest. The ICE facility in Portland, Oregon has been in Antifa's crosshairs all summer. Similar to 2020 at the federal courthouse, local and state police have been ordered by the far-left government to not help federal police officers. This has allowed the Antifa radicals to have a better chance to avoid arrest and consequences. But it is not just the Pacific Northwest that has experienced sustained operations by Antifa. The ICE processing site in Broadview, Illinois, located just outside Chicago, has been targeted by Antifa and far-left groups this entire month. With Operation Midway Blitz underway in the region, the building has experienced riots in an attempt to stop the operation. A security fence had to be installed on the street to keep rioters from blocking the driveway. This has forced anti-ICE crowds to gather on another street that leads to the facility, resulting in federal agents battling the mob to keep the roadway clear. To say the operational environment for the agents being extremely dangerous is an understatement. In the aftermath of the far-leftist shooting at ICE agents in Dallas, Texas, which only resulted in detainees being shot and killed, the crowd that gathered in Broadview had no qualms about keeping that type of threat at the forefront of agents' minds. name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: 🚨 The People Have Spoken: This Elon Tunnel is Ridiculous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Nashvillians don’t want the Music City Loop. We have the receipts.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K6JF9Z03N9YWVGPABWBCVMYR_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K6JF9Z03N9YWVGPABWBCVMYR_1)
---
| | | | Peter, We asked. You answered. Over 70% of you who participated in our survey _**oppose**_ Elon Musk’s “Music City Loop” project—an absurdly risky tunnel project to accommodate a private underground taxi service between the Capitol and the airport. Yet, Republican lawmakers are ignoring the risks and voices of residents, fast-tracking the boondoggle. This isn’t about addressing Nashville’s traffic woes. It’s about **power, profit and political overreach.** ** ** Despite serious unanswered safety questions, no impact study and overwhelming public opposition, the GOP just handed over state-owned property to a private company for free—while quietly planning **even more tunnel expansions** without community input. These Republicans running our state are such bad businessmen that they failed to retain public ownership of our own gravel - one of the most expensive costs of legitimate transportation projects.
Here’s what your neighbors are saying in our recent poll:
* 🛑 **73% oppose** using public land for a private tunnel.
* 🧑🤝🧑 **82% say the state should listen to local leaders and residents before approving projects like this.**
* 💸**Just 9% trust Elon Musk’s company to follow through safely.**

Tennesseans deserve real investments in _public transit, road safety and education_ —not a billionaire’s vanity tunnel.
📢 As part of our **End of Quarter Fundraising Drive** , we’re trying to hit **$5,000 in 48hrs!** **Help us hit this goal by donating $40 to defend our democracy.** Will you pitch in $40 today to help us oppose this project? Help us fight this billionaire boor!
---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---
| | [ Chip in $40 to block the Loop ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K6JF9Z03N9YWVGPABWBCVMYR_2)
---
| The GOP thinks they can bulldoze public trust with corporate handouts. Let’s show them that Tennessee voters are watching—and organizing. In solidarity,
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

---

---

name: Life or death
subject: This lie that MAGA is spreading about Dems could end it all
body:
If we can’t counter the horrible lie before voters begin to send in their mail in ballot and head to the polls it’s over for the Democratic party.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QnBFkQFJsOK9VnrtsoMBdsKB26tobwjYKT6-fOAvzUMGfCepnIlPfemv9XHlb2wvx3DzkHdM3YQJmVxdUUJvLvraBoY5ngm0aAlqxUN7QW_xCuDoVzIwEkcM38xxdCKJPmOlFwDDQVK1xR10vlpm0jskORCMnXE0JGc0TJ-ZRCHMGs6VC9NA3EO3bf4UuttcaEXk53EXAwpxdDyf_g0Vi3R1tMKVi_XAVLMGHaREOkcp7dxHvElSHA==&c=jbVa8PtZvwnPJ6QhcTgsSNMNLqoyOZV5H1PFc9gpuzqSNrSyfHKaow==&ch=XE0CFKnP07IaJ1BHMUZ1mTYL7iiSKTecNWedSG68k_X5PFEHl-Aq6Q==)
---
| Friend, The upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election, is the most important election of 2025, and chances are you haven't even heard of it.
On the line is control of Pennsylvania, its voting system, congressional maps, abortion, and more. If MAGA seizes the Court, Dems will lose Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
We will lose in 2026 and never win a presidential election again.
Which is exactly why MAGA is pulling out all stops to win this race including propagating some of the most diabolical lies imaginable:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QnBFkQFJsOK9VnrtsoMBdsKB26tobwjYKT6-fOAvzUMGfCepnIlPfemv9XHlb2wvx3DzkHdM3YQJmVxdUUJvLvraBoY5ngm0aAlqxUN7QW_xCuDoVzIwEkcM38xxdCKJPmOlFwDDQVK1xR10vlpm0jskORCMnXE0JGc0TJ-ZRCHMGs6VC9NA3EO3bf4UuttcaEXk53EXAwpxdDyf_g0Vi3R1tMKVi_XAc1Tw8FaTqnOiFBf99deSYQ==&c=jbVa8PtZvwnPJ6QhcTgsSNMNLqoyOZV5H1PFc9gpuzqSNrSyfHKaow==&ch=XE0CFKnP07IaJ1BHMUZ1mTYL7iiSKTecNWedSG68k_X5PFEHl-Aq6Q==)
---
| This mailer from a PAC bankrolled by the richest man in PA, ultra-maga billionaire Jeff Yass, says that the "liberal Supreme Court gerrymandered our congressional districts to help Democrats win" and includes an image of a congressional map, with two mangled districts circled in red.
This isn't true. A GOP-controlled state legislature drew these maps in 2011. They were so gerrymandered that 13 of PA's 18 Congressional seats went red. The current Supreme Court overturned it in 2018, declaring it a partisan gerrymander that favored Republicans.
Trump wants to reinstate the gerrymandered maps and go even further by removing all Democratic seats from PA. To do that he is working to remove the justices that struck the original map down. He'll have his chance in 33 days when they go up for reelection.
This election is so important to the GOP that they are treating it like a Presidential election spending in the tens and soon hundreds of millions. Defend our Courts is coordinating the Democrats' defense of this key court but we are outnumbered, outgunned, and time is running out.
[We need to counter the GOP's lies before voters begin send their mail in ballot and head to the polls. Can we count on you to rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 to help keep voters one step ahead of MAGA disinformation?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QnBFkQFJsOK9VnrtsoMBdsKB26tobwjYKT6-fOAvzUMGfCepnIlPfemv9XHlb2wvhjprgAIRwlRZpqC7uh-0SwooNLbG3GWX2wpDKM8MCZZ6mWQLslKdmCkBCsDs5673AY33U6y-sIR9BMPwcl1-f7qnpUIz1eSw3_Rz-SxwSnU9ViM7SUE7H4Z_IZ99iHOGuu4tvyWx9XYN2UiNVfIsymR1PswrYRdFTVTZjxeAS6H-ZGJhspOtWXOWWowCZgCr&c=jbVa8PtZvwnPJ6QhcTgsSNMNLqoyOZV5H1PFc9gpuzqSNrSyfHKaow==&ch=XE0CFKnP07IaJ1BHMUZ1mTYL7iiSKTecNWedSG68k_X5PFEHl-Aq6Q==)

clean_body: If we can’t counter the horrible lie before voters begin to send in their mail in ballot and head to the polls it’s over for the Democratic party. | | | | | == | Friend, The upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election, is the most important election of 2025, and chances are you haven't even heard of it. On the line is control of Pennsylvania, its voting system, congressional maps, abortion, and more. If MAGA seizes the Court, Dems will lose Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond. We will lose in 2026 and never win a presidential election again. Which is exactly why MAGA is pulling out all stops to win this race including propagating some of the most diabolical lies imaginable: | | == | This mailer from a PAC bankrolled by the richest man in PA, ultra-maga billionaire Jeff Yass, says that the "liberal Supreme Court gerrymandered our congressional districts to help Democrats win" and includes an image of a congressional map, with two mangled districts circled in red. This isn't true. A GOP-controlled state legislature drew these maps in 2011. They were so gerrymandered that 13 of PA's 18 Congressional seats went red. The current Supreme Court overturned it in 2018, declaring it a partisan gerrymander that favored Republicans. Trump wants to reinstate the gerrymandered maps and go even further by removing all Democratic seats from PA. To do that he is working to remove the justices that struck the original map down. He'll have his chance in 33 days when they go up for reelection. This election is so important to the GOP that they are treating it like a Presidential election spending in the tens and soon hundreds of millions. Defend our Courts is coordinating the Democrats' defense of this key court but we are outnumbered, outgunned, and time is running out. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | If these lies go unchecked we lose this race hands down. Let's get the truth out there. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: We’ve never seen anything like this
body:
But we didn’t expect this...

| | |
---
Friend, We knew Charlie's mission would live on. _But we didn't expect this..._ In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt4r0321f3vvn9u7kk6klilbifkt5tilv4m7i6hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)
---
Young Americans -- from high schools to college campuses -- are raising their hands and saying: **_" I'm ready to lead."_** And thanks to you -- many of them already are. Friend, your prayers... your generosity... You've helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it's within reach.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze2cc5ngaco4gir4pjg8gp8gfaes7gd99qvb2r58_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)
---
Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before...And it's moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... **The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum.** **And Friend, behind every new chapter ... is someone like you -- making sure students have what they need to lead.** We are _deeply grateful_ for you. And we promise -- we're not slowing down.
---
**For Charlie,** Andrew Sypher
Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA
---
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrlt4qj8kl5de71iqffe2ussifcj8ns1eefgik5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs) **P.S.** If you've already helped -- by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor -- **thank you.** Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie's mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn't do this without you. But if you haven't had the chance yet -- _and you feel called to act..._ **Here is a powerful way you can help:** **[Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit-- including leadership tools, Constitutions, flags, and chapter gear -- for a new student chapter...](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfo6uk5dggpfk7ilgiavont0k8dci3g88k2h7b6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)** **Again, if you've already stepped forward to help -- ****_thank you._** Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation. For America.
---
[ 1 KIT = $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp8sd86lpfhbhe6h9rsr4p29tog39tn80gemoj2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)
---
[ 2 KITS = $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpa943cup7os6q228kij2jrfv6ce59i22ujmbd00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)
---
[ 10 KITS = $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9null1j8hluerncb4en4d6ppfa3l83deva1htm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5h62ob2cjh2bs)
---

clean_body: But we didn’t expect this... | | | Friend, We knew Charlie's mission would live on. But we didn't expect this... In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school. Young Americans -- from high schools to college campuses -- are raising their hands and saying: " I'm ready to lead." And thanks to you -- many of them already are. Friend, your prayers... your generosity... You've helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it's within reach. Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before...And it's moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum. And Friend, behind every new chapter ... is someone like you -- making sure students have what they need to lead. We are deeply grateful for you. And we promise -- we're not slowing down. For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA P.S. If you've already helped -- by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor -- thank you. Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie's mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn't do this without you. But if you haven't had the chance yet -- and you feel called to act... Here is a powerful way you can help: Again, if you've already stepped forward to help -- thank you. Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation.
