name: Life or death
subject: This lie that MAGA is spreading about Dems could end it all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
If we can’t counter the horrible lie before voters begin to send in their mail in ballot and head to the polls it’s over for the Democratic party.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LfYFD6XlPKeBVU-0QbemjbSGCezfP8-rjEiJzvr0FhwUhzkiEwzWPLp9CbEtROhwaPsbvuNyFVhpnJwbwX8-7p_DOTzzeaKAXD4OwtM0cr2T3v0mBPkIq_5ocqnK-7D1QcUK2H2JcRaIYM2Vt8Yw756_k8f7LqfHMnY3-0X1pwdYyuCgBY_53IVI3Gf95zDd2y1tRENYjgmG6ckbovvPJoIS2Z-360ua17G7rFboj3M=&c=pbaCqaXnY2iSLVm92A8f1F6BaTtsqhpo7i-yhqeTuvKJFFoMtKjARg==&ch=rAoUlokHvJMcnA8Al1N4q8jHiZUaTIBAcoStvg2vZtMTBBBQHFDRqw==)
---
| Peter,
The upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election, is the most important election of 2025, and chances are you haven't even heard of it.
On the line is control of Pennsylvania, its voting system, congressional maps, abortion, and more. If MAGA seizes the Court, Dems will lose Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
We will lose in 2026 and never win a presidential election again.
Which is exactly why MAGA is pulling out all stops to win this race including propagating some of the most diabolical lies imaginable:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LfYFD6XlPKeBVU-0QbemjbSGCezfP8-rjEiJzvr0FhwUhzkiEwzWPLp9CbEtROhwaPsbvuNyFVhpnJwbwX8-7p_DOTzzeaKAXD4OwtM0cr2T3v0mBPkIq_5ocqnK-7D1QcUK2H2JcRaIYM2Vt8Yw756_k8f7LqfHMnY3-0X1pwdYyuCgBY_53IVI3Gf95zDd2y1tRENYjgmG6ckbovvPJgp4F4EpA24aXuNORfUOywo=&c=pbaCqaXnY2iSLVm92A8f1F6BaTtsqhpo7i-yhqeTuvKJFFoMtKjARg==&ch=rAoUlokHvJMcnA8Al1N4q8jHiZUaTIBAcoStvg2vZtMTBBBQHFDRqw==)
---
| | | | This mailer from a PAC bankrolled by the richest man in PA, ultra-maga billionaire Jeff Yass, says that the "liberal Supreme Court gerrymandered our congressional districts to help Democrats win" and includes an image of a congressional map, with two mangled districts circled in red.
This isn't true. A GOP-controlled state legislature drew these maps in 2011. They were so gerrymandered that 13 of PA's 18 Congressional seats went red. The current Supreme Court overturned it in 2018, declaring it a partisan gerrymander that favored Republicans.
Trump wants to reinstate the gerrymandered maps and go even further by removing all Democratic seats from PA. To do that he is working to remove the justices that struck the original map down. He'll have his chance in 33 days when they go up for reelection.
This election is so important to the GOP that they are treating it like a Presidential election spending in the tens and soon hundreds of millions. Defend Our Courts is coordinating the Democrats' defense of this key court but we are outnumbered, outgunned, and time is running out.
[We need to counter the GOP's lies before voters begin send their mail in ballot and head to the polls. Can we count on you to rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 to help keep voters one step ahead of MAGA disinformation?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LfYFD6XlPKeBVU-0QbemjbSGCezfP8-rjEiJzvr0FhwUhzkiEwzWPLp9CbEtROhwEmoJaOeb_kQh20m94M4N7fWSxFD_f58fWZkAO_QJ8Bz6_ge7hMQm9CedD3obHh4VPnuPqg6GcL2QqhQXctfcm__mLln8wQ6PozvEi0noj8ktyitjCaIPwEGYywXyMYn15WMKKTDVnqg3edZGDrTsbewS2e8njjr9JkKR6xpYZExxivbjoSBE3w==&c=pbaCqaXnY2iSLVm92A8f1F6BaTtsqhpo7i-yhqeTuvKJFFoMtKjARg==&ch=rAoUlokHvJMcnA8Al1N4q8jHiZUaTIBAcoStvg2vZtMTBBBQHFDRqw==)

name: Sounding the Alarm @ VPP
subject: Re: Your local Post Office >>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump wants to DISMANTLE USPS!?!
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW)
---
**FACT #1:** Donald Trump has been foaming at the mouth to PRIVATIZE and DESTROY the U.S. Postal Service as we know it!

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

[**THAT’S WHY WE NEED A SURGE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS TO STAND WITH USPS: Add your name by MIDNIGHT and defend your local Post Office from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW)
[I STAND WITH THE POSTAL SERVICE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251002_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW)
---
Thank you for taking action,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21377%2E878179%2EJmv0sW).**

Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ieXRoZWJhbGxvdC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3NTEwMzAzNiwicyI6NTE1NjU2NiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTQxMzM1NywiZXhwIjoyMDc0OTg5MzU3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.zYQLF4xlLlV-YG0DpqD6qbRB38Yn23U1BW_4K6gvSeQ?)
The party of "small government" has proven once again that what they really want is a weaker America. They started the year with a billionaire and a chainsaw -- cutting so-called "government waste," which somehow meant gutting foreign aid, education, health and human services, Social Security, veterans' affairs, and environmental protection.
Then came the "Big Beautiful Bill" -- slashing Medicaid for millions, cutting food assistance for impoverished families, pouring money into Trump's border wall, and handing out massive tax cuts to millionaires, billionaires, and corporations.
Here in Virginia, where the federal government is the single largest employer, the impacts have been devastating. Tens of thousands lost their jobs. Families lost healthcare and food support. Veterans and military families saw their benefits stripped away. Every hiccup in federal funding hits Virginians first and hardest.
And yet, Republicans still weren't done.
## **Manufactured Chaos, Bad Faith "Negotiations"**
For weeks, Democratic leadership tried--albeit weakly--to bring Trump and Republicans to the table.
> Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer:
> SCHUMER: I hope and pray that that Trump will sit down with us and negotiate
> BASH: And if he doesn't, I'm just confirming that you'll vote no. Is that correct?
> SCHUMER: We are hoping that he will negotiate with us
> BASH: And if he doesn't?
> SCHUMER: We must get a better bill than what they have.
At the eleventh hour, Schumer and Jeffries were summoned to the White House along with Thune and Johnson.
The President grinned for the cameras, reveling in the chaos he caused.
Now, for those following along, you might remember that Republicans currently control the House, the Senate, AND the White House. But that doesn't stop these con artists from fabricating the most insane story of all time:
Hours later, JD Vance stepped outside to declare:
> "Democrats want a $1.5 TRILLION spending package that funded free health care for illegals. We told them that was absurd -- and now they're willing to shut down the government over it."
A total fabrication. No evidence. Just lies. And it showed what was clear all along: Republicans never intended to negotiate in good faith. Their CR wasn't a compromise -- it was designed to rip healthcare from millions regardless of immigration status.
Speaker Mike Johnson piled on with crocodile tears about WIC and FEMA losing funding. Let's be crystal fucking clear: **you don 't get to gut vital programs for nine months and then blame Democrats for holding up your sham bill.** That's not negotiating -- it's hostage-taking.
Meanwhile, Trump gleefully posted an AI video of Schumer calling Democrats "woke pieces of shit," later replayed in the White House briefing room in a clear [display of maturity](https://substack.com/redirect/1c0836a2-91e9-4978-a44e-4e713b79674b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This is not governing. It's trolling with the full weight of the federal government behind it.
## **Shutdown as a Weapon**
[The next day,](https://substack.com/redirect/fd95fbf2-e26a-4ab8-a7a6-92babb55e141?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Republicans refused to recognize Democrats in the House seeking a vote to avoid a shutdown. With most GOP members out of town, they immediately gaveled the chamber into recess.
By Wednesday, contractors across D.C. received stop-work orders -- but with a twist: these notices explicitly blamed Senate Democrats for the shutdown--a blatant Hatch Act violation, unprecedented in federal contracting.
At HUD, the agency homepage featured the following message:
> "The Radical Left are going to shut down the government and inflict massive pain on the American people unless they get their $1.5 trillion wish list of demands. The Trump administration wants to keep the government open for the American people."
Government propaganda straight out of a tinpot regime.
As former Biden official Rob Flaherty noted, Democrats weren't even allowed to use the word "MAGA" under the Hatch Act. Republicans simply don't care. They want less government, and the shutdown serves that goal.
I was thinking about this earlier. One of my all-time favorite movies is The Big Short. And in one scene, Steve Carell's character, Mark Baum, has gone down to Florida, and he and his employees have just finished listening to two mortgage brokers discuss how they are essentially making fraudulent loans that are--unbeknownst to them--contributing to the impending mortgage crisis in a cocky and confident manner. And then he pulls his two guys aside and says:
> Mark Baum: "I don't get it. Why are they confessing?"
> Danny Moses: "They're not confessing."
> Porter Collins: "They're bragging."
That's how this administration feels. This administration brags about the damage, much like the mortgage brokers in _The Big Short_ who exposed fraud without realizing it.
That's the GOP now. Rubbing our faces in their abuse of power because the pain only falls on us, not them.
## **An Authoritarian Playbook**
Trump has spared no opportunity in his second term to shutter agencies, slim down the federal workforce, and reconfigure the budget with aggressive tactics that stretch the law to its breaking point. And now, with a cabinet full of sycophants and true believers instead of the cautious political operatives who occasionally checked him in 2016, he's pushing far beyond even the extremes of his first term.
This isn't governing. This is punishment. OMB Director and Project 2025 architect Russell Vought openly bragged about using the shutdown to fire--not furlough--thousands of federal workers. Trump himself said a shutdown was a "good" opportunity to gut agencies he didn't like and slash benefits that didn't serve him politically. And JD Vance tried to wrap it in Orwellian doublespeak, claiming massive firings were needed to "preserve essential services."
We all know what "essential services" means in their lexicon: ICE raids, border walls, and militarized crackdowns. Not food assistance. Not healthcare. Not housing.
The mask is off. Trump and his allies are openly signaling that they will use every tool of the federal government to punish their political enemies and enrich their friends. They aren't even hiding it--they're bragging about it. Just like the mortgage brokers in _The Big Short_ who smirked through admitting their fraud, this administration rubs our noses in it, gleefully daring anyone to stop them.
This is the authoritarian playbook, page by page:
* **Take the power away from those who check you.**
* **Punish your political enemies with the force of the federal government.**
* **Spin a narrative that blames your opponents for the chaos you created.**

The result? Millions suffer, not the men in power. And unless Democrats stop treating this like "politics as usual" and start naming it for what it is--an authoritarian assault on democracy--we're just letting them run the same play over and over again.
## **The GOP Owns This**
Let's not get this twisted. Republicans control the House, the Senate, **and** the White House. They had every single lever of power in their hands -- and they still managed to shut the government down. That's not dysfunction; that's sabotage.
Some Democrats are already wringing their hands, falling into the trap of self-blame. But let's be honest: the real reason Democrats rejected Trump's continuing resolution is because it would have meant **24 million Americans losing healthcare**. The uninsured population would explode. Families would go bankrupt just to stay alive. How could standing against that possibly be "the problem"?
Republicans knew exactly what they were doing. They wanted pain. They wanted punishment. And they tried to spin it so that Democrats would take the blame. But here's the tell: the NRCC is spending only **four figures** --literally just a few thousand dollars--on ads to push that message. Town council candidates spend more. If they thought this was a winning issue, they'd be blanketing the airwaves. They aren't, because they know they own it.
Meanwhile, Trump and his cronies are openly bragging about the damage, turning stop-work orders into propaganda sheets blaming Democrats, using HUD's homepage as a campaign billboard, and blasting out AI-generated lies about "funding illegals" on government channels. It's not politics as usual. It's an authoritarian flex.
So enough letters. Enough pearl-clutching. Enough pretending this is a negotiation gone wrong. This is a crisis of their own making. **Republicans own every bit of this shutdown, and the longer Democrats act like it 's a shared burden, the more they play right into Trump's hands.**
We don't need a minority party. We need an opposition party. And we needed it yesterday.

clean_body: Special Post: The Republicans Own This | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Special Post: The Republicans Own This | | | Oct 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? The party of "small government" has proven once again that what they really want is a weaker America. They started the year with a billionaire and a chainsaw -- cutting so-called "government waste," which somehow meant gutting foreign aid, education, health and human services, Social Security, veterans' affairs, and environmental protection. Then came the "Big Beautiful Bill" -- slashing Medicaid for millions, cutting food assistance for impoverished families, pouring money into Trump's border wall, and handing out massive tax cuts to millionaires, billionaires, and corporations. Here in Virginia, where the federal government is the single largest employer, the impacts have been devastating. Tens of thousands lost their jobs. Families lost healthcare and food support. Veterans and military families saw their benefits stripped away. Every hiccup in federal funding hits Virginians first and hardest. And yet, Republicans still weren't done. Manufactured Chaos, Bad Faith "Negotiations" For weeks, Democratic leadership tried--albeit weakly--to bring Trump and Republicans to the table. Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer: SCHUMER: I hope and pray that that Trump will sit down with us and negotiate BASH: And if he doesn't, I'm just confirming that you'll vote no. Is that correct? SCHUMER: We are hoping that he will negotiate with us BASH: And if he doesn't? SCHUMER: We must get a better bill than what they have. At the eleventh hour, Schumer and Jeffries were summoned to the White House along with Thune and Johnson. The President grinned for the cameras, reveling in the chaos he caused. Now, for those following along, you might remember that Republicans currently control the House, the Senate, AND the White House. But that doesn't stop these con artists from fabricating the most insane story of all time: Hours later, JD Vance stepped outside to declare: "Democrats want a $1.5 TRILLION spending package that funded free health care for illegals. We told them that was absurd -- and now they're willing to shut down the government over it." A total fabrication. No evidence. Just lies. And it showed what was clear all along: Republicans never intended to negotiate in good faith. Their CR wasn't a compromise -- it was designed to rip healthcare from millions regardless of immigration status. Speaker Mike Johnson piled on with crocodile tears about WIC and FEMA losing funding. Let's be crystal fucking clear: you don 't get to gut vital programs for nine months and then blame Democrats for holding up your sham bill. That's not negotiating -- it's hostage-taking. Meanwhile, Trump gleefully posted an AI video of Schumer calling Democrats "woke pieces of shit," later replayed in the White House briefing room in a clear . This is not governing. It's trolling with the full weight of the federal government behind it. Shutdown as a Weapon Republicans refused to recognize Democrats in the House seeking a vote to avoid a shutdown. With most GOP members out of town, they immediately gaveled the chamber into recess. By Wednesday, contractors across D.C. received stop-work orders -- but with a twist: these notices explicitly blamed Senate Democrats for the shutdown--a blatant Hatch Act violation, unprecedented in federal contracting. At HUD, the agency homepage featured the following message: "The Radical Left are going to shut down the government and inflict massive pain on the American people unless they get their $1.5 trillion wish list of demands. The Trump administration wants to keep the government open for the American people." Government propaganda straight out of a tinpot regime. As former Biden official Rob Flaherty noted, Democrats weren't even allowed to use the word "MAGA" under the Hatch Act. Republicans simply don't care. They want less government, and the shutdown serves that goal. I was thinking about this earlier. One of my all-time favorite movies is The Big Short. And in one scene, Steve Carell's character, Mark Baum, has gone down to Florida, and he and his employees have just finished listening to two mortgage brokers discuss how they are essentially making fraudulent loans that are--unbeknownst to them--contributing to the impending mortgage crisis in a cocky and confident manner. And then he pulls his two guys aside and says: Mark Baum: "I don't get it. Why are they confessing?" Danny Moses: "They're not confessing." Porter Collins: "They're bragging." That's how this administration feels. This administration brags about the damage, much like the mortgage brokers in The Big Short who exposed fraud without realizing it. That's the GOP now. Rubbing our faces in their abuse of power because the pain only falls on us, not them. An Authoritarian Playbook Trump has spared no opportunity in his second term to shutter agencies, slim down the federal workforce, and reconfigure the budget with aggressive tactics that stretch the law to its breaking point. And now, with a cabinet full of sycophants and true believers instead of the cautious political operatives who occasionally checked him in 2016, he's pushing far beyond even the extremes of his first term. This isn't governing. This is punishment. OMB Director and Project 2025 architect Russell Vought openly bragged about using the shutdown to fire--not furlough--thousands of federal workers. Trump himself said a shutdown was a "good" opportunity to gut agencies he didn't like and slash benefits that didn't serve him politically. And JD Vance tried to wrap it in Orwellian doublespeak, claiming massive firings were needed to "preserve essential services." We all know what "essential services" means in their lexicon: ICE raids, border walls, and militarized crackdowns. Not food assistance. Not healthcare. Not housing. The mask is off. Trump and his allies are openly signaling that they will use every tool of the federal government to punish their political enemies and enrich their friends. They aren't even hiding it--they're bragging about it. Just like the mortgage brokers in The Big Short who smirked through admitting their fraud, this administration rubs our noses in it, gleefully daring anyone to stop them. This is the authoritarian playbook, page by page: Take the power away from those who check you. Punish your political enemies with the force of the federal government. Spin a narrative that blames your opponents for the chaos you created. The result? Millions suffer, not the men in power. And unless Democrats stop treating this like "politics as usual" and start naming it for what it is--an authoritarian assault on democracy--we're just letting them run the same play over and over again. The GOP Owns This Let's not get this twisted. Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. They had every single lever of power in their hands -- and they still managed to shut the government down. That's not dysfunction; that's sabotage. Some Democrats are already wringing their hands, falling into the trap of self-blame. But let's be honest: the real reason Democrats rejected Trump's continuing resolution is because it would have meant 24 million Americans losing healthcare. The uninsured population would explode. Families would go bankrupt just to stay alive. How could standing against that possibly be "the problem"? Republicans knew exactly what they were doing. They wanted pain. They wanted punishment. And they tried to spin it so that Democrats would take the blame. But here's the tell: the NRCC is spending only four figures --literally just a few thousand dollars--on ads to push that message. Town council candidates spend more. If they thought this was a winning issue, they'd be blanketing the airwaves. They aren't, because they know they own it. Meanwhile, Trump and his cronies are openly bragging about the damage, turning stop-work orders into propaganda sheets blaming Democrats, using HUD's homepage as a campaign billboard, and blasting out AI-generated lies about "funding illegals" on government channels. It's not politics as usual. It's an authoritarian flex. So enough letters. Enough pearl-clutching. Enough pretending this is a negotiation gone wrong. This is a crisis of their own making. Republicans own every bit of this shutdown, and the longer Democrats act like it 's a shared burden, the more they play right into Trump's hands. We don't need a minority party. We need an opposition party. And we needed it yesterday. Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhh1p6z1ru4rl7mir1nslnnvt19bt30xv7du4rr78ly4rdb4uzryjkllcikn0lhgfq016bxsyfhyj9lvz4bkxs&__stmp=t3id2t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti1xmmze1gdwyr8s11ell5gz9uhfauosecny9t2uqubflcmpjiphdayaoa3wn42n0v6srzdbbmpnp95jl3c87bccoou9611m3xn9vnvyf1i0ks8rmy70eebj07ay8sstf38yx9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhh1p6z1ru4rl7mir1nslnnvt19bt30xv7du4rr78ly4rdb4uzryjkllcikn0lhgfq016bxsyfhyj9lvz4bkxs&__stmp=t3id2t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptgt9kax8yscuqmui8bbl35uqbo63idibkt24g51t92p9s016x2tds6x2g1opyd744ilmci3yqw2wh1yp7ovizxqi78yuz2jfsivkbmh5uofqasp57nok6o5xlnblu45lc7f8pr5uqxz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfrxhgkx171qj4lqh9z5x9ojmnubnx1apnx6civrexaq6ahxsoufcinc02wo2w11x0u72fvn93znx599bcqcihqbj7qak8d3of9j0haarh3ntk1tapljccqjrwnz6il18&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3id2t&__onlt=h)

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: Hope
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
People run for office for different reasons. I’m running because Texas has lost good government, and I want it back. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/fed-up-14189501?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=afb91c2713&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , On Monday night, I spoke to voters at the Friendswood Democrats monthly meeting. After my remarks and a spirited Q&A, a woman came up to me, shook my hand, and said: _“I had given up hope. But after hearing you tonight, you’ve given me hope again.”_ Her words moved me deeply. I told her, _“That’s the best thing I could hope to do.”_ People run for office for different reasons. Some want a job, some want the spotlight, some run for power, fame, or fortune. **I’m running because Texas has lost good government, and I want it back.** Good government means servant leadership. Leaders who put themselves last and the people they serve first. Leaders who tell the truth, who can’t be bought, and who always have your back. **That is my pledge to Texans:**
_I’ll never lie to you.
I can’t be bought.
And I have your back._ **I’m running for Attorney General because Texans deserve honesty, fairness, and justice again. But I can’t do it alone.** [**Will you join me in restoring good government to the Attorney General’s office?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d8418c2d22&e=5d8d80652b) Together, we can show the state, and the nation, what true democratic leadership looks like. Onward,

****
---

Leaders who tell the truth, who can’t be bought, and who always have your back. That is my pledge to Texans: I’ll never lie to you. I can’t be bought. And I have your back. I’m running for Attorney General because Texans deserve honesty, fairness, and justice again. But I can’t do it alone. Together, we can show the state, and the nation, what true democratic leadership looks like. Onward, ** | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@jaworskifortexas.com | | Pol adv. paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign Our mailing address is:** Jaworski for Texas 2228 Mechanic St Ste 307 Galveston, TX 77550-1881 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Andy Kim
subject: Republicans are playing politics with people’s lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Republicans officially forced us into a government shutdown, and it’s hard to step away feeling anything but angry.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116442099/573435796/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWZhZmE5OC05YzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1foSZJp27GJ1zco3WecAkHi9zHkCZBxwSyZDl6ZgvCM=&emci=8b701893-969f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f5fafa98-9c9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Republicans officially forced us into a government shutdown, and it's hard to step away feeling anything but angry. How is giving families healthcare they can afford the breaking point? Why is protecting people's access to affordable care the hill Republicans have chosen to shut down the government on? Here's where I stand: while we're in shutdown, members of Congress and the President should feel it too. That's why I'll be joining my staff, our troops, and public servants across the country whose pay will be withheld. It's a small gesture, but a necessary one — because Americans are paying the price for Republicans' inability to govern. Republicans have made this fight life-or-death by refusing to fund critical healthcare subsidies. Without action, premiums are about to skyrocket in 2026. Families already struggling to make ends meet will be forced to choose between paying for groceries or paying for care. Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress would rather shut down the government than lower your insurance costs. They're playing politics with people's lives. American families deserve a solution NOW — not when it's politically convenient, not after weeks of partisan games. I won't stop fighting until we get there. More soon, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
---
| This email was sent by **[Andy Kim](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116442100/573435797/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWZhZmE5OC05YzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1foSZJp27GJ1zco3WecAkHi9zHkCZBxwSyZDl6ZgvCM=&emci=8b701893-969f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f5fafa98-9c9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26261389).**

P.O. Box 211
Marlton, NJ 08053
United States

name: Team DNC
subject: Straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Derek,
This is a shorter message. We know your inbox is probably full, so we’ll get straight to the point.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first contribution of 2025 to the DNC, this is it. Here’s why:
A new poll shows a tie in the New Jersey governor’s race. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, and the polls show many voters are still undecided. And in Pennsylvania, a right-wing billionaire is pouring money into their state’s Supreme Court races.
The _only_ way Democrats will win in all of these states — and prevent more chaos and destruction from Trump and his allies — is if we can reach as many voters as we can in the coming weeks.
We’re personally asking for your help to do just that. Can you pitch in $3 to help fund our voter outreach efforts in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20251002_4722_fr&refcode2=4722_22930333_veJQnr&akid=4722%2E22930333%2EveJQnr)
Thank you,
The Democrats

If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., **[make a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?t=3&refcode2=4722_22930333_veJQnr&akid=4722%2E22930333%2EveJQnr)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvv99khyjdo44ns7oj4zxwsm7pz49ajq2bqik2ep74si1l4hxs9m9cuz56fxgacr364qqy9tnnw6gqx6&__stmp=t3idug&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac21jyqua9s4jpd0es5aeh2lxphd580eucibdaz9uje0mnk831jmnghyx9jl2re773cpufx6fwcua5y9r7bdd4mtxvo0t5q7mcpt9fivucjdc4ruy950i00clqwj8mvjbe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvv99khyjdo44ns7oj4zxwsm7pz49ajq2bqik2ep74si1l4hxs9m9cuz56fxgacr364qqy9tnnw6gqx6&__stmp=t3idug&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20az2zjqyt3ohm9u2qi0mqdbpbvi999ops5cvfthhor0nx8lkvkmueba7caery1u79kfxn8jxjhziqwe5saoiqeprjfgbn9u0n7dgdne0mx4ytr1hfrzw4g00m5m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldvq3dilnzln38leao2mjf06efcyahfoqgm8kzcx31p485oqs8vdkws35weyh50pxc9p1vu4gtx6srxok6dn6652pb8c2chl5dgt9j567e36wnj4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3idug&__onlt=h)

subject: Know how succeed at something? YOU DO IT. ...not "try". Do it...NOW. That's how.

body:

| | Fellow Conservative, I've been sounding the alarm all year on our Party's enthusiasm gap with the Left. The Left has been trouncing us in voter turnout. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qvone5w3s3p7cqbz0uev0h3wnzj6n2k4vg1oyat2h49fgnslwqwkszshpwnemq67j22wqng5n&__stmp=t3if5v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711sio3glcy4jmekw3ho4sws7nbkt74ui9kuiopoa39nuzgej4ls1ez6oo9fo6489w49xbrj5b78luit5rpzio0t7jhmjun6xoncymy4brxefpuwcmng17lqwc5u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qvone5w3s3p7cqbz0uev0h3wnzj6n2k4vg1oyat2h49fgnslwqwkszshpwnemq67j22wqng5n&__stmp=t3if5v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vlw2item0hcee4b6qwxqtq1zxu816jl5m7h0qtf7m69yl1y3zozjwrtaw0u48q8drvyuzaufdvl2iv4exkomsn1u6pkgz2wszsbaxt47stfubyz3t7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4j9nps88hiykuy0f23s8ch2cps1zou77uct7e6ud9we1107f1n32xqu20c6y8hq02jqmurb98g0geyt5cjaxt3ocjxf0u66ieobij51c1wp5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3if5v&__onlt=h)

name: shocking
subject: Trump tells generals to prepare for war against Democrats
body:
The upper echelons of our military refused to be used as political props, staying deafeningly silent and showing little emotion as Hegseth and Trump addressed them.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qWJUo9liTM9qaUcJJQAm6NNsQwowZo12mCvP4dxmes8jx1HRpjMxmlTB8Yu-nr3Rtc9lq2yg52Z58DkZrtGmQCYYV4DJ7cKLm9wJCPbVqOBgrGjllDkMeDgpQeCWiuNygkYOphavfCzT7Is0CB5mBdQjmtCFiBwBQzIoqyvb5JhyU2nit1zUNJTiHgL3n1mXEi6_AGfALdAkw9nK1laV96Ee7FaKnw02dPxDfR7Nqew=&c=DCgn1b2Pn4peLT-VpCRv1np3l7pBWCn3Ub85PDcpqSf6wY-oeuvmgQ==&ch=wF9uyYh959YBzBIHueN-JFSSRgJvh-HOOf8RMmZgoDUC-uOj7Yun4g==)
---
| Friend, On Tuesday, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and Donald Trump summoned every general from across the world for a stunning and completely bizarre political rally. Not only was it a complete waste of time for some of the most important people keeping America safe, it was incredibly awkward.
The upper echelons of our military refused to be used as political props, staying deafeningly silent and showing little emotion as Hegseth and Trump addressed them.
But even they couldn't hide their shock and horror when Donald Trump told them this:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qWJUo9liTM9qaUcJJQAm6NNsQwowZo12mCvP4dxmes8jx1HRpjMxmlTB8Yu-nr3Rtc9lq2yg52Z58DkZrtGmQCYYV4DJ7cKLm9wJCPbVqOBgrGjllDkMeDgpQeCWiuNygkYOphavfCzT7Is0CB5mBdQjmtCFiBwBQzIoqyvb5JhyU2nit1zUNJTiHgL3n1mXEi6_AGfALdAkw9nK1laV9ztD9W8yHg1W42chNNDDgeE=&c=DCgn1b2Pn4peLT-VpCRv1np3l7pBWCn3Ub85PDcpqSf6wY-oeuvmgQ==&ch=wF9uyYh959YBzBIHueN-JFSSRgJvh-HOOf8RMmZgoDUC-uOj7Yun4g==)
---
| Using Democrat controlled cities as training grounds for our military? Trump has gone completely mad. He is drunk with power, foaming at the mouth to use violence and repression on his political opponents. We cannot afford to give him any more power or else we may never have an election in America again.
That's what makes the upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election an existential crisis for Democrats. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether.
And the most frightening part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. While Democrats were asleep, MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack behind Democrats' backs--suddenly spending millions to oust the Democrats on the court.
Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the Democratic organizations in a position on the ground in PA to counter MAGA's surprise attack and prevent Trump from seizing more power.
But with only 33 days to go, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election. We need to do more to prevent PA from falling. [Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Defend Our Court's stop Trump's fascist war against America?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qWJUo9liTM9qaUcJJQAm6NNsQwowZo12mCvP4dxmes8jx1HRpjMxmlTB8Yu-nr3RyC4uR37V-KsAq8vZ2wson4jQufXn7_gXYN4K-wbIE2Ekgt_HwiufdDpyalr5tq21D7oImZhNWq-av6Io9ddJSlStg_nG3vWtOUPzP7qHS7HCetaaMEBSK1c9pSXftKlkgpX_9PXDgSXSh6RyWjytQgidxlnCtDZ0Psie5rjWro90e3DZ14-MKw==&c=DCgn1b2Pn4peLT-VpCRv1np3l7pBWCn3Ub85PDcpqSf6wY-oeuvmgQ==&ch=wF9uyYh959YBzBIHueN-JFSSRgJvh-HOOf8RMmZgoDUC-uOj7Yun4g==)
---

| | | | Using Democrat controlled cities as training grounds for our military? Trump has gone completely mad. He is drunk with power, foaming at the mouth to use violence and repression on his political opponents. We cannot afford to give him any more power or else we may never have an election in America again.
That's what makes the upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election an existential crisis for Democrats. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether.

Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the Democratic organizations in a position on the ground in PA to counter MAGA's surprise attack and prevent Trump from seizing more power.

The upper echelons of our military refused to be used as political props, staying deafeningly silent and showing little emotion as Hegseth and Trump addressed them. But even they couldn't hide their shock and horror when Donald Trump told them this: | == | | | | Using Democrat controlled cities as training grounds for our military? Trump has gone completely mad. He is drunk with power, foaming at the mouth to use violence and repression on his political opponents. We cannot afford to give him any more power or else we may never have an election in America again. That's what makes the upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election an existential crisis for Democrats. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether. And the most frightening part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. While Democrats were asleep, MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack behind Democrats' backs--suddenly spending millions to oust the Democrats on the court. Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the Democratic organizations in a position on the ground in PA to counter MAGA's surprise attack and prevent Trump from seizing more power. But with only 33 days to go, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election. We need to do more to prevent PA from falling. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The PA Supreme Court battle is ground zero for Trump's war against Democrats. body:
Senator Husted would rather shut down the government than lift a finger to help Ohioans
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116447585/573451729/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251002_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjhiZjIyNi1hMTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEjxXNq4mk6qsr2Pgej49r8fPVDsLnOA8lVq9UT3cDs=) **Team, Jon Husted and his Republican cronies in Washington shut down the federal government, making healthcare more expensive for 500,000 Ohioans.**

[**_Ohioans will remember this when we cast our ballots in 2026. Will you rush a donation right now to defeat Jon Husted, elect Sherrod Brown, and flip the Senate blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116447586/573451732/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251002_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjhiZjIyNi1hMTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEjxXNq4mk6qsr2Pgej49r8fPVDsLnOA8lVq9UT3cDs=)

Not only does this Republican-induced shutdown put Ohioans' healthcare at risk, but it throws us even deeper into economic turmoil. But Husted doesn’t care:

**First,** he voted for devastating Medicaid cuts to fund the largest billionaire tax break in HISTORY.

**Then,** he lied about it, saying no one will lose Medicaid coverage in Ohio – despite the expert analysis that revealed 490,000 Ohioans will lose healthcare coverage _and_ eleven rural hospitals in Ohio are at risk of closure.

**Now, he shuts down the government rather than work to help MILLIONS of Americans afford their health insurance.**

This is exactly the kind of corruption and chaos we can expect for the next three years under total Republican control in Washington: working families struggling to put food on the table, afford their bills, and access life-saving healthcare while the GOP plays games.

_But we can turn the tide. We can send Sherrod Brown to the Senate, secure a staunch defender of healthcare in Washington, AND flip the Senate blue._

name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Do we need to try to remove these barriers to voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Newsweek: How Trans Voters Could Be Excluded From the Election [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Newsweek_TransgenderVotingBarriers.png]
Nearly 210,000 transgender Americans who were eligible to vote in the 2024 general election faced barriers to voting because of stringent voter ID laws, according to new research.
The study shows that roughly 414,000 voting-eligible transgender Americans lived in the 31 states that primarily conduct their elections in person at the polls and have a voter ID law. Nearly half of transgender voters in those states do not have an ID that correctly reflects their name or gender.
We want to hear from voters with your thoughts. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away?
Should states take steps to improve access to voting for transgender individuals?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100225_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100225_1yes&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Newsweek: How Trans Voters Could Be Excluded From the Election [] Nearly 210,000 transgender Americans who were eligible to vote in the 2024 general election faced barriers to voting because of stringent voter ID laws, according to new research. The study shows that roughly 414,000 voting-eligible transgender Americans lived in the 31 states that primarily conduct their elections in person at the polls and have a voter ID law. Nearly half of transgender voters in those states do not have an ID that correctly reflects their name or gender. We want to hear from voters with your thoughts. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away? Should states take steps to improve access to voting for transgender individuals? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [] NO [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Let me cut to the chase.

Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.

_We can’t let that happen._

I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate_.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is our only path to victory
disclaimer_text:
paid
for by the same corporations making this mess worse
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251002-1039&t=1001&akid=1042%2E251025%2EG6ml_V ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251002-1039&t=1002&akid=1042%2E251025%2EG6ml_V ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

Thank you for helping us finish this past quarter on a high note. Truly,
we couldn’t have done it without this grassroots team.

Together, we’re rebuilding the Democratic Party into a party that actually
stands for working people again.

I believe that’s our only path to victory — not just with our race in
Michigan, but across the country. To take on the MAGA machine and win, we
must recognize people’s pain and provide policy actions in return.

You can’t afford your healthcare? We’ll fight to pass Medicare for All.

You’re worried about your job? We’ll raise the minimum wage and stand up
for your right to unionize.

You want to make sure your kids grow up safe and healthy? We’ll stand up
to polluters and ensure everyone has access to clean air and water.

Too often, the establishment listens more to corporate PACs, billionaires,
and special interests like AIPAC than they do to us. That’s how we lost
our way. That’s how working people stopped believing Democrats would fight
for them.

Peter, our
campaign has real, concrete solutions because we’re not bought and paid
for by the same corporations making this mess worse.

If we’re serious about winning back trust and rebuilding the Democratic
Party as a true party for the people, it has to start here, with campaigns
like ours.

Thank you for everything you’ve done to get us where we are today. I’m
grateful to be in this fight with you.

In solidarity,

Abdul

name: Tony Thurmond
subject: A Real Plan to Build 2 Million Homes by 2030
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026, FPPC# 1461509
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Dear Peter,
In California, our middle class is being squeezed like never before. Everywhere I go, parents are telling me they worry that their kid is going to have to move out of California because they can’t afford to live here.
Nobody - and I mean nobody - should work full time and not have a roof over their head. And when the cost of living is breaking up families - we know we’ve reached a crisis point.
I have a plan to address our state’s affordability challenges.
Across California, school districts own surplus property and shuttered campuses. Rather than padlocking those gates, I will fight to turn them into new homes for working families.
That’s how we’ll reach our goal of building 2 million housing units by 2030 - by using land the state already owns to tackle the housing crisis head-on. [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DO_ql9KknF4/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==]
And I’m not stopping there. I’m proposing a tax credit for working Californians , so families have more breathing room in their monthly budgets.
As Governor I’ll fight every day to bring back the days when the working class and middle class could afford to live in California.
But I can’t do it without you. If you believe in this vision for a stronger middle class and a fairer California, will you chip in today to help power our campaign?
Click here to donate today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Together, we can make California a place where everyone - teachers, nurses, construction workers, janitors, parents - can get by and get ahead.
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Tony Thurmond
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]

Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026
312 Clay Street, Suite 300

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, In California, our middle class is being squeezed like never before. Everywhere I go, parents are telling me they worry that their kid is going to have to move out of California because they can’t afford to live here. Nobody - and I mean nobody - should work full time and not have a roof over their head. And when the cost of living is breaking up families - we know we’ve reached a crisis point. I have a plan to address our state’s affordability challenges. Across California, school districts own surplus property and shuttered campuses. Rather than padlocking those gates, I will fight to turn them into new homes for working families. That’s how we’ll reach our goal of building 2 million housing units by 2030 - by using land the state already owns to tackle the housing crisis head-on. [==] And I’m not stopping there. I’m proposing a tax credit for working Californians , so families have more breathing room in their monthly budgets. As Governor I’ll fight every day to bring back the days when the working class and middle class could afford to live in California. But I can’t do it without you. If you believe in this vision for a stronger middle class and a fairer California, will you chip in today to help power our campaign? Click here to donate today. [] Together, we can make California a place where everyone - teachers, nurses, construction workers, janitors, parents - can get by and get ahead. Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Tony Thurmond Donate [] Paid for by Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026, FPPC# 1461509 Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026 312 Clay Street, Suite 300 Oakland, CA 94607 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

It’s Charlie Bailey, Chair of the Democratic Party of Georgia. Yesterday, Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans shut down the federal government. I know you're probably frustrated, Peter. So am I. Republicans control everything — the White House, the Senate, and the House. And still, they couldn't perform their jobs for the American people. But this shutdown wasn’t just avoidable — it was strategic. It’s a deliberate move by Trump and his MAGA allies to sow chaos, force devastating health care cost hikes, and consolidate power. But this will backfire. Donald Trump is more unpopular than ever — and his grip is slipping every passing day. It’s on us to turn this moment into momentum and put an end to the MAGA chaos next year. Georgia has the chance to make major gains in 2026 — in Congress, in our state legislature, in counties across Georgia. But only if we start organizing right now. This is the moment to get serious, get focused, and get moving. But if we don’t take a stand now, we risk letting this chaos continue. [So I’m asking, Peter, will you chip in $10 or more today? Not just to respond to this crisis, but to start building the movement that will finally put an end to it? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116449964/573459017/-14960666?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_100225_SHUTDOWN_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGZhYTZkYi1hNDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_nJc4FgbL1TiogC95WF5RzqZVTa6z2vg02x05bOk68=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jay Jones
subject: Hard email to write

body:
|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116450086/573459163/92033341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_JayJones_251002_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzYyMGNkNC1hNDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13nY6PakeSFJ3VCL0UXDL_W-Yj6oOdwOJhaVdlVH_t8=) Derek, it’s Jay Jones – Democrat running for Attorney General in Virginia.

SO sorry to bother you, but this couldn't wait.

Our September fundraising was rough. Fundraising projections had us far outpacing where we ended up and our team is a little on edge.

Look, the final stretch is when campaigns can lose a little steam. **But that’s not true for my opponent.** Jason Miyares is continuing to add on to his millions raised because _MAGA billionaires are investing in this race, and we have no choice but to keep up our pace_.

I hate asking for your help. I know you've got family time, errands, all that.

But we can't afford to take a single day off. Not when we're just weeks out from the election.

Miyares won by 0.81% last time. This race will come down to who fights harder right now, in these last few weeks, when it matters most – **and I’m ready to fight for every vote.**

**Can you help us catch up? Even $5 makes a difference. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court Countdown: 6 Days
body:
In just 6 days, your Judicial Watch heads to the Supreme Court of the United States to present oral arguments in (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

| [ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**In just 6 days, your Judicial Watch heads to the Supreme Court of the United States to present oral arguments in _(Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568))._**
**It’s an historic honor for Judicial Watch and a historic opportunity to fight for honest elections at the highest court in the land.**
First, thank you for being a part of Judicial Watch. It’s through the passion Americans like you show for our work as the nation’s public interest conservative law firm that my team does that work so diligently and tirelessly. Getting a case to the Supreme Court is a testament to our team’s hard work, but it’s also a moment YOU (and all our financial supporters) should take great pride in.
The stakes in this case are huge. **__The integrity of Election Day in America, whether ballots received AFTER Election Day should be counted, and whether or not candidates have the ability to challenge unjust election laws__** will all be influenced by the Supreme Court’s ruling.
| [Fuel Our Supreme Court Fight & Historic Election Integrity Caseload ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)
---

Here’s the background of the case: Under current law, the state of Illinois counts ballots received up to **_14 days_** after Election Day.

Imagine the chaos, confusion, and mistrust invited by an election changing hands due to ballots received AFTER Election Day (unfortunately, we don’t need to imagine it because it occurred in two California House races last year).

Unfortunately, the 7th Circuit Court of Appeals issued a misguided ruling that Rep. Bost and our other Illinois plaintiffs lacked standing to bring this case. We appealed the decision.

We’re very grateful to the United States Supreme Court for taking up our appeal and agreeing to hear the case.

**To be clear: The stakes are potentially much greater than the future of election laws in Illinois.**

A win before the Supreme Court has the potential to curb the counting of ballots received after Election Day nationwide and ensure that future candidates have the ability to challenge laws that impact their races.

These would be critical steps towards restoring the integrity of our elections by making them harder to steal.

We have momentum on our side. In May, the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that Mississippi’s state law allowing ballots received up to 5 days after Election Day violated federal law. But there is a great deal more work to do in the fight for honest elections... including _[our oral arguments before the Supreme Court just 6 days from now!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_

I’m sure I don’t need to tell you that battling state governments over election integrity litigation is a long and costly process, but it’s a fight Judicial Watch is honored to lead thanks to our loyal supporters.

As the clock counts down, will you consider _[making a special first-time financial contribution to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_ in recognition of the massive opportunity before us at the Supreme Court?

[Your Generous Support Makes Our Election Integrity Victories Possible ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)
---

Thank you for considering, and for all you do in our shared fight for honest elections.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

P.S. **Our case before the Supreme Court could be a critical step towards halting the reckless counting of ballots received after Election Day and ensuring the integrity of our elections.**_[With just 6 days to go before our Supreme Court appearance, please click here to help us fund this fight along with the rest of our historic election integrity caseload and all our work dedicated to upholding the rule of law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76942&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_. Thank you.

|
---
|
---
Judicial Watch, Inc.
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
©2025, All Rights Reserved
Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |
---
