Donald Trump isn't hiding it anymore: he told America's top generals their new job is **to fight the "enemy within" our own communities.** This is not politics as usual. This is the blueprint of a dictator. Trump wants to turn San Francisco, Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, and soon _every city in America,_ into military "training grounds." _**He wants soldiers on our streets, Humvees outside our homes, and federalized officers unleashed on protesters.**_
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsAOCztpbabf4EqqBPZvcNWYoeF_sYKIWlQdxp-LTuM_8K2vffMEtGopmFlrX-TCvaVUef0DqcfHSMol-zscQexSwnnjfdBy-B2BDT2Fmrdlwye_xPvZAzPzOZnRu1IXDZpv4NGOpmZpFiscAYa9jycimdtfxz9n_Ur9hLUFbwPrbDybpenL6IL6a1kzJRG-Qj2c5t0qmf4vTgxXYqDYRSsj7hD3rJl1ld1rSrf5HwZdkq5GdGxkbIBLiz5mhh8ql1xxUaLqfrVpaDm_ISJ5N_v_6EpQToiv1aLcd-Hd_fe1uTXgcPX4Ir55I-9TwW23BJkScd5I5L-K7m-9lNgY36DtvoQICfPaBCwTKuHe8A9_X/4ke/fdKPe_Y3R1aO8B0XtW0QkA/h1/h001.chL7rRNyYRScXfQWW4FFJhPWH_Prfy0gfaDVkQ2hs2U)

clean_body: | | Donald Trump isn't hiding it anymore: he told America's top generals their new job is to fight the "enemy within" our own communities. This is not politics as usual. This is the blueprint of a dictator. Trump wants to turn San Francisco, Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, and soon every city in America, into military "training grounds." He wants soldiers on our streets, Humvees outside our homes, and federalized officers unleashed on protesters. | Make no mistake: this is the start of the endgame for authoritarianism. Trump and his cronies are openly preparing to crush dissent, criminalize opposition, and rule by fear. If we don't stop him, no city will be safe. That's why we're asking you, right now, to take a stand. Trump is testing how far he can go. If we don't fight back with everything we've got, he will not stop until the entire country is under military occupation. We can win this fight, but only if we step up TOGETHER. \- Team NDLB | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . subject: These strong, courageous women are leading the way

body:
We’re fighting for what’s right. Will you join us?
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=775%2E181023%2ES1FiDH)
Team,
Today, I want to share my admiration for two incredible women who are making waves and represent the kind of leadership we need more of — **Mikie Sherrill** in New Jersey and **Abigail Spanberger** in Virginia. [**They’re both in tough campaigns for Governor in their respective states, and their elections are just weeks away. Will you split a contribution between our campaigns to power us to victory?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-spanberger-sherrill.NxquJj&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251002_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=775%2E181023%2ES1FiDH)
[SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-spanberger-sherrill.NxquJj&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251002_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=775%2E181023%2ES1FiDH)
---
Both Mikie and Abigail stand firmly against the forces prioritizing billionaires over our families.
They are fierce advocates for working families and are committed to policies that ensure economic opportunity and equality for all. Their efforts to hold our government accountable and serve the people remind me of why I’m proud to stand alongside them in my own race for Governor.
**Their determination is inspiring, and their work mirrors my own commitment here in Michigan.**
I know firsthand how crucial it is to have leaders who aren’t afraid to fight for what’s right — who will push back against those who put special interests above the welfare of our communities.
**That’s why today, I’m humbly asking you to join me in supporting not just my campaign for Governor, but the campaigns of Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger.**
With just a few weeks until their elections, now is the time to offer our support.
**[Let’s build a future where the government truly serves the people. Will you split a donation to help fuel our collective efforts and support leaders who stand up for all of us?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-spanberger-sherrill.NxquJj&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251002_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=775%2E181023%2ES1FiDH)**

**GOVERNMENT SHUT DOWN** The federal government has shut down. Now more than ever, it's critical to speak up. Contact your federal representatives today and urge them to protect ACA subsidies that millions of Americans rely on for affordable health care. Without them, 350,000 Virginians are expected to lose their health coverage. Call your representatives: (202) 224-3121 .

# Candidate Spotlight
---
|
---
|
---
**JOSHUA COLE FOR FOR HD-65** Delegate Josh Cole knows not only what challenges people face in Fredericksburg, Stafford County, and Spotsylvania County, but also understands what it means to truly serve his constituents. Josh's faith and commitment to service guided him as a delegate in bringing back historic investments in our schools, public safety, transportation infrastructure and better access to quality affordable healthcare. Now, he is running for re-election to fight for abortion rights and build an economy that works for all Virginians.
---
[ **Donate Here** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/ShgXLPQOtSqPXDNJYttUow~~/AAPPABA~/xjjB__u0sLgP0wg1eXcZvA9nyPJUXCpqMtAVzxYz73kNA4HeQvSoKVGKRX2yGd6CyYtZoZBDYrv7Gh7HwXjT5Ry7EgaZ8PO6zsUTkopwxKWD6hXE2shYLw-p08h6Qb-w7z9ixoElF_J1IWDdsJdAvdyRLhu8kgfpSLbIa3dAQeS9YM3rruJEXHv5p0HX8g9NSWbG4up0Bb07U6_lMphZz1TP1V9ztzXS-_vmzuIdIKKSNT0VE9mFMtcbmbnkLe3XKSktFgRAXdMOgqqb-6IUO3jVEzoc5-xaUgGTHVOLQP4~)
---
|
---
**JOSH THOMAS FOR HD-21** Delegate Josh Thomas is a Marine combat veteran, attorney, husband, and father. Inspired by his Marine brother and the impact of 9/11, he joined the Marine Corps and led Marines in Afghanistan and the Middle East. He's fighting to enshrine reproductive freedom in Virginia's constitution, expand access to affordable housing and health care, defend the LGBTQ+ community from dangerous attacks, and defend Virginia's vulnerable populations from disastrous federal funding cuts.
---
[ **Donate Here** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/OuSDzNKEB7HC-dkiP_De0g~~/AAPPABA~/Tra4-N_67t8WWr-PyRafsujHEVWEWafaBvf_2uahwl32_H4i8QX64693K4pGoHWtVagh66BeSTrtrf8s-yLJTpa3iclyvqJNgWOw98D2VdbDLlFGfyXe58ex3L3xYQYDPA8L9xGw8gPHCbP7dX_wS8Pcjn98YycC8aOfxy-dptclR5cQnZHLrcvf9WfXbU9x2YoQ7uii-4XBXtCPVXCBoyp6IY7WSOcnSdEoLedP6rp4hiHW_X0hHimtbLSOXE1aoRqUwOC36TOeiBOmhjGwnonHhyuNXlrWrbHYTjgRt9SJhoGzvR4aaDKAmM9oAQ8J)
---
|
---
**BONITA ANTHONY FOR HD-92** Bonita Anthony has represented parts of Chesapeake and Norfolk in the House since 2024. Born in Norfolk, she is a university administrator and minister with deep roots in her community. A graduate of Old Dominion University and Virginia Union University, she brings both technical and theological training to her public service. In the General Assembly, she serves on the Finance, Privileges and Elections, and Transportation Committees, where she works to expand opportunity, strengthen communities, and ensure every Virginian has a voice.
---

**"YOU WRITE THE BILL," PART 1** In hard times, we cannot forget that the people have the power. On Tuesday at our annual 'You Write the Bill' workshop, we heard ideas that can make real change. Be on the look out for Part 2, all are welcome!

Enjoy 6 Pumpkin Festival weekends (Thu-Sun) Sept 25 - Nov 2, jam-packed with activities, live music, food trucks, arts & crafts vendors, and fun for the whole family. **HISPANIC HERITAGE MONTH CELEBRATION 2025 - Oct. 4** Local Colors is hosting its 6th annual Hispanic Heritage Month Celebration at John Nolen Plaza. This festive event honors the contributions of the Hispanic community to the Roanoke Valley and welcomes all to experience the rich diversity of Latin American cultures. Watch performances, hear stories, eat Latin American cuisine, visit artisan craft vendor booths, talk to community partners and learn interesting facts about Latin America and even a dance step or two!

**LEGAL AID SOCIETY OF ROANOKE VALLEY** The Legal Aid Society of Roanoke Valley provides a full range of civil legal services to low-income area residents, including issues involving housing, family, employment, consumer debt, and domestic violence. Free legal services are provided to qualified residents of the cities of Roanoke and Salem, along with the counties of Roanoke, Botetourt, Craig, Bedford, and Franklin.

clean_body: | | | Across the Commonwealth | GOVERNMENT SHUT DOWN The federal government has shut down. Now more than ever, it's critical to speak up. Contact your federal representatives today and urge them to protect ACA subsidies that millions of Americans rely on for affordable health care. Without them, 350,000 Virginians are expected to lose their health coverage. Call your representatives: (202) 224-3121 . | | ~~ "GOATSCAPING" COMES TO ROANOKE The City of Roanoke is using goats and sheep to clear an overgrown area of Valley Park. After just two weeks, the animals have already removed much of the brush. This creative approach is the first of its kind in Roanoke. | Election 2025 - Get Involved! | | Don't get complacent, come out and canvass! There will be an informative discussion on how you can get involved in the campaign, and an opportunity to knock doors. Whether you're new to volunteering or an experienced activist, there are plenty of ways to help Sam win this election! Highland Park is located at 502 Washington Ave SW. | Please join local Democrats in Roanoke County to knock on doors for Lily Franklin and all Democrats on the ballot this November! First time canvassing? Don't worry, they'll provide all the training and cheerleading you need. Thank you so much for all of your help and support. Let's win this thing! ~ | EMGAGE ACTION ENDORSES DELEGATE RASOUL! Democracy works best when every voice is heard and represented. Together, with Emgage Action, we will continue to work towards advancing policies that value justice, equity, and inclusion. | Candidate Spotlight | | JOSHUA COLE FOR FOR HD-65 Delegate Josh Cole knows not only what challenges people face in Fredericksburg, Stafford County, and Spotsylvania County, but also understands what it means to truly serve his constituents. Josh's faith and commitment to service guided him as a delegate in bringing back historic investments in our schools, public safety, transportation infrastructure and better access to quality affordable healthcare. Now, he is running for re-election to fight for abortion rights and build an economy that works for all Virginians. ~ | JOSH THOMAS FOR HD-21 Delegate Josh Thomas is a Marine combat veteran, attorney, husband, and father. Inspired by his Marine brother and the impact of 9/11, he joined the Marine Corps and led Marines in Afghanistan and the Middle East. He's fighting to enshrine reproductive freedom in Virginia's constitution, expand access to affordable housing and health care, defend the LGBTQ+ community from dangerous attacks, and defend Virginia's vulnerable populations from disastrous federal funding cuts. | BONITA ANTHONY FOR HD-92 Bonita Anthony has represented parts of Chesapeake and Norfolk in the House since 2024. Born in Norfolk, she is a university administrator and minister with deep roots in her community. A graduate of Old Dominion University and Virginia Union University, she brings both technical and theological training to her public service. In the General Assembly, she serves on the Finance, Privileges and Elections, and Transportation Committees, where she works to expand opportunity, strengthen communities, and ensure every Virginian has a voice. ~ | In the Community | | 10 YEARS OF DR PEPPER PARK CELEBRATION Last week, we celebrated 10 years of Dr Pepper Park at the Bridges! Del. Rasoul presented a to celebrate. Over the last decade, this rockin' venue has thrived, bringing exciting performances to our city Here's to many more decades of fun! | "YOU WRITE THE BILL," PART 1 In hard times, we cannot forget that the people have the power. On Tuesday at our annual 'You Write the Bill' workshop, we heard ideas that can make real change. Be on the look out for Part 2, all are welcome! ~~ | SINKLAND FARMS PUMPKIN FESTIVAL - Sept. 25-Nov. 2 The Sinkland Farms Pumpkin Festival is back! Enjoy 6 Pumpkin Festival weekends (Thu-Sun) Sept 25 - Nov 2, jam-packed with activities, live music, food trucks, arts & crafts vendors, and fun for the whole family. Admission includes: parking, hayride to the pumpkin patch, corn maze, live music and other entertainment, Kidz Zone games, access to food trucks and local vendors, and more! ~ | BRANDON OAKS FALL SALE - Oct. 4 Brandon Oaks is hosting a Fall Sale featuring Women's clothing, Jewelry and Collectibles. Items will be available for purchase in the Community Room on the Main campus of Brandon Oaks. All proceeds benefit the Brandon Oaks Auxiliary which provides for the additional needs which improve the lives of the residents in the Nursing and Rehabilitation Center & Memory Care Unit. | HISPANIC HERITAGE MONTH CELEBRATION 2025 - Oct. 4 Local Colors is hosting its 6th annual Hispanic Heritage Month Celebration at John Nolen Plaza. This festive event honors the contributions of the Hispanic community to the Roanoke Valley and welcomes all to experience the rich diversity of Latin American cultures. Watch performances, hear stories, eat Latin American cuisine, visit artisan craft vendor booths, talk to community partners and learn interesting facts about Latin America and even a dance step or two! | HOW WE WIN THE INFORMATION WAR - Oct. 9 Democratic Committees across the Commonwealth are hosting a virtual event on how the left can win the information war on Thursday, October 9th at 7 pm on Zoom. This in-depth policy forum of experts from across media fields will explore strategies to tackle and overcome the left's media deficit and urgently build media ecosystems, infrastructure, and capacity that fight mis- and disinformation and support democracy. ~ | | | INFORMATIONAL MEETING ON DOING BUSINESS WITH RCPS Interested in Doing Business with Roanoke City Public Schools? Join RCPS for an informational session for Local, Small, Women-Owned, and/or Minority-Owned (SWaM) businesses to learn about opportunities to conduct business with Roanoke City Public Schools on October 14, at 10 am at the Community Empowerment Center at Booker T. Washington. Register by Oct 7. | ROANOKE FAFSA FIRE FALL 2025 Need help with FAFSA or VASA? The Roanoke Higher Education Center is hosting FAFSA Fire on October 18 from 10 am - 12 pm. This is a free event with financial aid experts ready to help! Registration is required! | Community Resources | LEGAL AID SOCIETY OF ROANOKE VALLEY The Legal Aid Society of Roanoke Valley provides a full range of civil legal services to low-income area residents, including issues involving housing, family, employment, consumer debt, and domestic violence. Free legal services are provided to qualified residents of the cities of Roanoke and Salem, along with the counties of Roanoke, Botetourt, Craig, Bedford, and Franklin. | | KNOW YOUR RIGHTS WITH ICE There have been recent reports of ICE throughout the state. The ACLU has created a collection of resources in the case you or someone you know interacts with ICE agents. Read and share the resources found ~~. ~~ | CONTACT YOUR FEDERAL REPRESENTATIVE In many ways, it feels like our federal government is under attack by the current administration. While our office is happy to assist however we can, it is still crucial that you engage our federal representatives. Find the contact information for the Virginia Congressional Delegation ~~. ~~ | JOIN THE ROANOKE CITY DEMOCRATS! RCDC's monthly business meeting is the third Thursday each month. Watch their Facebook for an upcoming announcement of the agenda. The meetings are available virtually for those who write to mailto:info@roanokedemocrats.com, requesting the link. ~~ | JOIN ROANOKE YOUNG DEMS! Meetings occur on the second Monday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. Contact: mailto:youngdemocratsroanoke@gmail.com to get involved! | VIRTUAL OFFICE HOURS WITH DEL. RASOUL'S TEAM Our office is now holding virtual office hours to meet with constituents. Meet with a member of Delegate Sam Rasoul's team to ask questions, share concerns, or get help with state-related issues. We're here to listen and assist however we can. If you are unable to join virtually, or you have a pressing matter, we can always be reached at (540) 904-6905 or mailto:DelSRasoul@house.virginia.gov. ~~ | Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, | Del. Sam Rasoul | "Facebook" "X" "Instagram" "YouTube" "Bluesky" Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842 Roanoke, VA 24037 United States |

name: Rep. Zoe Lofgren
subject: Republicans chose chaos, and working Americans will pay the price.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116451776/573464144/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-02_RR_SHN_ES-32567&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjEyMDllNS1hODlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spbPdojWRm9a4r8HjV89hecy5HrU4Q_XhoDTzbDWA98=)

---
Dear Peter,The government just shut down because Republicans chose political games over responsible leadership. Democrats were at the table up until the deadline, pushing to pass a budget and avoid a shutdown — but Republicans refused to protect affordable health care for millions of Americans, letting the government shut down instead.**_The impacts of this will be disastrous, Peter._** Hundreds of thousands of federal workers will be furloughed or have to work without pay.Critical programs and services that our country relies on could face delays and disruptions.And because Republicans were unwilling to extend the Affordable Care Act health care subsidies that kept costs down for working families, _tens of millions of Americans could see their health care costs rise._ **In my district, some of my constituents could see health care costs increase by over 1000%.**It doesn’t have to be this way, Peter. Our government should be looking out for working families, not abandoning them. I’ll keep fighting to end this shutdown, protect access to affordable health care, and defend our democracy from authoritarian outreach.Thank you for your support.Rep. Zoe Lofgren **[P.S. I know this is a difficult time for many Americans, but if you’re able, please consider chipping in whatever you can afford to help me continue standing up to Trump and MAGA Republicans. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116451779/573464149/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-02_RR_SHN_ES-32567&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjEyMDllNS1hODlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spbPdojWRm9a4r8HjV89hecy5HrU4Q_XhoDTzbDWA98=)**

body:
The President must end this shutdown now and stop punishing Virginia workers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116452733/573467282/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJlOTI4MDMtYTk5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0Ej93UzGqa-11ci3_owec6bZs8i6TaZCJY89UDBLxhE=)
It's blatant what they're doing, Peter.
**Donald Trump shut down the government in order to jumpstart DOGE 2.0.**
Virginians were already facing the impacts of mass firings, reckless tariffs, and an attack on our healthcare. Now, instead of working with Congress to avert a shutdown, the President allowed funding to expire as a pretext to lay off more Virginians and disrupt more services we rely on.
Once again, my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears is _refusing_ to stand up for our workforce and our economy — even though she's had multiple opportunities to do so.
I'll say this as clearly as I can: _The President must end this shutdown now and stop punishing Virginia workers._
[_**Now, I hope you'll consider donating $25 or more to my campaign for Governor so we can hold this President accountable at the ballot box. We're weeks into early voting and need this team's support today to stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116452737/573467285/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJlOTI4MDMtYTk5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0Ej93UzGqa-11ci3_owec6bZs8i6TaZCJY89UDBLxhE=)

clean_body: The President must end this shutdown now and stop punishing Virginia workers. = It's blatant what they're doing, Peter. Donald Trump shut down the government in order to jumpstart DOGE 2.0. Virginians were already facing the impacts of mass firings, reckless tariffs, and an attack on our healthcare. Now, instead of working with Congress to avert a shutdown, the President allowed funding to expire as a pretext to lay off more Virginians and disrupt more services we rely on. Once again, my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears is refusing to stand up for our workforce and our economy — even though she's had multiple opportunities to do so. I'll say this as clearly as I can: The President must end this shutdown now and stop punishing Virginia workers. = = = = = = = Thank you for reading, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

Folks, this headline came across my desk last week, and you need to see it. 👇
“GOP districts take early lead in Virginia’s first week of early voting”
SUPPORT OUR EARLY VOTE EFFORTS → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
The sky isn’t falling. We’re not doomed. Time isn’t up. Not even close to it.
But, it’s a wake-up call for our campaign that we need to work twice as hard to get every last Democratic early voter to the polls ASAP. That’s why our campaign has been reaching out to Virginians – through phone, by door, and on social media – to remind them that early voting is underway!
These outreach efforts are critical to our victory odds on Election Day, but they don’t come cheap – between the organizers we need to do early voter outreach and the materials we’re purchasing to remind Virginians to vote.
So let’s change the damn headline and bring home a win on November 4th.

# Mecou (Hello)
---
Good afternoon relatives, **From shutdowns to Climate Week victories, we 're forging ahead.** In this issue: join our Membership Portal, stand with us at _Bundle of Arrows_ and _Truthsgiving_ , submit NCDEQ comments, celebrate new awards, enroll in our Rights of Nature e-course, and get ready for the 2026 Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride. We are now living through yet another government shutdown--one that, like those before it, hurts our communities far more than the lawmakers responsible for it. For many of us, shutdowns mean uncertainty about food, housing, healthcare, jobs, and services that are already stretched thin. For frontline communities, this instability compounds the ongoing crises we face from extractive industries, systemic racism, and climate change. At **7 Directions of Service** , we know this moment is heavy. Many of you have reached out to share the struggles you are experiencing--both personal and professional--as funding, programs, and everyday services stall. We hear you. Our goal remains the same: to provide support, information, and connection wherever possible. Adding to the weight of this shutdown, last week, President Trump issued a presidential memorandum authorizing government-wide investigations into non-profits, activists, and our funders. Legal, communications, and organizing experts also shared strategies for how we can respond--together, with courage and clarity. We will share these resources and key takeaways in our next update, so our community can stay informed and prepared. Through it all, our commitment remains unwavering. We continue to defend land and water, uplift truth, and build a future rooted in Indigenous sovereignty and solidarity. In strength and resilience,
Crystal & Jason
---
|

|

|

#
### **Join the 7DS Membership Portal**
---
Becoming a member of **7 Directions of Service** means stepping into a movement led by Indigenous and Black communities to protect land, water, and future generations. **As a member, you 'll receive:**
* Access to a private members-only forum
* Early access to photos, videos, and resources before public release
* Invitations to exclusive members-only events, workshops, and cultural gatherings
* Quarterly briefings with the 7DS team
* A digital **2025 Membership Badge** to proudly display on your website or social media

Most importantly, your membership directly supports frontline action--**resisting pipelines, advancing Rights of Nature, restoring food sovereignty, and uplifting Afro-Indigenous leadership**. 👉 Become a member today:[ 7DS Membership Portal](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_3wjqZ4Nij70j8dJ0VPFlCK4jY_LyMUWIWdu_Qlt_Se3nxcaMQxjsE8BCa0bagoMwLI54KPRUqIiAPeunlM0Q80WiTOCn4Mw7iacK3tOuuWbPIeThFMCEnkQ57kvH0ugAUBcdgN86ZWpIyAPPEoUi9bOm3Yh7qiMl5Wf6Im_5L5jkYi0maRSbUI2n4p_AnDg90oN-yJB-92SOn-bCH2bF9AotL5_HduPz20Y2JUW6pINP0XTyG1NY5-b4dhfEXdoL_ctkEeYS2Ws7GbNNzJz8ANa-qyoM4CpeuAQwZFCT1GHQ7EuyVKQFxR2okptIyst9heOheVU2v4hptTs3bYfvcX0-B63trxxCAE2066WHfSCXZ8QoVYRvokD2RRf6hEJY/4ke/ffdOQO8IRN6NjvnVs9izqw/h1/h001.ZV0gJ3zLSWyNYhsiaN0eSf2CugeiUllPTBG9jUVVySg) **Upcoming Member Briefings:**

#
## **Climate Week 2025 - Wrap-Up**
---
|
---
**Our Most Successful Climate Week Yet** This year was our most successful Climate Week to date. For the first time, we brought our **biggest team yet** --including an **Occaneechi Elder** , our documentarians from **Iximche Media** , and our staff members **Kim and Seth**. Together, we lifted up Indigenous leadership, advanced Rights of Nature, and shared our vision for a just and sustainable future with allies from around the world. **Looking Back to 2024****
** At Climate Week NYC in 2024, Dr. Crystal Cavalier-Keck spoke at the **Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature International Tribunal** , raising the alarm about the **Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate extension** cutting through her ancestral territory. Her testimony drew international attention, including from **Shweta Narayan of the Global Climate and Health Alliance (GCHA)** --a global network of more than 200 health organizations. GCHA invited **7 Directions of Service** to contribute expert testimony to their upcoming global report on the health harms of fossil fuels, with special focus on how these projects disproportionately impact **Indigenous women and communities**. This recognition underscored the urgency of our work and helped position our movement in global conversations about climate, health, and justice. [ Read the related report here: GCHA Report on Climate & Health (PDF)](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.T4f1s0H8aL8dqpmq959YtI2x2jh-ajSNHPAfy7ZkpdMjKRzMzV2rCNpTAfWrDhYTTqhSyjeVOYL86Gc2-tnHC-Fkx8DUJIc2aa1SZLBdJXjE-d29EVswkiY_3aOigIrQl8mWjYjfCOStDJDDcPmSZre_t-OuvXV2hf1RlVMherktOvUWKZXPeCTsPQAgPB1OnRizzfcNAcM5hTVyq7qI3iDCuZdSacoppdzMLhuwIoC3iWRTaof5SqaXiX3TCqMHCc47CP9yRGGPN7wUaABhBMW7phoY2V8zd7C2qQPmnOva6ba9BxuSHq2oWBV_AAp5vdjQVw-6VMPzSQjpoUeFtp1He8nC-cX7aT5FQILgm4JLD4PQicR07CLXvqN4Vewoc_G9KXomXgl5lXCBfPbTNfagYQVTEyBIbSTuYYSnDyGFsKUdLhv05szz3cYvbVLJy4hdao2fkIMI3GRswPmqiTRX-7UQbe5LE5cfQG3fp_M/4ke/ffdOQO8IRN6NjvnVs9izqw/h4/h001.yzlWfegB0UrTCurV5ef3lt-rguT9d_n1A0u1SSxl0bY) **Building Forward in 2025****
** This year, at Climate Week NYC 2025, 7DS expanded on that foundation with major milestones:
* **Released the Rights of Nature Declaration for North Carolina** , advancing Indigenous sovereignty and legal recognition of ecosystems' rights.

* **Co-sponsored the Yesah Tribunal** on the Mountain Valley Pipeline, with the **International Tribunal on the Rights of Nature** issuing its official verdict--an important step as the case moves to the international stage at **COP30 in Bel em, Brazil**.
* **Hosted and co-hosted four workshops** spotlighting Indigenous leadership, Rights of Nature, and climate justice.
* **Delivered 7DS recommendations to policymakers** for integrating climate justice into NDCs ahead of COP30.
* **Joined 20,000+ marchers** in calling out billionaires and polluters while uplifting frontline leadership.
* **Collaborated in strategy sessions** with allies to accelerate the Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty and Just Transition frameworks.

# Awards

**Congratulations to Guilford County's 2025 Governor 's Volunteer Service Award - Environment Recipient, Aidan Loretz!**

Please join us in congratulating Aidan Loretz, the 2025 Guilford County winner of the Governor's Volunteer Service Award - Environment. A recent UNCG graduate, Aidan Loretz (they/them) is an outstanding communicator and a passionate advocate for environmental and indigenous justice. Honored with a 2025 Governor's Volunteer Services Award for volunteer work with 7 Directions of Service, Aiden organizes people to support the group's mission of protecting the land and indigenous people, with a particular focus on opposing the Transco Southeast Supply Enhancement Project methane gas pipeline. Aiden brings critical information directly to folks' doors, enthusiastically spreading awareness about how environment policies affect local communities.

All award recipients were honored on Saturday, September 27th at the Carolina Core FC game in High Point, NC.

#
### **We 're Launching Our E-Course on the Indigenous-led Rights of Nature!**
---
|
---
📅 **Launch Date: October 12, 2025** 7 Directions of Service is excited to announce the launch of our new e-learning course: **Rights of Nature for Adults**. This **6-week course** (self-paced or facilitated) features:
* 🎥 **Video lessons** & global/U.S. case studies
* 📚 **Readings & interactive activities** to deepen understanding
* 📝 **Reflection journals & discussion forums** for collective learning
* 🎓 **Certificate of completion** \+ **lifetime access** to all materials

Designed for **activists, community members, policymakers, students, and allies** , this course will equip you with the tools to **understand, advocate for, and apply Rights of Nature in your own community**. You can access it on our website under 'Engage' and then click 'Trainings'. 💲 **Course Fee: $75****
** Your enrollment is more than a class fee--it's an investment in frontline Indigenous-led advocacy. By joining, you are:
* Supporting **7DS 's on-the-ground work** resisting pipelines and extractive industries
* Contributing to the **expansion of Rights of Nature legal frameworks** in North Carolina and beyond
* Ensuring the sustainability of **Indigenous-led education and knowledge-sharing** for future generations

👉 Stay tuned for the official enrollment link and join us in bringing **Rights of Nature to life**!

#
### Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride - January 2026
---
**Hillsborough, NC** - In January 2026, riders, historians, and cultural enthusiasts will gather for a **commemorative Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride** , celebrating the Great Trading Path's recognition on the **2025 World Monuments Watch** , an international list of sites of extraordinary cultural significance. Once linking Indigenous nations from the Chesapeake to the Carolinas, the **Great Trading Path** served as a vital corridor of commerce, diplomacy, and cultural exchange for centuries. This trail ride will honor that legacy, retracing a segment of the historic route near Hillsborough, NC--where the Occaneechi once maintained a vibrant trading village. **Participants can expect:**
* A guided horseback ride for intermediate and experienced riders
* Interpretive talks on the history and cultural significance of the Trading Path
* Rest stops with water and refreshments for riders and horses
* Safety support and trail marshals
* Opportunities to connect with Indigenous leaders and historians

Advance registration will be required to ensure safety and protect the land. Proceeds will support ongoing efforts to **document, protect, and promote the Great Trading Path** as an educational and cultural resource.

# Looking Ahead to the End of 2025 & Beginning of 2026
---
As we forge ahead, 7DS is sharpening our focus on two urgent threats: **Lithium and Uranium mining** and the unchecked spread of **data centers** in North Carolina. Both issues are being pushed into rural and tribal territories under the guise of "innovation" and "progress," but the hidden costs are steep:
* ⚡ **Energy intensity** that strains already fragile grids
* 💧 **Massive water withdrawals** that endanger ecosystems and communities
* 🌱 **Land use impacts** that threaten Indigenous and rural landscapes

We're launching a new **education and outreach campaign** to raise awareness and build power around these hidden costs. And we need you with us. **Here 's how you can take action:**
1. **Join our upcoming webinars** on lithium mining and data centers to learn more and help spread the word.
2. **Share our resources** in your networks so more people understand the stakes.
3. **Stand with frontline communities** by showing up to hearings, submitting comments, and amplifying Indigenous voices.

Stay tuned for registration links and dates for our first webinars. Together, we can flip the narrative and hold these industries accountable before they reshape our lands and futures

clean_body: Your chance to join upcoming events, enroll in our e-course, and take action on Rights of Nature. Celebrate wins, confront new threats, and build with us into 2026. | | Mecou (Hello) Good afternoon relatives, From shutdowns to Climate Week victories, we 're forging ahead. In this issue: join our Membership Portal, stand with us at Bundle of Arrows and Truthsgiving , submit NCDEQ comments, celebrate new awards, enroll in our Rights of Nature e-course, and get ready for the 2026 Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride. We are now living through yet another government shutdown--one that, like those before it, hurts our communities far more than the lawmakers responsible for it. For many of us, shutdowns mean uncertainty about food, housing, healthcare, jobs, and services that are already stretched thin. For frontline communities, this instability compounds the ongoing crises we face from extractive industries, systemic racism, and climate change. At 7 Directions of Service , we know this moment is heavy. Many of you have reached out to share the struggles you are experiencing--both personal and professional--as funding, programs, and everyday services stall. We hear you. Our goal remains the same: to provide support, information, and connection wherever possible. Adding to the weight of this shutdown, last week, President Trump issued a presidential memorandum authorizing government-wide investigations into non-profits, activists, and our funders. Legal, communications, and organizing experts also shared strategies for how we can respond--together, with courage and clarity. We will share these resources and key takeaways in our next update, so our community can stay informed and prepared. Through it all, our commitment remains unwavering. We continue to defend land and water, uplift truth, and build a future rooted in Indigenous sovereignty and solidarity. In strength and resilience, Crystal & Jason | | | Join the 7DS Membership Portal Becoming a member of 7 Directions of Service means stepping into a movement led by Indigenous and Black communities to protect land, water, and future generations. As a member, you 'll receive: Access to a private members-only forum Early access to photos, videos, and resources before public release Invitations to exclusive members-only events, workshops, and cultural gatherings Quarterly briefings with the 7DS team A digital 2025 Membership Badge to proudly display on your website or social media Most importantly, your membership directly supports frontline action--resisting pipelines, advancing Rights of Nature, restoring food sovereignty, and uplifting Afro-Indigenous leadership. 👉 Become a member today: Upcoming Member Briefings: Q4 2025: Wednesday, November 12, 2025 Q1 2026: Wednesday, February 11, 2026 Q2 2026: Wednesday, May 13, 2026 Q3 2026: Wednesday, August 12, 2026 Q4 2026: Wednesday, November 11, 2026 ✨ Already a member? Look out for an email this week with instructions on how to access the new portal and explore its features. | Upcoming Events | Education, Art & Performances to Stop the Fossil Fuel Buildout Sunday, October 19, 2025 | 2 -5 PM 📍 Mebane, NC As regulators determine whether to allow the proposed MVP Southgate and Transco SSEP methane gas pipelines to move forward in North Carolina, join 7 Directions of Service , grassroots leaders, and impacted communities for Bundle of Arrows --an afternoon of education, art, and live music in defense of water, land, and future generations. Highlights: Music by Lumbee/Tuscarora singer-songwriter Charly Lowry** Hands-on art-build for all ages (materials provided) Talk by Guatemalan water defender Sheny Lemus , sharing lessons from frontline Indigenous resistance RSVP here: | 4th Annual Truthsgiving Sunday, November 2, 2025 | 2 -6 PM 📍 The Fruit, Durham, NC Join us for our 4th Annual Truthsgiving , a family-friendly gathering that uplifts the untold historical truths of the U.S. Thanksgiving holiday while amplifying Indigenous resistance and visions for the future. What to expect: Puppetry & storytelling Panels & short films Indigenous foods & community sharing This year's Truthsgiving will center on Rematriation, Rights of Nature, and Indigenous Solutions to the Climate Crisis --creating space for solidarity and transformative action. 👉 Support this event: | Climate Week 2025 - Wrap-Up | Our Most Successful Climate Week Yet This year was our most successful Climate Week to date. For the first time, we brought our biggest team yet --including an Occaneechi Elder , our documentarians from Iximche Media , and our staff members Kim and Seth. Together, we lifted up Indigenous leadership, advanced Rights of Nature, and shared our vision for a just and sustainable future with allies from around the world. Looking Back to 2024** At Climate Week NYC in 2024, Dr. Crystal Cavalier-Keck spoke at the Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature International Tribunal , raising the alarm about the Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate extension cutting through her ancestral territory. Her testimony drew international attention, including from Shweta Narayan of the Global Climate and Health Alliance (GCHA) --a global network of more than 200 health organizations. GCHA invited 7 Directions of Service to contribute expert testimony to their upcoming global report on the health harms of fossil fuels, with special focus on how these projects disproportionately impact Indigenous women and communities. This recognition underscored the urgency of our work and helped position our movement in global conversations about climate, health, and justice. Building Forward in 2025 This year, at Climate Week NYC 2025, 7DS expanded on that foundation with major milestones: Released the Rights of Nature Declaration for North Carolina , advancing Indigenous sovereignty and legal recognition of ecosystems' rights. Co-sponsored the Yesah Tribunal on the Mountain Valley Pipeline, with the International Tribunal on the Rights of Nature issuing its official verdict--an important step as the case moves to the international stage at COP30 in Bel em, Brazil. Hosted and co-hosted four workshops spotlighting Indigenous leadership, Rights of Nature, and climate justice. Delivered 7DS recommendations to policymakers for integrating climate justice into NDCs ahead of COP30. Joined 20,000+ marchers in calling out billionaires and polluters while uplifting frontline leadership. This 6-week course (self-paced or facilitated) features: 🎥 Video lessons & global/U.S. case studies 📚 Readings & interactive activities to deepen understanding 📝 Reflection journals & discussion forums for collective learning 🎓 Certificate of completion \+ lifetime access to all materials Designed for activists, community members, policymakers, students, and allies , this course will equip you with the tools to understand, advocate for, and apply Rights of Nature in your own community. You can access it on our website under 'Engage' and then click 'Trainings'. 💲 Course Fee: $75** Your enrollment is more than a class fee--it's an investment in frontline Indigenous-led advocacy. By joining, you are: Supporting 7DS 's on-the-ground work resisting pipelines and extractive industries Contributing to the expansion of Rights of Nature legal frameworks in North Carolina and beyond Ensuring the sustainability of Indigenous-led education and knowledge-sharing for future generations 👉 Stay tuned for the official enrollment link and join us in bringing Rights of Nature to life! | | Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride - January 2026 Hillsborough, NC - In January 2026, riders, historians, and cultural enthusiasts will gather for a commemorative Occaneechi Trading Path Trail Ride , celebrating the Great Trading Path's recognition on the 2025 World Monuments Watch , an international list of sites of extraordinary cultural significance. Once linking Indigenous nations from the Chesapeake to the Carolinas, the Great Trading Path served as a vital corridor of commerce, diplomacy, and cultural exchange for centuries. This trail ride will honor that legacy, retracing a segment of the historic route near Hillsborough, NC--where the Occaneechi once maintained a vibrant trading village. Participants can expect: A guided horseback ride for intermediate and experienced riders Interpretive talks on the history and cultural significance of the Trading Path Rest stops with water and refreshments for riders and horses Safety support and trail marshals Opportunities to connect with Indigenous leaders and historians Advance registration will be required to ensure safety and protect the land. Proceeds will support ongoing efforts to document, protect, and promote the Great Trading Path as an educational and cultural resource. Looking Ahead to the End of 2025 & Beginning of 2026 As we forge ahead, 7DS is sharpening our focus on two urgent threats: Lithium and Uranium mining and the unchecked spread of data centers in North Carolina. Both issues are being pushed into rural and tribal territories under the guise of "innovation" and "progress," but the hidden costs are steep: ⚡ Energy intensity that strains already fragile grids 💧 Massive water withdrawals that endanger ecosystems and communities 🌱 Land use impacts that threaten Indigenous and rural landscapes We're launching a new education and outreach campaign to raise awareness and build power around these hidden costs. And we need you with us. Here 's how you can take action: 1. Join our upcoming webinars on lithium mining and data centers to learn more and help spread the word. 2. Share our resources in your networks so more people understand the stakes. 3. Stand with frontline communities** by showing up to hearings, submitting comments, and amplifying Indigenous voices. Stay tuned for registration links and dates for our first webinars. Together, we can flip the narrative and hold these industries accountable before they reshape our lands and futures Bila:huk (Thank You) | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Know a Happy Warrior in your community? Nominate them here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
|
#
---
Team, I know this feels like a heavy time in our country. But even in the struggles, there are people in our communities doing the work — people I call _Happy Warriors._ Being a Happy Warrior doesn’t mean pretending everything is fine or ignoring real challenges. It means showing up, working hard, and fighting for something better. **The efforts might seem small, but together they change lives.** You can see it in Chelsea, Michigan, where 300 neighbors formed a “book brigade” to pass 9,100 books hand-to-hand and help a local bookstore move into its new home. And you can see it in Highland Park, Michigan, where Shamayim “Mama Shu” Harris — _one of USA Today’s Women of the Year_ — has transformed an overlooked block into Avalon Village, a thriving community full of gardens, public spaces, and hope. But Happy Warriors show up in other ways, too. Maybe it’s your friend who checked in on you when they knew you needed it. Maybe it’s a family member or coworker who kept you motivated when you needed some encouragement. Maybe it’s your neighbor who shoveled your driveway. Whoever it is, I want to know! **[I want to hear about the people in your life whose efforts, big or small, inspire you to keep going and remind you what’s worth fighting for. Who is your Happy Warrior? Let me know here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116454878/573474412/-1543761966?contactdata=EMd4p9H+3qM6U++WQklYvvCLtgSvdxmx1PJnMHYqT1Fvhlp/2Mn78eFsadu4sSPaNB4/zhlcwi3260QURa6BIEPa1GQV6eli+m7gQcdJsi+1Hadz15Sp4Ygl9xzf1kWCxcnKV8xvn/lRiXZow1CXWg==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251002_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYwMGZlYjctYWI5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZeA7WxV0WEBOofTZUADDnLfA_mJh4AIT1uUaJOkVgV0=&emci=4e4613e8-e49e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0600feb7-ab9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1028753)** | | [NOMINATE A HAPPY WARRIOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116454880/573474417/-1543761966?contactdata=EMd4p9H+3qM6U++WQklYvvCLtgSvdxmx1PJnMHYqT1Fvhlp/2Mn78eFsadu4sSPaNB4/zhlcwi3260QURa6BIEPa1GQV6eli+m7gQcdJsi+1Hadz15Sp4Ygl9xzf1kWCxcnKV8xvn/lRiXZow1CXWg==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251002_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYwMGZlYjctYWI5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZeA7WxV0WEBOofTZUADDnLfA_mJh4AIT1uUaJOkVgV0=&emci=4e4613e8-e49e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0600feb7-ab9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1028753)
---
Thank you for sharing your stories. They remind me every day that real change happens when people come together and build a future that works for all of us.
With gratitude,
Gretchen Whitmer

Lansing, MI 48901

body:

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, America is waking up to the trans violence plaguing our nation. _School kids killed while attending Mass..._ _An attempted kidnapping of a Supreme Court Justice..._ _And now Charlie Kirk murdered for openly debating ideas..._ Each attack is a result of the radical trans ideology being forced on our society. [**Which is why I need your help to stop this radical agenda once and for all.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Friend, you’re probably asking how we got here. By failing to speak the truth in fears we might be “offensive.” In a few years America went from rightfully shunning cross-dressers and protecting children and women from predators... ...to cheering the predators on and giving them full access to women’s private spaces. And now the trans ideology is being driven by women in many ways. Just look at this elected Minnesota official:
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
_(Minnesota Lt. Governor Peggy Flanagan supporting violent trans activism)_
---
And they flaunt violence against their opponents in ways conservatives would never dream of doing...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
_(Trans Rights Shirt promoting violence against their opponents)_
---
| | They don’t just want you to say their “correct pronouns.” They want you to “affirm” every perverted and mad part of their ideology. And if you don’t? **They will kill you.** This cannot continue. **[Join me in stopping the trans ideology from infiltrating our schools and government institutions before it’s too late.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Allowing men masquerading as women to achieve positions of power in our government and schools is endangering our daughters. We must protect our girls and our communities from falling prey to this madness. Thankfully that’s exactly what we’re doing at the **Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women**. Everyday we’re sharing the truth of what is really happening on woke college campuses – unearthing the sinister trans agenda – giving your daughters and granddaughters the resources necessary to share the truth with other vulnerable students. **[And now you can help the Luce Center in this crucial mission by sending in an emergency tax-deductible gift today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** Mentally ill men must be barred from classrooms, girls-bathrooms, and girls sports. And the violent trans ideologues should be uncovered and prosecuted. Because their woke agenda is not normal, and we don’t have to accept it. We can do this – we can put an end to this cultural nightmare. But it will take you, me, and every good American to make it happen. [**Please, rush back your emergency gift right away.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
In faith and freedom,
---
Kimberly Begg President, The Luce Center
---
P.S. Every minute your daughter runs the risk of falling prey to the militant trans violence. Every patriotic conservative must act before it’s too late. [**Please support this crucial fight and send in your emergency tax-deductible gift of $35 or more**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) so the Luce Center can reach vulnerable young college girls with the dangerous truth behind the trans ideology. Thank you for protecting your daughter and our country. - Kimberly
---
| | [ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

$725,000 in Democrat Cash Fuels Ted Dabrowski’s GOP Governor Run (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/725000-in-democrat-cash-fuels-ted-dabrowskis-gop-governor-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=21eb6014bc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/725000-in-democrat-cash-fuels-ted-dabrowskis-gop-governor-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=21eb6014bc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ted Dabrowski, left, and Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D), right. (Photo collage/Illinois Review)
By Illinois Review

Republican primary voters expect their candidates to be supported by fellow Republicans – especially those who share their values and fight against the radical left’s agenda. But in the case of Ted Dabrowski, a GOP candidate for governor, nearly half of his campaign cash tells a different story.

According to Illinois State Board of Elections records, close to 50 percent of Dabrowski’s campaign donations – totaling $725,000 – have come from individuals who not only lean Democrat but actively pull Democratic primary ballots in Illinois elections.

For grassroots Republican voters, that revelation is more than troubling. It raises serious questions about Dabrowski’s loyalties, his viability in a general election, and whether his candidacy is being propped up by Democrat donors at the request of Gov. JB Pritzker, who may see him as the weakest opponent in November.

The donor records are clear. Edgar Bachrach, who gave Dabrowski’s campaign $100,000, pulled a Democratic ballot in the 2024 primary election. He also voted Democrat in the 2018, 2020, and 2022 primary elections. The last time Bachrach pulled a Republican primary ballot was 2016 – nearly a decade ago.

John Canning, another $100,000 donor, voted in just one primary election in the last nine years. That was the 2020 Democratic primary.

Noel Moore contributed $125,000 to Dabrowski and, like others, their voting record shows a clear pattern. Moore pulled a Democratic primary ballot in 2024, raising doubts about their Republican credentials.

Megan O’Keefe, who donated $100,000, also pulled a Democratic primary ballot in 2024.

And then there is James Perry, perhaps the most significant donor with $250,000. Perry voted Democrat in the 2024 primary election. His political history, however, goes even further, with a long list of donations to Democrat politicians Republican voters oppose at every turn.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () $725,000 in Democrat Cash Fuels Ted Dabrowski’s GOP Governor Run () Ted Dabrowski, left, and Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D), right. (Photo collage/Illinois Review) By Illinois Review Republican primary voters expect their candidates to be supported by fellow Republicans – especially those who share their values and fight against the radical left’s agenda. But in the case of Ted Dabrowski, a GOP candidate for governor, nearly half of his campaign cash tells a different story. According to Illinois State Board of Elections records, close to 50 percent of Dabrowski’s campaign donations – totaling $725,000 – have come from individuals who not only lean Democrat but actively pull Democratic primary ballots in Illinois elections. For grassroots Republican voters, that revelation is more than troubling. It raises serious questions about Dabrowski’s loyalties, his viability in a general election, and whether his candidacy is being propped up by Democrat donors at the request of Gov. JB Pritzker, who may see him as the weakest opponent in November. The donor records are clear. Edgar Bachrach, who gave Dabrowski’s campaign $100,000, pulled a Democratic ballot in the 2024 primary election. He also voted Democrat in the 2018, 2020, and 2022 primary elections. The last time Bachrach pulled a Republican primary ballot was 2016 – nearly a decade ago. John Canning, another $100,000 donor, voted in just one primary election in the last nine years. That was the 2020 Democratic primary. Noel Moore contributed $125,000 to Dabrowski and, like others, their voting record shows a clear pattern. Moore pulled a Democratic primary ballot in 2024, raising doubts about their Republican credentials. Megan O’Keefe, who donated $100,000, also pulled a Democratic primary ballot in 2024. And then there is James Perry, perhaps the most significant donor with $250,000. Perry voted Democrat in the 2024 primary election. His political history, however, goes even further, with a long list of donations to Democrat politicians Republican voters oppose at every turn. name: George Whitesides
subject: Thousands in CA-27 stand to lose their healthcare if we don’t act.
body:
Peter,

Before I get into the latest from Washington, I want to extend a heartfelt thank you. With your support, we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and are in a strong position in the battle to keep CA-27 blue and flip the House majority.

Now, let’s turn to the pressing news: In the first early hours of October, Republicans forced a government shutdown – despite controlling the House, Senate, and the presidency.

Unfortunately, Republican leadership refused to come to the table and negotiate with Democrats. I am deeply concerned about the effects of the healthcare cuts that are in the crosshairs of this shutdown.

Under the current budget, 25,000 people in our district will see their healthcare costs rise dramatically if Republican leadership allows the ACA tax credits to expire. 40,000 people in our district will lose their healthcare coverage entirely because of the huge cuts to Medicaid.

That is what I am fighting against. I will not support any budget that stands to hurt the people that I was elected to represent. We must come together to protect healthcare for American families and other critical services they need.

Because of the shutdown, thousands of federal workers and active duty military will go without pay. That’s unacceptable, and members of Congress shouldn’t be paid during the shutdown, either. It’s why I’m donating my Congressional salary during this time to local CA-27 chapters of Meals on Wheels. And it’s why I’m pushing for the No Pay for Congress During Default or Shutdown Act , barring Congress from getting paid during a lapse of federal funding.

I am hopeful we can come to an agreement, but until then, I remain steadfast in my mission to fight for working families, students, seniors, veterans, and more in Washington.

Thank you,

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District.
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=Bg5TpY2Pr2HZZgInbN0eUmJnJbidG%2B1MAvpMLh5C0ZuWTv1hV7NU1b7D4HdJeB2an9Km4CZWFPSCPZWotFVHAMqB7vVA%2BKvgLtcft945LdFnpJrg7%2FkhzccK2bL1wOykasGM75ivfbPdCXpJbk%2BfnOUz8rldakFguxZFlFGnE3SKrzph9y9yVCFa5YzD2bfRORbZagXRASXfkNlaQFNeIW7VBci3z8JTgtgC0SRNff7bNG9C0ybj637xvfg8G7LBCfDb%2FiAyJ%2B17bwNbN52PtxmzGhIRadysbhejpw19qKRSS9PxWA9cYJ%2BZgd9TsYe3Ju9yXtzyR9zn7u1t96nme4TNDPifWXocnGRC5%2FCZwIlDD77NPARyTCDA%2F4o1%2Bv8qgfQYOAjWdIH63vFAT45t1GcxNdZA0YR8Or4fojvxUXcTF79AyicrOJVlD5GbTZ93 .

George Whitesides for Congress

Newhall, CA 91322

| In less than nine months, Donald Trump and his cronies have enacted nearly half of the Project 2025 agenda. And Peter, it’s already eroding our democracy as designed. From firing tens of thousands of federal workers and replacing them with those loyal to Donald, to weaponizing the Justice Department against critics while protecting him and his allies, to gutting protections for our environment, our health, our civil rights, and so much more, the Trump regime has made clear that they’ll answer to no one but Donald and the billionaires bankrolling his chaos. This is fascism, plain and simple. But with your help, we can start building our firewall in state legislatures across the country in order to block his agenda ahead of the 2026 midterms. [With key races in Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi this November, the Democracy Defense Fund is counting on you to help shore up our fight and build a powerful anti-Trump regime bulwark across the states. Will you split a contribution between the Democracy Defense Fund and Blue Amp Action today to help us end Trump’s Project 2025 for good?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17b6ddb0-aa97-469e-9394-0f17754aa40c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: John Fetterman
subject: an update from me (shutdown)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10344%2E434096%2Etj8xzG ]John Fetterman

Hey, folks, John here.

First, I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for donating to our end-of-quarter campaign and helping me raise **$100,000** for PA Dems.

With your support, we're going to give Dems in all 67 PA counties critical resources to organize strong campaigns up and down the ballot. 💪

Second, I wanted to talk to you about what’s happening with the government shutdown.

Late yesterday, I cast two votes:

✅ Renew the ACA health care tax credits.

c

I support health care. I support federal workers. I don’t support shutting down the government.

For me, keeping our nation running is one of the core responsibilities of this job. You don’t shut down the country just to score points. You don’t screw over workers to play politics.

Our country doesn't need this kind of chaos. Together, we must find a better way forward.

Thanks, yinz. I’ll share updates on this situation as I have them.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to EMAIL.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1002&akid=10344%2E434096%2Etj8xzG

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants punished for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zua4eujbf4v50v0i6rglpv27oqhlu4gbi4i9bp4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb0icf1ol20s95o0i6ef2c7pd3830u7u0etnjlf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk5efn5f3lqgiisear5im26ucje02i036kptjm10_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zobg43lb5s9q3e0li00evae9nc5lm33p2h5j7qt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7kdua2vgvc2lc27l6pnmgvu88rmgltfvkbpffl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv9d7dfetqkk60e3agp2rnvpu1b6tc6gkef4re08_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zku1r25jfncgpgnbdec79m7brtagn10ajnvifi7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeg1g7c4rvkob36vvhqs6c936df0eapf28h0rhk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr5i8mgh0qcbjor9snd8nepstd8noiksthacrp50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5j6eo36c1h2bs)

clean_body: I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. | | | | | Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten. This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice. These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ec92434626ff4239a8b3280085302aa9&_e=WTg-bjdcqoRnpxyLXCvcz5GIB24HRHpH_S6AKq0szrYwDB00Gl60rtumWJd-aQ7t7Wu-TCNUXTbc3a74syom4nGorIXWhtUaQyMd7VIscQbtogiGuVZgURJXYEEUT6e938ZS2Pf4pVCi05QGwuVY4weXkeEJyyTFiqX4YHXxQlgygugooWM4ClikSPpp-AR5cYDZk7o-mWAvawN1u-ofJEEKj_HrmmkNNGjc-TItWZvRfQ3GunlJ3Fpop70ACC1tBN32JRGgqKVkCMjAt0GbKlHgaeX1yYhLJgFSnkhlcslJOOGZBGcnx69r10LZphFhKPnBcCgPmjFBKLyh4JYpor90qmSuU-Ne_GQ3q0LDgVHJGjXpS7UDtoGlb0cWGAUHLaJi-DZ6GS558EwhbWQTArakSyeC_au1jEq6xVeBPZFtMBhdDOGVtTNxAjjAf6z1LmmoqUppg0f72yd2YAn0PJr23jsGy-pXMW_JF50cG58xQJ7UzySxcT2r_UjlvoI4oKzMehU98JJdyEL363hoa6I66ZriPoZK3OThiJOUxLOw41zVnq93c_DYoFYCN6v9xx9javFhRUb2aezAo4xx90Z9gGit7nozDoy2FP4MakezvINmSmAl1UudZ809DtZ4PJ5f_a_0Sym2AfTx2N9QIg%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---

The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: I will not sell out our communities, and strip healthcare from tens of thousands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116455735/573477232/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBmN2I2YTgtYWY5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7OtvmM9DQs0CrK7qXK9RxzCggUE8Jcg6yKVHJ6ddgdw=) Team, Thank you for your support in helping us finish our last FEC deadline strong. But obviously, that isn’t the headline today. Here is a photo from Tuesday, where Republicans refused to hold our pro-forma session. Imagine being so intent on taking away people’s healthcare and hiding the Epstein files that you shut down Congress. On the right: Democrats ready to work. On the left: empty chairs which would usually hold Republicans. This shutdown is 100% on them. They’d rather be on vacation than solve problems. Republican leadership thinks the public is too stupid to see through their lies. All anyone has to do is read the damn law to see that they’re lying. While they are claiming that healthcare funds will go to unauthorized recipients, the reality is the healthcare they are cutting will have 47,000 people in my district alone see their premiums spike by over 300 percent. I will always be willing to negotiate to do the right thing and keep our government funded, but I will never betray my neighbors, or approve any agenda that blatantly hurts our communities. Together, Laura
---
