name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021yen63snt99f94po4vmtc7xnzsmqipf8vx4lmanggi0wmgtp103eeh1vgjj29omnyniwn9aprqbo8w36q21i62umtsuqb0cfaxt4l6dz0rox1f4kprhun6firvu9jl699n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vfjpakl3dvdk9f67cvbx6hro81n2ban9c4keu5yw1488qgxa95sz9ldbwlkechrh7nmd95rr1b16dxty5j&__stmp=t3ikhe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021yen63snt99f94po4vmtc7xnzsmqipf8vx4iqpvuv8ppud2ffj2kdmlfds07jhjljmy6ly0cwi64c56p9a2em8gd8q6cbuisec3achlbzs4cd0toirt832uoknpgmaq3j7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq6q8bc1z32cpxar5zcceei8jbe2601tn0t5vr0pqs5xbnk6j3guw5e4ltxdvslclxn5p61xu2hv9ds1owce7n8hjlgy2l4xm1oau6s6iyyjr2oa81axoap8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ikhe&__onlt=h)

The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. * Trump's plans to remove Democrat "scam" agencies amid shutdown
* Johnson says Schumer's Shutdown a "massive backfire"
* OpenAI just got a STAGGERING valuation
* The "Tokenization Freight Train" is here and its not stopping
* Small businesses embrace Stablecoins as a way to break up with credit card fees
* Musk makes history as the richest man in the history of the world, ever

# Trump seizes the moment after Schumer's Shutdown backfires on Dems
President Donald Trump branded the government shutdown an **["unprecedented opportunity"](https://substack.com/redirect/99bac3e9-1966-41e6-b460-ece312343a9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to slash "Democrat Agencies" he called a "political SCAM," vowing to consult OMB Director Russell Vought on targets and permanence amid partisan finger-pointing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99bac3e9-1966-41e6-b460-ece312343a9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump Targets Dem Agencies** : Trump labeled the shutdown as prime chance to eliminate what he deems politically biased government branches tied to opponents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa8274d1-6b74-428b-a485-2ce5f9c16ad8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Vought Meeting Looms Large** : President schedules urgent huddle with budget chief to pinpoint cuts, debating temporary pauses versus full eliminations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99bac3e9-1966-41e6-b460-ece312343a9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Blame Game Escalates** : Accuses Democrats of engineering crisis, positioning his strategy as retaliation to expose and dismantle "SCAM" operations.
* **Rollout has already started** : On the first day of the government shutdown OMB Director Vought put a hold on $18 billion worth of infrastructure projects in New York while they are audited for compliance to constitutional principles.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ec4dcfa-a797-4324-9ff6-da945361c4de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

# Speaker Johnson calls shutdown a "massive backfire" for Dems
House Speaker Mike Johnson accused Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries of sabotaging talks with Trump for pure political gain, calling their stance a **["massive backfire"](https://substack.com/redirect/4ed1652b-d2b6-4035-bd62-8025619a4e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that empowers Republicans and President Trump.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9268346f-256d-4b1b-b5fe-2cc79f1b5ca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Johnson Blasts Dem Leaders** : In a stunning partisan gambit, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer's refusal to back a spending deal triggered a federal government shutdown at midnight Tuesday, handing President Donald Trump sweeping executive authority to slash and prioritize services amid the chaos.
* **Trump Gains Executive Levers** : The impasse shifts unprecedented control to the White House, where OMB Director Russ Vought will unilaterally decide which agencies to fund or furlough during the crisis.
* **Reform Opportunity Emerges** : Johnson hails the shutdown as a rare chance to downsize bloated government bureaucracy, potentially streamlining operations without needing Democratic votes in a divided Congress.

* * *
* * *
# OpenAI raises $6.6B after stunning $500B valuation
OpenAI's secondary share sale closed at a **[staggering $500 billion valuation](https://substack.com/redirect/c2f0f254-05c3-4196-bd13-52705d0ec04a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , raising $6.6 billion from top investors including Thrive Capital and SoftBank, surpassing SpaceX to claim the title of world's most valuable private company amid fierce AI talent wars.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2f0f254-05c3-4196-bd13-52705d0ec04a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Sale Falls Short Of Target** : The tender offer authorized up to $10.3 billion but closed at $6.6 billion, with only eligible long-term employees participating since early September.
* **Valuation Surges Dramatically** : The valuation jumped from $300 billion earlier this year, following November 2024's $1.5 billion SoftBank deal, signaling robust investor appetite.
* **Talent Retention Strategy** : The deal uses secondary sales to reward staff as a counter to Meta's nine-figure poaching bids of OpenAI staff.
* **Mega Infrastructure Push** : The valuation is part of a concerted push into infrastructure investment with partners like Oracle and SoftBank on Texas' Stargate AI data center, backed by President Trump's promotional nod.

* * *
* * *
# The tokenization "Freight Train" will devour traditional finance
Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev warned at Singapore's Token2049 conference Wednesday that **[unstoppable asset tokenization](https://substack.com/redirect/71402b4a-bbd9-49c8-bd5c-e85e6a9a8658?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --digitizing stocks, bonds and real estate on blockchains--will merge crypto and traditional finance, revolutionizing global markets within five years.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71402b4a-bbd9-49c8-bd5c-e85e6a9a8658?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tenev 's Bold Prediction**: Tenev foresees tokenization as default for non-U.S. access to American stocks, boosting efficiency via blockchain advantages over legacy systems.
* **Regulatory Roadmap Ahead** : He expects Europe to lead with clear frameworks soon, while U.S. lags due to entrenched infrastructure, delaying full adoption beyond a decade.
* **Robinhood 's EU Push**: Robinhood recently launched 200+ tokenized U.S. stocks for European clients in June, sparking a stock surge and proving early real-world viability of the concept.
* **Stablecoins Signal Shift** : Tenev highlights stablecoins as pioneering tokenized assets. While being pegged to dollars and other currencies they pave the way for a broader merger of crypto and TradFi giants like BlackRock.

* * *
* * *
# Small businesses look to stablecoins as a solution to "fire" credit card fees
The rise of stablecoins is giving businesses the chance to fire their "highest-paid employee"--credit card fees--with merchants **[piloting stablecoin payments](https://substack.com/redirect/8d729f72-c604-426e-87bf-1b3df7358c38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the register. With credit card fees exceeding $187 billion in U.S. merchant costs last year that could slash expenses and speed up transactions nationwide.
* **Fees Fuel Adoption Drive:** A record $187.2 billion in 2024 merchant processing fees, per Nilson Report, is propelling small businesses to embrace stablecoins to slash credit card swipe costs.
* **Prevail Pioneers Payment Shift:** Prevail Coffee Roasters tests innovative app enabling instant stablecoin swipes at four locations, transforming traditional register routines.
* **GENIUS Act Ignites Momentum:** July's U.S. stablecoin law and Circle's blockbuster IPO has legitimized crypto, fueling expert buzz on disrupting traditional debit-credit dominance.
* **Efficiency Edges Out Tradition:** Experts hail stablecoins' promise of faster, cheaper transactions, boosting convenience for consumers while empowering local capital markets.

* * *
* * *
# Elon makes global history as the first man to be worth $500B
Elon Musk etched his name in financial history Wednesday, becoming the world's first person to reach a staggering **[$500 billion net worth,](https://substack.com/redirect/b91c696d-dd76-44d0-8e44-3f3dc0774b3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** propelled by a Tesla stock surge that added $9.3 billion to his fortune in a single day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b91c696d-dd76-44d0-8e44-3f3dc0774b3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tesla Stake Soars** : Musk's 12% ownership in Tesla, now valued at $191 billion, fueled the milestone amid a 4% share jump and near-record market cap.
* **SpaceX Valuation Explodes** : Private rocket firm SpaceX's $400 billion worth contributes $168 billion to Musk's empire, underscoring his aerospace dominance.
* **xAI Boosts Portfolio** : Majority stake in AI venture xAI adds $60 billion, highlighting Musk's pivot to cutting-edge tech diversification.
* **Trillionaire Path Accelerates** : Experts project Musk as first trillionaire by 2033, tied to Tesla's proposed $1 trillion pay package for ambitious growth targets.

Johnson Blasts Dem Leaders : In a stunning partisan gambit, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer's refusal to back a spending deal triggered a federal government shutdown at midnight Tuesday, handing President Donald Trump sweeping executive authority to slash and prioritize services amid the chaos. Trump Gains Executive Levers : The impasse shifts unprecedented control to the White House, where OMB Director Russ Vought will unilaterally decide which agencies to fund or furlough during the crisis. Reform Opportunity Emerges : Johnson hails the shutdown as a rare chance to downsize bloated government bureaucracy, potentially streamlining operations without needing Democratic votes in a divided Congress. OpenAI raises $6.6B after stunning $500B valuation OpenAI's secondary share sale closed at a , raising $6.6 billion from top investors including Thrive Capital and SoftBank, surpassing SpaceX to claim the title of world's most valuable private company amid fierce AI talent wars. | | ---|---|--- Sale Falls Short Of Target : The tender offer authorized up to $10.3 billion but closed at $6.6 billion, with only eligible long-term employees participating since early September. Valuation Surges Dramatically : The valuation jumped from $300 billion earlier this year, following November 2024's $1.5 billion SoftBank deal, signaling robust investor appetite. Talent Retention Strategy : The deal uses secondary sales to reward staff as a counter to Meta's nine-figure poaching bids of OpenAI staff. Mega Infrastructure Push : The valuation is part of a concerted push into infrastructure investment with partners like Oracle and SoftBank on Texas' Stargate AI data center, backed by President Trump's promotional nod. The tokenization "Freight Train" will devour traditional finance Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev warned at Singapore's Token2049 conference Wednesday that --digitizing stocks, bonds and real estate on blockchains--will merge crypto and traditional finance, revolutionizing global markets within five years. | | ---|---|--- Tenev 's Bold Prediction: Tenev foresees tokenization as default for non-U.S. access to American stocks, boosting efficiency via blockchain advantages over legacy systems. Regulatory Roadmap Ahead : He expects Europe to lead with clear frameworks soon, while U.S. lags due to entrenched infrastructure, delaying full adoption beyond a decade. Robinhood 's EU Push: Robinhood recently launched 200+ tokenized U.S. stocks for European clients in June, sparking a stock surge and proving early real-world viability of the concept. Stablecoins Signal Shift : Tenev highlights stablecoins as pioneering tokenized assets. While being pegged to dollars and other currencies they pave the way for a broader merger of crypto and TradFi giants like BlackRock. Small businesses look to stablecoins as a solution to "fire" credit card fees The rise of stablecoins is giving businesses the chance to fire their "highest-paid employee"--credit card fees--with merchants at the register. With credit card fees exceeding $187 billion in U.S. merchant costs last year that could slash expenses and speed up transactions nationwide. Fees Fuel Adoption Drive: A record $187.2 billion in 2024 merchant processing fees, per Nilson Report, is propelling small businesses to embrace stablecoins to slash credit card swipe costs. Prevail Pioneers Payment Shift: Prevail Coffee Roasters tests innovative app enabling instant stablecoin swipes at four locations, transforming traditional register routines. GENIUS Act Ignites Momentum: July's U.S. stablecoin law and Circle's blockbuster IPO has legitimized crypto, fueling expert buzz on disrupting traditional debit-credit dominance. Efficiency Edges Out Tradition: Experts hail stablecoins' promise of faster, cheaper transactions, boosting convenience for consumers while empowering local capital markets. Elon makes global history as the first man to be worth $500B Elon Musk etched his name in financial history Wednesday, becoming the world's first person to reach a staggering propelled by a Tesla stock surge that added $9.3 billion to his fortune in a single day. | | ---|---|--- Tesla Stake Soars : Musk's 12% ownership in Tesla, now valued at $191 billion, fueled the milestone amid a 4% share jump and near-record market cap. SpaceX Valuation Explodes : Private rocket firm SpaceX's $400 billion worth contributes $168 billion to Musk's empire, underscoring his aerospace dominance. xAI Boosts Portfolio : Majority stake in AI venture xAI adds $60 billion, highlighting Musk's pivot to cutting-edge tech diversification. Trillionaire Path Accelerates : Experts project Musk as first trillionaire by 2033, tied to Tesla's proposed $1 trillion pay package for ambitious growth targets. * Thanks for reading The Capitalist! This post is public so feel free to share it. You're currently a free subscriber to . Countless times now, the DEMOCRATS have voted to KEEP our government SHUTDOWN, and Americans are paying the ultimate price. | Peter, Sadly, the Democrats have decided to prioritize politics over keeping the government open. Countless times now, the Left has voted to KEEP our government SHUTDOWN, and Americans are paying the ultimate price. It's shocking, Peter. The Left would prefer to have our troops go without a paycheck while they continue to collect theirs. This is a political play by Democrat Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer to protect his political career, appease his far-Left base, and make a push for radical policies like healthcare for illegal immigrants. How does Chuck Schumer feel about this shutdown? Well, they say a picture is worth a thousand words: The Democrats are giving their government shutdown a double thumbs-up. clean_body: Every poll released for our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority tells the same story—this race is virtually tied! | Fellow American, Every poll released for our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority tells the same story— The battle for the Senate Majority is a toss-up! The minute we retook the Senate Majority from Chuck Schumer, Democrats across the country didn’t waste any time organizing and tapping into their networks of elite megadonors in California and New York. I already have an opponent here in Montana, and they’re not waiting around to rally their radical base against me. I’ll be blunt Fellow American: We can’t win this race without your help. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:

* * *
It’s up! Our brand-new rainbow billboard in Orlando is declaring what MAGA Republicans hate most: **🌈****PRIDE WILL NEVER BE ERASED.🌈** ****While Ron DeSantis and his MAGA allies rip up Pride crosswalks, cancel Pride festivals, and even threaten to arrest activists for chalking rainbows on sidewalks, we’re fighting back with joy, color and a message too fabulous to silence.

The billboard is now live at Silver Star Road and N Orange Blossom Trail and will run through October 27.

Because here’s the truth: they can paint over a street, but they’ll never wipe away the PRIDE from our hearts.

Friend, keeping this billboard glowing takes resources. It’s just $86 a day to keep this rainbow fierce and defiant above Orlando. Every extra dollar helps us stop the MAGA bullies who want to stuff us back in the closet.

**We refuse to be erased. We refuse to go quiet. And we refuse to let hate define Florida’s future.** ******[🌈 Chip in $10 today to keep our rainbow blazing. clean_body: Our brand-new rainbow billboard in Orlando declares what MAGA Republicans hate most... | | | Our PRIDE billboard is live in Orlando! It’s up! Our brand-new rainbow billboard in Orlando is declaring what MAGA Republicans hate most: 🌈**PRIDE WILL NEVER BE ERASED.🌈 **While Ron DeSantis and his MAGA allies rip up Pride crosswalks, cancel Pride festivals, and even threaten to arrest activists for chalking rainbows on sidewalks, we’re fighting back with joy, color and a message too fabulous to silence. The billboard is now live at Silver Star Road and N Orange Blossom Trail and will run through October 27. Because here’s the truth: they can paint over a street, but they’ll never wipe away the PRIDE from our hearts. Friend, keeping this billboard glowing takes resources. It’s just $86 a day to keep this rainbow fierce and defiant above Orlando. Every extra dollar helps us stop the MAGA bullies who want to stuff us back in the closet. We refuse to be erased. We refuse to go quiet. And we refuse to let hate define Florida’s future. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. With love, rage, and rainbows, -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) [ **Team – this could be the most important email you read today.** Please just give us 60 seconds to explain why. ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=3&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9)

In just past week, Donald Trump has:
* [**WEAPONIZED**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=4&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) the Justice Department to prosecute his political opponents
* [**REFUSED**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=5&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) to meet with Democratic leaders Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries
* [**SPREAD UNPROVEN**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=6&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) medical advice that links autism to Tylenol and vaccines
* [**THREATENED**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=7&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) to cut off all federal funding to New York City

...and that’s only in the past week, team!!!

We refuse to stand by and watch Donald Trump make a joke of our Democracy any longer... [**That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition to tell Congress:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=8&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9)
[ **IMPEACH Donald Trump → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=9&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=10&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9)

Team, we can’t stress enough how important this is.

If we can get 10,000 local signatures by 11:59 PM TONIGHT, it will give Congress the momentum they need to introduce articles of impeachment.

[ **But we’re still missing [247] signatures from Democrats in your area. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=13&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9)
[**So please, team, sign our petition today and tell Congress:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69324?t=14&akid=23457%2E4449941%2EE0TEs9)

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino shooting: Arrest records show gunfire erupted near entrance," **San Antonio Express-News' **Annasofia Scheve** \-- "An arrest affidavit for the man charged in a [deadly shooting at an Eagle Pass casino](https://substack.com/redirect/d9aeaa8e-ddee-4ae8-b0d5-a91e083b5ffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) details the moments just after gunfire broke out, but provides few specifics about what led up to the shooting and how authorities identified him.

San Antonio resident **Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, is charged in connection with the Saturday night shooting at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino, which killed two and injured five.

Officials identified the victims as mother of five **Alicia "Daniela" Sanchez** and former Border Patrol agent **Marcus Antley**.

Around 7:30 a.m. Sunday, deputies in Wilson County arrested Jones after a vehicle pursuit. Authorities had said shortly after the shooting that a black Nissan Frontier truck was believed to be involved.

In the days following the shooting, the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department and Maverick County Sheriff's Office did not release further details on how the fatal incident unfolded.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/6d0f867f-7edb-44bd-89b2-d59146e469cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
However, Sanchez's mother [told the San Antonio Express-News](https://substack.com/redirect/52ce651d-5592-451a-b7c8-3818b5179d5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her daughter was shot in the parking lot of the casino while getting ready to drive home to her children.

An arrest affidavit for Jones confirms that the shooting took place near an entrance to the casino.

Kickapoo police responded to the casino about 11:50 p.m. and found seven people with gunshot wounds near a crosswalk and pathway outside the A-11 entrance, according to the document. Publicly available maps of the casino do not identify which entrance is A-11.

While first responders tended to the victims, officers began searching for Jones and the black Nissan Frontier he was believed to be driving, the affidavit says. The document does not provide information on how law enforcement identified him as a suspect.

Police notified other nearby law enforcement agencies of the shooting so they could look out for the vehicle, too.

Antley was pronounced dead at the scene, according to the affidavit, while Sanchez was pronounced dead at the Fort Duncan Regional Medical Center. Each of the five wounded was transported to the hospital, too.

The affidavit did not give insight into a possible motive for the shooting, and authorities have not released further information.

After his capture in Wilson County on Sunday morning, Jones was transported to the Maverick County jail, where he remains in custody with total bail set at $4.5 million. He is charged with two counts of capital murder and five counts of aggravated assault with a deadly weapon.

The casino is closed until further notice, according to [a statement posted on social media Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/d7f8dcd1-86cd-49be-acd6-9b4f7b491c36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"We are heartbroken by the tragic events that occurred at Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino this weekend," the casino said. "Our deepest condolences go out to the victims, their families, and all those affected."

A shooter also opened fire outside the casino in December 2021, according to a [past release from the Dimmit County Sheriff's Office](https://substack.com/redirect/ffa84b01-591d-409a-b91e-9f6ea80a31ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which arrested a suspect. There were no injuries reported, the casino [said in a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/8826b8ac-3a7e-4251-9b2c-875fb0bcbe75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time.

Anyone with information on the Saturday shooting is asked to contact the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department at 830-421-5322." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/e06ae427-1fe5-47c7-8b5a-fca8a96aea0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: I’m asking for your partnership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Tim Walz and the radical left are preparing for war - it’s up to us to stop them. As a former Navy SEAL, I believe I can be of assistance. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a39434d336264d0ebdd586db57a15eb5&_e=0HKmINKBR95pwe2tVXku8ouK6COJhPQTLGXM72uZmX9xoO8XwTpIfR9zEmavcr4Pz0FBF2TItLd9B4MzMGRcrQPqofmvth6XJBnVe2QCUfjlFkJ2F8DTz1XxVHFHkSy-lChhmj8HBFBcsghHq5g2gvwMDE33RGOgG0KmrOb7L-SrV4o_plsJeWfsz-I5q_rudTVrDqTLsqfA47EQzno_9hj9ofKIW5kLddYpKLCP7cqJmdBY3obik77RI_1NbGzrcUZ4u0RVMYoxgB3kLbmcXFwd3SSlT8Gb9tCThbuXnXVeAeGEhLLi6dK0uFCBx3-ojcHZ9RzchEVTwBHgYNs-xumKVZ-BdKX0-sOPCLGZHVL4V2DeSrOrQja10-0kpjx8yTqiSQt1dT5_IIwm7M1Jo6Qr_ea4oiMUWgTfqa2j_dBCChJIRf21GmPn4nEUAM9UADnOlTm9rKE-Pz8WuLfg1SrAAM0Kxl6XLTL_13WsRV-dIWmYetehJVdYcVbXAnzdgZZqQMDUfQ131bhru4f0rKSnDAWfhPqK2tCc3xycVU0c8cPE7A5rPn92kEb4tdfCUKs_ne7gIdk2ascsVro2kgkvKNAgT5WZTI_gt2lNLZM95ST09aUtZtBcacqSRuYN1Dkt_HZZmwwqZAjIwx45qtRdJG3NAQ_7eOnKdeWcmd-sAANsrmahrn5zF2G9U-P3OqueLaLTDbVrgRoiPvCVawk-yHomECStyWpYOp7fx9oFDDKx4MkafOtG1XAovac5UkHlhQZ_ht5Li4pT261spSf9z7SzIQUsxVKDTkRQRjc%3D)

---

Peter,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a39434d336264d0ebdd586db57a15eb5&_e=0HKmINKBR95pwe2tVXku8ouK6COJhPQTLGXM72uZmX9xoO8XwTpIfR9zEmavcr4Pz0FBF2TItLd9B4MzMGRcrQPqofmvth6XJBnVe2QCUfjlFkJ2F8DTz1XxVHFHkSy-lChhmj8HBFBcsghHq5g2gvwMDE33RGOgG0KmrOb7L-SrV4o_plsJeWfsz-I5q_rudTVrDqTLsqfA47EQzno_9hj9ofKIW5kLddYpKLCP7cqJmdBY3obik77RI_1NbGzrcUZ4u0RVMYoxgB3kLbmcXFwd3SSlT8Gb9tCThbuXnXX9DGf0Et7CVYuXzBcLGZBuXlwFvM4X9hBny3YEkelzMQpc1iEtzAkuUXQ9hW7hXfCaJ5PlcHxwJtZnBXhla782vnTcRBD-qlBZhDwsz7tdaq6fz28MBq5vrO9wqnjf-uNuyPfysSI-bpr8oT_ADIECU4bEQtzmHNy3xMXWQeNy4VDwkrMhI09xsg-D6YYkJVv4XDF8vh5c3rDbi8drxezOXFdscA3s9xlfRRGV_KdKWLdcBnvxMJJPDlzZw3-7DH7HyT24FYRgQdwxn1wC9yycptcmmWI5hk8Zg6ejJEEvOuPSboatvZuxp5aq2beV7ybuZikMDbzA9kAldgahCybmzGx6K-jGfzri2O-XoD05egFHaee7d7pZcWS5FHuGjbZ2TuN-7p6ouyAFLmmF24Susj15RTClqq2zP7zrkqUJ-tLcz6nKMoNMJzOhRvTRWzmKgnZtxQgWM3RbqHoCxmd_eTr-lyeg7rkvXttAWFf3TLb_64ee7Uk74A8nz7SBo2U%3D)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. **[Will you contribute $1, $5, or $50 to help us win this fight?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a39434d336264d0ebdd586db57a15eb5&_e=0HKmINKBR95pwe2tVXku8ouK6COJhPQTLGXM72uZmX9xoO8XwTpIfR9zEmavcr4Pz0FBF2TItLd9B4MzMGRcrQPqofmvth6XJBnVe2QCUfjlFkJ2F8DTz1XxVHFHkSy-lChhmj8HBFBcsghHq5g2gvwMDE33RGOgG0KmrOb7L-SrV4o_plsJeWfsz-I5q_rudTVrDqTLsqfA47EQzno_9hj9ofKIW5kLddYpKLCP7cqJmdBY3obik77RI_1NbGzrcUZ4u0RVMYoxgB3kLbmcXFwd3SSlT8Gb9tCThbuXnXWb7Q2YCPP8nEi0aAkkywu3-41DU2v2w_BTOlwRS7t9EfXbws0D3_mgi3qZQlMUOEIS3sr5X1idXjjboj-sWLMcLV9ua2ID9zV6klRXO_O9Kptgn2_Os-Tu4EpaqEyPhPaLTBejenf5vpi6WVhfY8IdKyfcJnZl96mZjaspeGLVhaRklval0daywNiscT3-Mr1Tb4joNIXi7mslqOsSIf-wRiORVVYmIcr912xf29EmA3ZpyeIlP6RhGFrqoWnA7-6-gAvmNrsmx-zFwnUAmakLNIpnphgwPOWGGF8ir4pmscxy5VG6znmWLH4-UZQjbh50G90v2WBQz648DMfZAADT1OqbR0-ZYE9AEoMnsuOA0-fOfLfMm42u7IU0VYBfjZW13CvLn__Ohg_GhWXNckKElBhjUA1HtHzXs7SWLzNeET6cIJ8S3KSWpFGFfR11RcKuaQ3cG6PWLRmQoo75G1ZuXdWJsCVGX55OEKo03V6XN2pC3jqdUkx7oWpO3N063cs%3D)**

[**MAKE A GIFT RIGHT NOW
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a39434d336264d0ebdd586db57a15eb5&_e=0HKmINKBR95pwe2tVXku8ouK6COJhPQTLGXM72uZmX9xoO8XwTpIfR9zEmavcr4Pz0FBF2TItLd9B4MzMGRcrQPqofmvth6XJBnVe2QCUfjlFkJ2F8DTz1XxVHFHkSy-lChhmj8HBFBcsghHq5g2gvwMDE33RGOgG0KmrOb7L-SrV4o_plsJeWfsz-I5q_rudTVrDqTLsqfA47EQzno_9hj9ofKIW5kLddYpKLCP7cqJmdBY3obik77RI_1NbGzrcUZ4u0RVMYoxgB3kLbmcXFwd3SSlT8Gb9tCThbuXnXXAtZNnXhBkPNjg7L-v-D_0KKvkw4bte7LFwboDKwg4aMl1caAPzN4MRgl3cAMYf1y1QguHe_ETokvZVpP_9Jb4_q3U0v5afGsnEOpc7MVRZKhn3b-Cr8zg-L2YrtKNeLrwRRN0ljirBzqUQJBfbHSHm9qJfkb9PIlHkOIreIK58j3-y6FE-HF31-RAtwk0KMT4yuBksUB3N37y-yg8I0hZWQWcMrhpo25BazqhwwngSw5XLWvXfJ_dmjbowdKO5qqNuI5G6QfAeXe9OXjgIw9wl_U8pseJY1fm-q1NOejlDH48IwY-LbWVpM4ojoC1AKtxp4Oy12Ru0akr5mjI_DACXR6VG80LljM3B1HhK8Tq5JCFg5gAPdmzAoKtjcu8WrFsMDKYTYWe8UKxm9Kk_DWZlNtxENi0c4G16S0S0cywBNYVXghxoNalGkNUZ2ZMTKWTD1VsrXsMvPEubz3n9-kbq9ouPk8nRc53gD_RdDiS2Aj24g9NI1vYbVV0X0daxwE%3D)
I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass —** I’m asking for your partnership. **

Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

name: Wes Moore
subject: You deserve credit for this
body:
Thanks to your support, we hit our goal.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=702%2E1086043%2Ef4INL4)
I want to start by thanking you, Peter.
Thanks to supporters like you, we _exceeded_ our fundraising goal for the third quarter. **We couldn’t do this without you.**
Peter, we’re building a movement that Leaves No One Behind. One that ensures that people have the opportunity to thrive here in Maryland. One that is growing every day.
We’re looking to build a huge coalition of support who believe in our mission, so are you in?
**[Please consider pitching in $5 today to support my campaign and start October off as strong as possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251002-1?refcode=em-20251002-1&refcode2=702_1086043_f4INL4&akid=702%2E1086043%2Ef4INL4)**

Elevate,
Wes

* * *

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino shooting: Arrest records show gunfire erupted near entrance," **San Antonio Express-News' **Annasofia Scheve** \-- "An arrest affidavit for the man charged in a [deadly shooting at an Eagle Pass casino](https://substack.com/redirect/40af035f-7ce9-47a5-abd8-c35dd5bf2e00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) details the moments just after gunfire broke out, but provides few specifics about what led up to the shooting and how authorities identified him.

San Antonio resident **Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, is charged in connection with the Saturday night shooting at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino, which killed two and injured five.

Officials identified the victims as mother of five **Alicia "Daniela" Sanchez** and former Border Patrol agent **Marcus Antley**.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/1c3bb55f-a6f1-4fd3-92bb-5ef08c3f53ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Around 7:30 a.m. Sunday, deputies in Wilson County arrested Jones after a vehicle pursuit. Authorities had said shortly after the shooting that a black Nissan Frontier truck was believed to be involved.

In the days following the shooting, the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department and Maverick County Sheriff's Office did not release further details on how the fatal incident unfolded.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/1c3bb55f-a6f1-4fd3-92bb-5ef08c3f53ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
However, Sanchez's mother [told the San Antonio Express-News](https://substack.com/redirect/7788c730-caaa-4e45-958f-99ec743a2d83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her daughter was shot in the parking lot of the casino while getting ready to drive home to her children.

An arrest affidavit for Jones confirms that the shooting took place near an entrance to the casino.

Kickapoo police responded to the casino about 11:50 p.m. and found seven people with gunshot wounds near a crosswalk and pathway outside the A-11 entrance, according to the document. Publicly available maps of the casino do not identify which entrance is A-11.

While first responders tended to the victims, officers began searching for Jones and the black Nissan Frontier he was believed to be driving, the affidavit says. The document does not provide information on how law enforcement identified him as a suspect.

Police notified other nearby law enforcement agencies of the shooting so they could look out for the vehicle, too.

Antley was pronounced dead at the scene, according to the affidavit, while Sanchez was pronounced dead at the Fort Duncan Regional Medical Center. Each of the five wounded was transported to the hospital, too.

The affidavit did not give insight into a possible motive for the shooting, and authorities have not released further information.

After his capture in Wilson County on Sunday morning, Jones was transported to the Maverick County jail, where he remains in custody with total bail set at $4.5 million. He is charged with two counts of capital murder and five counts of aggravated assault with a deadly weapon.

The casino is closed until further notice, according to [a statement posted on social media Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/8838fa2a-6ee0-4c1e-a3aa-f7914856e9b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"We are heartbroken by the tragic events that occurred at Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino this weekend," the casino said. "Our deepest condolences go out to the victims, their families, and all those affected."

A shooter also opened fire outside the casino in December 2021, according to a [past release from the Dimmit County Sheriff's Office](https://substack.com/redirect/e4d3c272-c402-4543-937d-aac2992f8365?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which arrested a suspect. There were no injuries reported, the casino [said in a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/a251bf47-b695-4640-8fce-eca14a13a31d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time.

Anyone with information on the Saturday shooting is asked to contact the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department at 830-421-5322." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/685c3a97-e785-4e21-8e7a-66ee00ac8964?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS " Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino shooting: Arrest records show gunfire erupted near entrance," San Antonio Express-News' Annasofia Scheve \-- "An arrest affidavit for the man charged in a details the moments just after gunfire broke out, but provides few specifics about what led up to the shooting and how authorities identified him. San Antonio resident Keryan Rashad Jones , 34, is charged in connection with the Saturday night shooting at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino, which killed two and injured five. Officials identified the victims as mother of five Alicia "Daniela" Sanchez and former Border Patrol agent Marcus Antley. Around 7:30 a.m. Sunday, deputies in Wilson County arrested Jones after a vehicle pursuit. Authorities had said shortly after the shooting that a black Nissan Frontier truck was believed to be involved. In the days following the shooting, the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department and Maverick County Sheriff's Office did not release further details on how the fatal incident unfolded. However, Sanchez's mother her daughter was shot in the parking lot of the casino while getting ready to drive home to her children. An arrest affidavit for Jones confirms that the shooting took place near an entrance to the casino. Kickapoo police responded to the casino about 11:50 p.m. and found seven people with gunshot wounds near a crosswalk and pathway outside the A-11 entrance, according to the document. Publicly available maps of the casino do not identify which entrance is A-11. While first responders tended to the victims, officers began searching for Jones and the black Nissan Frontier he was believed to be driving, the affidavit says. The document does not provide information on how law enforcement identified him as a suspect. Police notified other nearby law enforcement agencies of the shooting so they could look out for the vehicle, too. Antley was pronounced dead at the scene, according to the affidavit, while Sanchez was pronounced dead at the Fort Duncan Regional Medical Center. Each of the five wounded was transported to the hospital, too. The affidavit did not give insight into a possible motive for the shooting, and authorities have not released further information. After his capture in Wilson County on Sunday morning, Jones was transported to the Maverick County jail, where he remains in custody with total bail set at $4.5 million. He is charged with two counts of capital murder and five counts of aggravated assault with a deadly weapon. The casino is closed until further notice, according to . "We are heartbroken by the tragic events that occurred at Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino this weekend," the casino said. "Our deepest condolences go out to the victims, their families, and all those affected." A shooter also opened fire outside the casino in December 2021, according to a , which arrested a suspect. There were no injuries reported, the casino at the time. Anyone with information on the Saturday shooting is asked to contact the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department at 830-421-5322." name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, will you help us defend our public lands?
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
Hi Peter,
As an OLCV member, I know that you have a connection to our public lands, regardless of if you’ve been able to enjoy them or not. What’s so special about our public lands is that you don’t need to visit them to see their value, nor do you need to have certain political beliefs to care about protecting them ( read more [https://www.dataforprogress.org/blog/2025/7/31/with-public-lands-under-threat-voters-want-to-see-them-protected-and-budgets-kept-intact] ). They are an integral part of our life. Lisa from Bend, Oregon is just one of the millions of people across the country that loves our public lands:
“My family rides and hikes on public lands daily. Please protect them for future generations. Thank you.”
Our public lands are facing numerous unprecedented federal threats: such as paving roads over untouched forests, selling public lands to mining and drilling, and more. We can’t protect them without you.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2] Will you generously give $ 10 today to secure our magical public lands for years to come? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
Defend our Public Lands [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
Your support has allowed us to make an incredible impact in this fight to protect our public lands. But, unfortunately, it’s not over yet, and we can’t keep doing this work without you.
If we lose this fight, it means that future generations will not be able to enjoy the same public lands we were, and some of the last untouched places in the country will be lost forever.
Can we count on you, Peter, to give $ 10 today for our public lands? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
Give for Public Lands [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
Our public lands are the nation’s most treasured landscapes, and your gift today can keep them protected and accessible for generations to come.
Will you give now to keep our public lands healthy, vibrant, and protected? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=10&contactdata=UOoGG+8J/J7EzTxv0utRZGeQfbUpf1qQej1as1B4hskJzmbbID1tlu/hO13nOZnqv8u53Cf0KKdvPd7xvBK/N6ZUb9NFzmH/1C8xIn/4Uh22kY5q6K8uJMzwJcVaUT1m]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator

Portland, OR 97214

San Antonio resident **Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, is charged in connection with the Saturday night shooting at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino, which killed two and injured five.

Officials identified the victims as mother of five **Alicia “Daniela” Sanchez** and former Border Patrol agent **Marcus Antley**.

An arrest affidavit for Jones confirms that the shooting took place near an entrance to the casino.

Kickapoo police responded to the casino about 11:50 p.m. and found seven people with gunshot wounds near a crosswalk and pathway outside the A-11 entrance, according to the document. Publicly available maps of the casino do not identify which entrance is A-11.

While first responders tended to the victims, officers began searching for Jones and the black Nissan Frontier he was believed to be driving, the affidavit says. The document does not provide information on how law enforcement identified him as a suspect.

Police notified other nearby law enforcement agencies of the shooting so they could look out for the vehicle, too.

Antley was pronounced dead at the scene, according to the affidavit, while Sanchez was pronounced dead at the Fort Duncan Regional Medical Center. Each of the five wounded was transported to the hospital, too.

The affidavit did not give insight into a possible motive for the shooting, and authorities have not released further information.

After his capture in Wilson County on Sunday morning, Jones was transported to the Maverick County jail, where he remains in custody with total bail set at $4.5 million. He is charged with two counts of capital murder and five counts of aggravated assault with a deadly weapon.

The casino is closed until further notice, according to [a statement posted on social media Monday](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eK3muZlky5BtIpdxgyhty-AKnZEK7vazpLHyC4KuNqCL3mpXJM0GnIhij9XNRF9AJeacSskeghoZV1sYPWWXVohA8aAGT0zsGdU-Hq4TFE17m3CnTNE7PqBIMPQNhP5KjCdN5UPu5gTuIabyiDfYOHW4E5lxAnFHZqgo9CAWUbMX6nhyJGCIg8PIA9o2BDAZsC7dtt9dlQf0Mgwg4_rYPA_LshBzckF09V8StxHimAp-x6Vc4576sE7P0KGP2ZLIpCgNMI0dWF2b3Cji-pZ2PBWEK-v16enQ6WuF-hIFyi3vU2RiBHk3fv9Y4pPogHly89F_LyL6G65he5Y1cz1sbc9LGKLzG6syZYHTeX_U1vCs2_b2yPSLcKoj1nGp0RHzD2-OZJDjMJJhPY3YzhPzbsInyOQyGEGnFraaoFT8jdGMWxeYqSF_T18BCttNs0A5Ox5Mae7BogoCbz16cuu_ghugrYp-hD5U6ElCzlVbiPWe28EOW7IJD1BewGzlTlI_bqWA5UVhem8uBKRZMGMZiGTy_s1O_EQIbuvN_L7iiV7G/4ke/EafEn9qdQiCX6XSFPB8kfw/h16/h001.xK5gw6tdhSXGcizBswe0WkzesbL0Rtfwi8A6CKXOJi4).

Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | | | | | | TOP NEWS “Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino shooting: Arrest records show gunfire erupted near entrance,” San Antonio Express-News’ Annasofia Scheve \-- “An arrest affidavit for the man charged in a details the moments just after gunfire broke out, but provides few specifics about what led up to the shooting and how authorities identified him. San Antonio resident Keryan Rashad Jones , 34, is charged in connection with the Saturday night shooting at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino, which killed two and injured five. Officials identified the victims as mother of five Alicia “Daniela” Sanchez and former Border Patrol agent Marcus Antley. » Around 7:30 a.m. Sunday, deputies in Wilson County arrested Jones after a vehicle pursuit. Authorities had said shortly after the shooting that a black Nissan Frontier truck was believed to be involved. In the days following the shooting, the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department and Maverick County Sheriff’s Office did not release further details on how the fatal incident unfolded. » However, Sanchez’s mother her daughter was shot in the parking lot of the casino while getting ready to drive home to her children. An arrest affidavit for Jones confirms that the shooting took place near an entrance to the casino. Kickapoo police responded to the casino about 11:50 p.m. and found seven people with gunshot wounds near a crosswalk and pathway outside the A-11 entrance, according to the document. Publicly available maps of the casino do not identify which entrance is A-11. While first responders tended to the victims, officers began searching for Jones and the black Nissan Frontier he was believed to be driving, the affidavit says. The document does not provide information on how law enforcement identified him as a suspect. Police notified other nearby law enforcement agencies of the shooting so they could look out for the vehicle, too. Antley was pronounced dead at the scene, according to the affidavit, while Sanchez was pronounced dead at the Fort Duncan Regional Medical Center. Each of the five wounded was transported to the hospital, too. The affidavit did not give insight into a possible motive for the shooting, and authorities have not released further information. After his capture in Wilson County on Sunday morning, Jones was transported to the Maverick County jail, where he remains in custody with total bail set at $4.5 million. He is charged with two counts of capital murder and five counts of aggravated assault with a deadly weapon. The casino is closed until further notice, according to . “We are heartbroken by the tragic events that occurred at Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino this weekend,” the casino said. “Our deepest condolences go out to the victims, their families, and all those affected.” A shooter also opened fire outside the casino in December 2021, according to a , which arrested a suspect. There were no injuries reported, the casino at the time. Anyone with information on the Saturday shooting is asked to contact the Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department at 830-421-5322.” ($) | TOP NEWS “After SEC approval, it’s time to learn what the Texas Stock Exchange is made of” ($) “Elon Musk reaches a first-ever wealth milestone as Tesla stock surges” ($) | 2026 “A key court test begins for Texas’ redrawn US House map that boosts the GOP” “At hearing, Democrats say the redistricting process was flawed from the start” | STATE GOVERNMENT “Gov. name: No Kings Mobilization via Our Revolution
subject: “Enemy from within”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1012&refcode=email-20251002_v&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump just told our military leaders to use American cities as their
“training grounds” to fight the “enemy from within.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251002&t=1062&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Headline: Trump, justifying domestic military action, tells Pentagon
leaders to 'handle' the enemy from within'

If there’s one thing history’s taught us, it’s that silence in moments
like this is surrender.

That’s why, on October 18, we’re working with allies to organize the
largest day of action in Our Revolution’s history: No Kings Day.

Our goal? To show Trump that these blatant attempts to scare us into
silence will NOT work. Together we will make No Kings Day impossible to
ignore, from front pages to the White House.

Trump wants fear. We’ll show courage. He wants control. We demand
democracy. But for it to work, we need everyone.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251002nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Can you pitch in now to help us make No Kings Day the biggest single day
of protest yet and show Trump that his scare tactics will only bring MORE
of us out into the streets in peaceful protest?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump’s already sent the National Guard to cities, but yesterday’s speech
makes it clear he’s only just getting started. Now he’s labeling cities
like Portland as “war zones” and telling Pentagon leaders to be ready to
“handle” the “enemy from within.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251002&t=1061&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Headline: ' Like World War II': Trump talks POrtland during address to
military leaders

Trump tries to justify this militarization of one city after the next by
trying to make it seem like our cities are crime-infested and out of
control, but the truth is crime statistics in most big cities are stable
or falling. His real goal is simple – scaring our communities into
silence.

Let’s be clear: what he means by ‘enemy’ is anyone who disagrees with him.
It’s authoritarian rule plain and simple, and we WILL NOT accept it
quietly.

Our Revolution is mobilizing students, workers, families, and elders to
show up in massive numbers on October 18 – at courthouses, public parks,
and city squares. We’re readying banners, speakers, organizers, and
preparing legal support to keep everyone safe. We’ll be out in force, but
we can’t maximize turnout and cover the costs of dozens of events –
permits, supplies, safety equipment – without your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20251002nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]As Trump tries to crush dissent, we have to show up bigger and bolder than
ever. Will you help make No Kings Day on October 18 massive?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

P.S. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34243?t=1011&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]RSVP here to join a No Kings Day protest on October 18

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9452%2E5885482%2EJxOGmn

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: 🔥 URGENT: Trump just handed us TWO openings 🔥
body:
The fact is this: The side that acts FIRST will control the narrative, the money, and the momentum. If Democrats don’t step up immediately, MAGA Republicans will. Chip in $5 now to make sure we don’t waste this once-in-a-generation chance to TAKE BACK these two Senate seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?refcode=100225_2]
Peter, this was NOT supposed to happen:
TWO swing-state Senate seats are opening up WAY earlier than expected.
We cannot waste this opportunity!
When Trump plucked JD Vance out of Ohio and Marco Rubio out of Florida, he opened up TWO swing-state Senate seats... now those seats will be UP FOR GRABS sooner than expected.
NO ONE expected this... and that means whoever moves the fastest WINS.
Let's make sure it's DEMOCRATS and not the MAGA lunatic Republicans that raise the funds needed to flip these seats! Chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can help Democrats prepare for this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?refcode=100225_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:

name: Jason Crow
subject: This campaign has always been about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,

Let me take a moment and say thank you. We just closed out September, and thanks to supporters just like you, we met our ambitious fundraising goal.

This campaign is — and has always been — about you. It’s about tackling the issues that hold our families back. It’s about making sure everybody, no matter their zip code, can thrive.

But right now, Trump and Republicans in Congress have forced us into a government shutdown. They're hurting working people to protect their wealthy and powerful buddies, and federal workers are paying the price.

Republicans, who currently control both chambers of Congress and the White House, canceled votes in the House & sent Congress home early. Republicans control the entire government, but failed to pass a budget. Their failures will hurt working people the most.

I made a pledge during my first victory speech: As long as I have the honor of serving you in Congress, I will be there for you no matter what.

Thanks for standing with me,

Jason

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: States moving the wrong direction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100225_2&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100225_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100225_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100225_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100225_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100225_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100225_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100225_2&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100225_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100225_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100225_2&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [] Team, We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate. The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot. While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely. The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic. We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike. These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more. We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever. Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. I’ve faced some truly **tough** challenges before, but I think this could be the hardest mountain I’ll ever have to climb...

I was legally barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was _**RAKING IN**_ millions and **millions** of dollars! I’m not kidding – _**a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one go!**_

As a devout Christian, I wouldn’t lie to you. So, please believe me when I tell you this is a really __**BAD**__ situation! _The truth is, Spanberger has**bottomless** dark money to rely on. _She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers to the brim!__

---
Listen, my race is _**TIED**_. The **ONLY** thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's _CRAZY_ cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this critical race together, **but we have to get to work _RIGHT NOW!_**
---
[ SEND IN ANYTHING YOU CAN SPARE >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhjM/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

-Winsome Earle-Sears
_Mother_

_Lt. Governor of Virginia _
