name: Deb Haaland
subject: Our last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This is it — our last chance this year to show the strength of this grassroots campaign.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)
We’re heading into one of the most defining moments of this race yet — and I need you with me.
The final New Mexico fundraising deadline of the year is just days away. After that, every candidate, including me, will be required to publicly report our fundraising totals.
This is HUGE — our last chance this year to show the strength of this grassroots campaign. **[If you’re with me, please chip in $5 to help us reach our $250,000 fundraising goal before our deadline on October 6th.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251002_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251002-4797&refcode2=4797_400544_y7u6W2&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)**
**[ Donate $5 » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251002_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251002-4797&refcode2=4797_400544_y7u6W2&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2) **
When Washington abandons people, governors are the first line of defense — and we’re seeing that now more than ever.
With a Republican government shutdown, costs rising, rural hospitals on the brink, and thousands at risk of losing coverage — state governments are on the front lines.
New Mexicans deserve a leader who truly understands their struggles and will fight fiercely to protect them. **I’m ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans.**
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crime so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
I am ready to bring the bold solutions we need. _But to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve, I can’t do it without supporters like you._
**Unfortunately, we’re facing a crowded and expensive race. One of my self-funding opponents is already airing TV ads, and Republicans are closely watching our campaign. And right now, we’re racing against the clock to prove we can raise what it takes to win. **
With the government shut down and affordability more uncertain than ever, I completely understand if now’s not the right time to make a donation. **[But if your budget allows for it, can you make a generous contribution of $5 or anything you can today to help us reach our $250,000 goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251002_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251002-4797&refcode2=4797_400544_y7u6W2&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251002_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251002-4797&refcode2=4797_400544_y7u6W2&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)**
Thank you for your support,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251002-1&t=2&refcode2=4797_400544_y7u6W2&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4797%2E400544%2Ey7u6W2)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

body:

Instead of working together to fund the government and support our communities, Republicans are holding the process hostage—threatening programs that keep families healthy and safe.

The Republican-led shutdown is reckless, unnecessary, and hurts everyday Americans. Instead of working together to fund the government and support our communities, Republicans are holding the process hostage—threatening programs that keep families healthy and safe. They hold the House, the Senate, and the White House. I don’t accept this BS Republican shutdown. REJECT THE BS REPUBLICAN SHUTDOWN [] While they delay, families lose vital benefits, veterans go without pay, and small businesses suffer. This is not leadership, it’s dysfunction. I’m standing up for truth. I’m fighting for accountability, for honest government, and for the values Americans share. If we don’t fight back, we risk letting chaos win. I need your help. Chip in to help my campaign so I can keep demanding answers, defending democracy, and refusing to cosign Republican extremism. CHIP IN [] Thank you for standing strong with us. Together, we’ll make sure our voices are heard. - Eric DONATE TO ERIC » [] [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Join Swalwell's Circle, Eric's inner circle of supporters, by committing to a $50 or more monthly contribution today! [] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd like to receive only the most critical updates, sign up for his Break Glass in Case of Urgency list to receive less email. [] If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

subject: Peter: South Carolina wants to jail people for abortion care
body:

🚨 BREAKING NEWS FROM SOUTH CAROLINA 🚨 Peter, South Carolina lawmakers just held a hearing on Senate Bill 323—[**one of the most extreme anti-abortion bills we've ever seen.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116462160/573498035/2141984067?sourceid=1150907&utm_campaign=25emaus-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=southcarolina&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWY0ZWRhYi1iYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uwRf9saoY2PoGG7yVPZTBNKU-aNpmjct31InVSZMss=&emci=431c712c-ad9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5f4edab-bc9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) | [**DEFEND ABORTION CARE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116462161/573498036/2141984067?sourceid=1150907&utm_campaign=25emaus-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=southcarolina&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWY0ZWRhYi1iYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uwRf9saoY2PoGG7yVPZTBNKU-aNpmjct31InVSZMss=&emci=431c712c-ad9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5f4edab-bc9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "DEFEND ABORTION CARE")
---
This extremist bill would:
* Make abortion a felony homicide, with penalties of up to 30 years in prison
* Remove what little remains of exceptions for rape, incest, and fatal fetal anomaly
* Criminalize giving information about abortion—even through a phone call or a website
* Force students to watch an anti-abortion propaganda video called "Meet Baby Olivia" in public schools
* Threaten access to birth control and IVF by rewriting the very definitions of "contraception," "fertilization," and "pregnancy"

This is not just about South Carolina. [**It's about creating a blueprint for national abortion and birth control bans. This is unacceptable.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116462162/573498037/2141984067?sourceid=1150907&utm_campaign=25emaus-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=southcarolina&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWY0ZWRhYi1iYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uwRf9saoY2PoGG7yVPZTBNKU-aNpmjct31InVSZMss=&emci=431c712c-ad9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5f4edab-bc9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)
[**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116462163/573498038/2141984067?sourceid=1150907&utm_campaign=25emaus-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=southcarolina&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWY0ZWRhYi1iYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uwRf9saoY2PoGG7yVPZTBNKU-aNpmjct31InVSZMss=&emci=431c712c-ad9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5f4edab-bc9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---

[**Our legal work depends on the support of people like you who believe in reproductive freedom, dignity, and autonomy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116462164/573498039/2141984067?sourceid=1150907&utm_campaign=25emaus-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=southcarolina&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWY0ZWRhYi1iYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uwRf9saoY2PoGG7yVPZTBNKU-aNpmjct31InVSZMss=&emci=431c712c-ad9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5f4edab-bc9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

name: Hudson for Alabama - Press
subject: Hudson Issues Statement on Chuck Schumer Shutting Down the Federal Government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hudsonforalabama/hudson-issues-statement-on-chuck-schumer-shutting-down-the-federal-government-8404223?e=1ade0133c0)
---
[|
---](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=5c16c5e9ad&e=1ade0133c0)
| | | | | | | | | | | | **For Immediate Release:** October 2, 2025
**Contact:**(205) 514-4264mike@hudsonforalabama.com**Jared Hudson: Members of Congress Should Forgo Their Paychecks Until Government Reopens**
**Birmingham, AL** — Navy SEAL veteran Jared Hudson today issued a direct challenge to every member of Congress: Don’t take a paycheck until the government reopens. “ _Chuck Schumer and the Democrats have made it their mission to hold the American people hostage for their policy gains. There should never be a time when they can willingly shut down the government to get benefits for individuals who shouldn’t be in our country in the first place. While they keep wining and dining amongst the D.C. elite, they are leaving the American family out to dry,_ ” **Hudson said.** “ _As someone who’s worn the uniform and lived through deployments, I know what sacrifice looks like. Families across this country live paycheck to paycheck, and when Washington fails, it’s hardworking Americans who pay the price. Federal employees are furloughed, small businesses lose contracts, and everyday citizens are forced into unnecessary uncertainty. Meanwhile, members of Congress keep cashing checks like nothing happened. That is wrong — flat out wrong,_ ” **Hudson continued.** Hudson emphasized the hypocrisy of politicians getting paid while those on the front lines go without: “ _Think about it. Our military personnel, our Border Patrol agents, our law enforcement officers, and our air traffic controllers — men and women who put their lives on the line for this country every single day — are expected to keep serving without pay. I’ve stood shoulder to shoulder with Americans who would give their lives for this nation. To see Congress still getting paid, claiming it’s necessary for their livelihoods, while these heroes go without? That is unconscionable._ ” Hudson urged Republicans and Democrats alike to lead by example: “ _If you can’t do your job and keep the government open, you don’t deserve a paycheck. Congress needs to feel the same pain it inflicts on the American people. Until the doors of government are open, the wallets of Congress should be closed._ ” This is not a partisan issue, but a matter of principle: “ _We need accountability in Washington. Members of Congress must put country before self-interest. No work, no pay — it’s that simple._ ” Hudson’s call comes as Washington remains mired in political stalemate, while everyday Americans — including those in uniform protecting our nation — are left carrying the burden.
###
---

name: Ro Khanna
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Stop Trump’s assault on the First Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Trump just issued a presidential directive, NSPM-7. No one is talking about it, but it is one of his most dangerous power grabs yet.
It grants his administration sweeping authority to investigate and prosecute organizations that dare challenge him under the guise of combating “political violence.”
https://x.com/rokhanna/status/1972793546366406831?s=46 [https://x.com/rokhanna/status/1972793546366406831?s=46]
What does that mean? As Ken Klipperstein reported [https://www.kenklippenstein.com/p/trumps-nspm-7-labels-common-beliefs] , it targets groups that he describes as:
* Anti-American, anti-capitalist, and/or anti-Christian;
* Focused on gender, race, and migration justice; or
* Critical of “traditional” views on family, religion, or morality
By branding critics as “extremists,” Trump is laying the groundwork to criminalize speech, shut down organizations, and intimidate millions into silence. It’s a direct assault on the First Amendment, worse than the Patriot Act.
ADD YOUR NAME: Defend our constitutional right to free speech. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/protect-free-speech-petition?contactdata=O6aUh38ypekjlv+GXe8QNUjF4aVZYjYcbxhi/srPu2/MrXwyJno/xRk+h2RfXtOo0ep92O1JU0dNScAuhKEF+htHGi9nsHUzQ5Z9VV4us4ZhuneF1zydRU4VJrEAbsq53y87NWhKF+KRvBJG0ObblMK/IhEhv8wRsQvY7Lwvax1jQnR6ajqFVxBMZQjk1SNK]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/protect-free-speech-petition?contactdata=O6aUh38ypekjlv+GXe8QNUjF4aVZYjYcbxhi/srPu2/MrXwyJno/xRk+h2RfXtOo0ep92O1JU0dNScAuhKEF+htHGi9nsHUzQ5Z9VV4us4ZhuneF1zydRU4VJrEAbsq53y87NWhKF+KRvBJG0ObblMK/IhEhv8wRsQvY7Lwvax1jQnR6ajqFVxBMZQjk1SNK]
Free speech belongs to all of us, regardless of our party or our views. If we don’t fight back now, we could lose one of our fundamental freedoms.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

body:
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251002-652&t=1&akid=653%2E294397%2ESToA4G)
Did you catch yesterday’s breaking news?
**We have a new extreme opponent** , Maria Lazar.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. [**If you’re able to, please pitch in $10 to strengthen our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251002_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251002-652&refcode2=653_294397_SToA4G&akid=653%2E294397%2ESToA4G)

Now that they have handpicked our opponent, it’s only a matter of time before right-wing special interests start pouring money into Wisconsin to boost Lazar and tear us down. That’s why we need you in this fight.
Thanks,
Ashley
Campaign Manager

From: Chris Taylor for Justice
Date: Wed, Oct 1, 2025
Subject: BREAKING: We have a new right-wing opponent
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Breaking news, folks:
**Judge Chris Taylor officially has a new right-wing opponent, Maria Lazar.**
Maria Lazar is as out of touch as it gets. She’s spent her career rolling back people’s rights and catering to billionaires and special interests. That’s why she has been backed by groups who believe in rolling back access to reproductive care – even IVF and contraception.
If elected, Maria Lazar would be the most extreme member of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
[**Before we say more, can you rush in $10 to help fuel our campaign? With a new opponent in the race, we have to show strength immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251002_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251002-652&refcode2=653_294397_SToA4G&akid=653%2E294397%2ESToA4G)

Now that it’s official, far-right mega donors are already gearing up to pour millions into Wisconsin to tip the scales in Lazar’s favor.
We can’t afford to wait to respond — every hour we delay, the other side gains ground.
That’s why we need this grassroots team to step up immediately. If everyone reading this email chips in right now, we’ll be ready for whatever right-wing special interests throw at us.
[**Pitch in $10 now to elect Judge Chris Taylor and secure our progressive majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251002_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251002-652&refcode2=653_294397_SToA4G&akid=653%2E294397%2ESToA4G)

Team Taylor

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Claim your "We Are Charlie Kirk" wristband today
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207nusqzrhrcdnuuo41numlk121moxomgz11khc1ji2y7gfjb2a9f5t92uf7ihtydrtb24c2jm25mmcx4py&__stmp=t3ipmm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3chvr8h94iq45aqy1bonyd73o1hm4aspddu87xqxypdaxyu294erf9vqbndtpqqj2kzi8xgxj8dx7q4kqugkquan5odaoku9weufc2ze1em8f55kcswn0l6c0ykwkqnlopj7wglvt5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3chvr8h94iq45aqy1bonyd73o1hm4aspddu87xqxypdaxyu294erf9vqbndtpqqj2kzi8xgxj8dx7q4kqugkquan5odaoku9weufc2ze1em8f55kcswn0l6c0ykwkqnlopj7wglvt5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3ipmm&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor:

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: JD Vance is a liar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)
Friend — Yesterday, JD Vance stood at the podium in the White House press room and repeated a lie that he and his GOP colleagues have been spreading for the last week.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4624?t=2&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)
Republicans have to lie about this because the truth is much harder for them to spin: The government is shut down right now because the Republican budget will jack up health care costs for millions of Americans, and they refuse to work with Democrats to find a solution.
Listen, I’m an immigrant to this country. I have navigated this system. I know **far more** about the benefits that immigrants are eligible to receive than a con-man like JD Vance. And personally, I believe healthcare is a human right that should be guaranteed for all, regardless of income, background, or immigration status.
But the fact of the matter is that undocumented immigrants do not have access to the federally funded health care plans that Democrats are negotiating to protect.
They can’t get Medicaid plans. They can’t get Obamacare plans. But this administration will never miss a chance to blame all their problems on immigrants, truth be damned.
So once again, here are the FACTS: **Republicans are holding the government hostage so they can raise health care premiums by 75% for 20 million Americans and throw millions more off their health care.**
If this budget passes as-is, rural hospitals will close across the country, life-saving prescriptions and treatments will skyrocket in cost for the working class, and thousands will die every year because they can’t afford care.
Friend, Republicans control the White House. They control Congress. It’s time for Republicans to grow up, stop lying to the American people, stop scapegoating immigrants, stop abusing their power, and negotiate with Democrats to end this healthcare crisis and protect the health and the wallets of working class Americans.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
_P.S. I want to thank everyone who contributed before our FEC deadline on Tuesday. This team helped us reach our fundraising goals after a month of relentless attacks from the far-right. But as we dig in for what could be a long government shutdown, we are preparing for our fundraising to hit a major slow down. Please, consider**[chipping in today**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251002-1-180&t=3&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z) to help us keep up the fight against Trump and continue to organize for reelection here in Minnesota._
**[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251002-1-180&t=4&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1865_791427_JWdb2Z&akid=1865%2E791427%2EJWdb2Z)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I want your name on this wall, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
#
This is Deb Haaland with exciting news, Peter: We just opened our campaign headquarters in Albuquerque — and **right at the center is our Grassroots Donor Wall, a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, not billionaires and insiders.**
I want your name on that wall, Peter. We’re adding the names of everyone who pitches in, no matter the size of the donation. **[Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today so we can add yours?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96256?refcode=em20251002-9516&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9516%2E614464%2Eu2Vd7A)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96256?refcode=em20251002-9516&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9516%2E614464%2Eu2Vd7A)
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that _you_ helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: **a people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
_But it is up to all of us, Peter — it’s an all hands on deck moment — to make that happen._ I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please split a contribution of $5 or any amount today between my campaign and State Democrats Committee so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96256?refcode=em20251002-9516&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9516%2E614464%2Eu2Vd7A)**

name: Anika Page
subject: Mississippi’s Night of Success – Reserve Your Seat!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gala-12850184?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon Friend, On **Thursday, October 23rd** , leaders from across Mississippi will gather at the Country Club of Jackson for our annual gala, _A Celebration of Mississippi Success._ This year, we are honored to feature **Governor Tate Reeves** , whose leadership has been central to Mississippi’s recent progress. He will be joined by **Rich Lowry** , Editor-in-Chief of _National Review_ and one of America’s most respected voices in public policy. Together, they will reflect on our state’s achievements and share their vision for the road ahead.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=281852472b&e=5703353baa)
---

**South Carolina already has ultra-restrictive abortion laws.** But now, they're trying to roll back reproductive rights even further.
❌ They want to remove nearly all exceptions
❌ They want to criminalize doctors who provide information about abortions, even if it's over the phone.
❌ They are also threatening up to 30 years in prison for anyone who receives an abortion.
_We honestly wish we were kidding. This is a new low, even for anti-abortion extremists._
**That's why we urgently need you to use your voice. Lawmakers in South Carolina are discussing the fate of millions of people's bodily autonomy today, and we need to send a very clear message: Do not mess with our rights.**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: We Need To Be Honest About This: MAGA Republicans Shut Down the Government
disclaimer_text: paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance
body:
I understand if you're angry. I am too.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.HBrySU49qLVgTYlnnWvyhApcfDHL_8IcgCO5w2MrXyY?) for more
---
# [We Need To Be Honest About This: MAGA Republicans Shut Down the Government ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=175123963&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTIzOTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTk0MzE3OTIsImV4cCI6MTc2MjAyMzc5MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dmkwB2jbjWM_jrrxgH87jvaN_u3PN6mmDnuQr3osCPg)
### I understand if you're angry. I am too.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Oct 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..PtFme4hmLUzw1Anq6IlMpyhMEw7By1CknP3k_k3DiqE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/we-need-to-be-honest-about-this-maga?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hey there,
I'm going to be totally honest with you about what's happening right now. There's been a lot of spin and nonsense coming out of the White House, but you deserve the truth. Here it is: **Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Washington are the reason the federal government is shut down.**
It's not an accident. This crisis is 100% manufactured - and regular people, including Michiganders, are paying the price.
But let's back up. This didn't start two nights ago - it started months ago when Donald Trump handed the keys to the federal government to his billionaire donor Elon Musk and his DOGE clowns.
Since then, we've seen deep, harmful cuts to critical services - from rural health care to infrastructure to clean water protections. All of it chipped away as working people were pushed aside.
Then came the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" - a massive tax giveaway to billionaires, paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance. They slashed Medicaid. And they did it in the name of "efficiency," pretending it was good fiscal policy. It wasn't. _**It was cruelty with a calculator.**_ And now they're targeting subsidies that help working families afford basic care.
**Because Republicans refuse to reverse those health care cuts or renew the health insurance subsidies set to expire soon, the government is shut down and health care costs are still going up.**
This isn't some abstract budget fight. This is real, and for me, it's personal.
Here's why: Rural hospitals across the Midwest are preparing to shut their doors. Premiums are spiking. And families who rely on Medicaid are suddenly unsure if they'll be able to afford medicine or even a doctor visit.
Let's be clear about what this means for Michiganders: In my district alone, more than 31,000 people will have to pay more for their health care - _in some cases hundreds of dollars more_ - if Republicans succeed in letting these subsidies expire. That's 31,000 hardworking folks who will be facing impossible choices - all so billionaires can buy another mansion or jet or whatever.
That's why I'm not budging - I can't support any deal that slashes health care and does nothing to cut costs for Michiganders. My priorities have always been lower costs, affordable health care, a strong workforce, and a government that works for Michigan.
**Because if it doesn 't work for Michigan, it doesn't work for me.**
I didn't come to Congress to play political games. I didn't come to stand by while the people I love get ripped off. I came to Congress to get things done - and to protect the working people who make our state, and our country, great.
So if you're angry, you're not alone. I am too.
If you're frustrated, you have every right to be.
If you're scared, I understand.
Families are stretched thin. Groceries cost more. Gas costs more. Health care costs more. And now we've got a shutdown caused by Republicans who couldn't care less what that might mean for working families.
Here's my promise to you: I'm not backing down. I'll keep showing up. I'll keep pushing for a deal that restores health care access, reverses the cuts, and puts people - not politics - first.
My Stevens doggedness is in overdrive. I promise to fight as hard as I can.
Will you join me? **If you agree Republicans are to blame for this reckless shutdown, add your name to our new petition now:**
[ SIGN ON NOW](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/13d3cf2c-7b58-49ac-b233-f24c137f4df4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I want to show the strength of this grassroots movement, and it all starts with you.
Thanks for reading this. And for being in this fight with me.
More soon,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in $5 today?
[DONATE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7baf407f-6a31-4e0c-95ce-d8040373da64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan

| | | [Restack](https://substack..PtFme4hmLUzw1Anq6IlMpyhMEw7By1CknP3k_k3DiqE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..jpdvYuFez8Brj9HuDCISPAWb4kWE0CYiEPqWlfq0Pn0?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bf100f47-28eb-4a5b-b18f-e0c9b13c5373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..GZQZCQ9dT-rVi9c75rAMVYrvAHKgeNHYYGPm8BnQ1K8?)

clean_body: Your 2025 voter record is still incomplete. Fix it before it’s too late. | I'll shoot straight with you, Peter. We're building for 2026, and we need to bolster our conservative America First majority in the Senate, and my father, President Donald J. Trump, is counting on us to deliver. But I just got some troubling news: Our 2025 NRSC voter records are still incomplete in critical to protecting our Senate majority. We can't afford to leave any data on the table while the radical left is mounting a comeback for their complete and total socialist takeover of the federal government. I'm asking you personally, Peter: Nothing keeps me up at night more than the thought of Chuck Schumer and Democrats running the Senate again. Let's make sure that doesn't happen by completing your profile in the next 30 minutes. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. # **[Woman Reports Startling Discovery In Amazon Package](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

Well, this one practically writes itself. A woman in Maine was expecting to tear into her Amazon box to find rice, paper plates, and a toy lightsaber. What she got instead? body:

Peter, ** ** As you've probably seen in the news, our federal government has shut down once again because of extreme partisanship in Washington. And once again, it's our communities in rural Arizona and across Indian Country who stand to lose the most. Unlike Eli Crane, the man who is supposed to be working on our behalf in Congress, folks in our district can't afford to retreat to their McMansion in a gated community when times get tough. [**We need to keep pressure on our elected officials to do something to stop our neighbors from losing healthcare, negotiate in good faith, and re-open the government. Can you please add your name to my petition telling Eli Crane to stop betraying our neighbors and do his job?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/hSQsIhIE5VDZxtPtUnMPiQ~~/AAPPABA~/OIHE5zdP0ISzhjSE3AXVsIzbANbYc5zKLiFlblLq-Oxs1ckO1reMJ9s1Gfm1WrbcnPgwcAtnBLFftMXsfDe3nEWT6lUP7RtrHKpb9URr9pczrwR36JIZ9lGs8eGi8ixU_i23qT0RvIt6Q_oIQQxjJ0p2smW3LPe4NnlR9wfOKdi-HvCxokrJQPacGsevJ8i2bUct_ytTebpP657tGHHy_bKoK4izO1VsDAqAm6PO2-siGtuDq6WdhG1Ofv5sKNJe5oa9WWcrNZSAvE83LOyJtAufMvDfQZwDqwRbbZyZOhS47dqw1jHpBcEaD2ZMLl4cVSz-Lk08GmH7_ybBO7PX2RQo2oqSC43dYMhNzCP7OUA~)

[ **SIGN ON** ](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/hSQsIhIE5VDZxtPtUnMPiQ~~/AAPPABA~/OIHE5zdP0ISzhjSE3AXVsIzbANbYc5zKLiFlblLq-Oxs1ckO1reMJ9s1Gfm1WrbcnPgwcAtnBLFftMXsfDe3nEWT6lUP7RtrHKpb9URr9pczrwR36JIZ9lGs8eGi8ixU_i23qT0RvIt6Q_oIQQxjJ0p2smW3LPe4NnlR9wfOKdi-HvCxokrJQPacGsevJ8i2bUct_ytTebpP657tGHHy_bKoK4izO1VsDAqAm6PO2-siGtuDq6WdhG1Ofv5sKNJe5oa9WWcrNZSAvE83LOyJtAufMvDfQZwDqwRbbZyZOhS47dqw1jHpBcEaD2ZMLl4cVSz-Lk08GmH7_ybBO7PX2RQo2oqSC43dYMhNzCP7OUA~)
---
Instead of working on a bipartisan plan to keep the government open, extremists like Eli Crane are doing everything they can to _raise health care costs_ and _cut critical funding for tribal services, education, and rural infrastructure._ Let's be clear:
* **Eli Crane 's preferred plan would hike premiums, prescription costs, and out-of-pocket expenses for families who are already feeling the pinch.**
* **We need leaders who are ready to work together to**** _keep the government open_****and**** _lower costs_****-- not push political agendas at our expense.**

From the Navajo Nation to the White Mountains, and across all of AZ-02, people are tired of dysfunction and extremism. What we need is common-sense leadership focused on _real people_ , _real families_ , and _real solutions_ -- _not more of the same from Eli Crane._ [**That 's exactly what I'm committed to bringing to Congress, and if you're with me, I need you to sign my petition telling Eli Crane to negotiate towards ending this government shutdown.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/hSQsIhIE5VDZxtPtUnMPiQ~~/AAPPABA~/OIHE5zdP0ISzhjSE3AXVsIzbANbYc5zKLiFlblLq-Oxs1ckO1reMJ9s1Gfm1WrbcnPgwcAtnBLFftMXsfDe3nEWT6lUP7RtrHKpb9URr9pczrwR36JIZ9lGs8eGi8ixU_i23qT0RvIt6Q_oIQQxjJ0p2smW3LPe4NnlR9wfOKdi-HvCxokrJQPacGsevJ8i2bUct_ytTebpP657tGHHy_bKoK4izO1VsDAqAm6PO2-siGtuDq6WdhG1Ofv5sKNJe5oa9WWcrNZSAvE83LOyJtAufMvDfQZwDqwRbbZyZOhS47dqw1jHpBcEaD2ZMLl4cVSz-Lk08GmH7_ybBO7PX2RQo2oqSC43dYMhNzCP7OUA~) Together, we can build a future where our voices are heard, our health care is protected, and our government works for all of us. In solidarity,
Jonathan Nez
---

clean_body: | | Peter, As you've probably seen in the news, our federal government has shut down once again because of extreme partisanship in Washington. And once again, it's our communities in rural Arizona and across Indian Country who stand to lose the most. Unlike Eli Crane, the man who is supposed to be working on our behalf in Congress, folks in our district can't afford to retreat to their McMansion in a gated community when times get tough. ~ ~ Instead of working on a bipartisan plan to keep the government open, extremists like Eli Crane are doing everything they can to raise health care costs and cut critical funding for tribal services, education, and rural infrastructure. Let's be clear: Eli Crane 's preferred plan would hike premiums, prescription costs, and out-of-pocket expenses for families who are already feeling the pinch. We need leaders who are ready to work together to keep the government openand lower costs-- not push political agendas at our expense. From the Navajo Nation to the White Mountains, and across all of AZ-02, people are tired of dysfunction and extremism. What we need is common-sense leadership focused on real people , real families , and real solutions -- not more of the same from Eli Crane. ~ Together, we can build a future where our voices are heard, our health care is protected, and our government works for all of us. [Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/8b91c5af-32dd-4337-9700-18bb2d1e6cc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I had an energizing, no-holds-barred conversation with activist and organizer **David Hogg** that you don't want to miss. We went deep on the shutdown, Democratic messaging, the next generation of leadership, and what it really means to fight for change. Whether you're a seasoned political junkie or just feeling overwhelmed by the moment, this is one of those must-watch episodes that helps make sense of the chaos. Hit play -- and bring a notebook.
* [00:01:02] David breaks down the GOP's shutdown strategy and the real-world impact on healthcare premiums across the board
* [00:03:15] A fiery exchange on the infamous Democratic "Kitties video" and why Gen Z outreach needs to look different
* [00:10:01] The difference between hope and pragmatism: why Democrats can't win by being the "least bad" option
* [00:17:00] Inside David's DNC exit: what happened, why he chose values over titles, and what he's building next
* [00:25:02] Leaders We Deserve, explained: investing in young talent, why Maxwell Frost's race matters, and a call to support a generational shift

**[If you're tired of business-as-usual politics and crave leadership that actually reflects our values, this episode is essential. Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency and help build the kind of political media that informs, inspires, and drives action. We're just getting started.](https://substack.com/redirect/8b91c5af-32dd-4337-9700-18bb2d1e6cc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Evan
subject: This is how they lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA
body:
Fellow American, Do you know how people lose winnable races? This is why.....Please take a moment to read this important email. |
---
Fellow American,

**Do you know how people lose winnable races?**

They run a campaign as if they are 10 points ahead in the polls.

They think they have it in the bag, but things change, and nothing is certain.

**_Remember Hillary Clinton in 2016?_** Her team thought they had won the presidency before anyone had voted, and they LOST! name: Gavin Newsom
subject: As you read this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
The election is officially underway

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here it goes:
As you read this people are voting. Yes. Ballots have been mailed in some places, and people are voting.
These emails are the single greatest source of individual contributions we receive to fund our efforts. That means when the response to them is light, we have to consider pulling back budgets.
When the response is what we need, it means we can reach the voters we need to reach BEFORE their ballots are returned.
Folks, we are talking about five House races over three cycles ... all in this election. We are talking about counteracting what Republicans are doing and giving Democrats a fair chance to take the House.
If we lose here, we are going to have total Republican control in the House, the Senate and the White House for at least two more years. If we win here, we can put a check on Trump for his final two years.
That outcome, is up to Democrats who care enough to make a difference. So as voting begins, we are asking.
[**Can you please contribute today to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? We would not ask if your donation's impact on the outcome were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251002-1&refcode2=2632_4767699_aCLdOE&akid=2632%2E4767699%2EaCLdOE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Sharice Davids
subject: The last blue dot in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I need you to read this
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5719?t=1&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
---
Republican politicians want to make it impossible for a Democrat like me to win my district.

Not more difficult. **Impossible.**

This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district — and Donald Trump has made it his **number one** priority to gerrymander me out of office.

[_**But, I didn’t flip this seat from red to blue by running scared when the going got tough, and I’m not going to start now. I’m more energized than ever to defend this seat — and our democracy — from the far-right, but I need you standing with me to do it. Will you split a donation between The Long Run PAC and my campaign before midnight?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5719?t=2&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5719?t=3&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
---
There’s a pretty obvious reason why Donald Trump wants me out of Congress: **I don’t fit his mold of what a “Kansas politician” should look like.**

And, he’s right. I do stand out in Washington — and I’m proud of it. I’m the first LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, and even had a career as an MMA fighter before I ran for elected office.

Maybe that background doesn’t make me a “typical” politician. **But I think that’s a good thing.**

But Donald Trump disagrees. Instead, he wants to end _all_ competitive Congressional elections in Kansas and install a hand-picked, far-right extremist in my place.

[_**Kansas Republicans know they can’t win my district unless they cheat, so they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that we won’t notice. That’s why I need your help. Can you chip in a split donation right away to help me keep fighting back against this partisan power grab while we still have the chance?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5719?t=5&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5720?t=6&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5723?t=12&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5724?t=14&akid=5629%2E196590%2E_EIqcp)
---
Together, we can win this fight for our democracy’s future. Thank you for having my back.

Sharice

Thanks!

Marty O'Donnell

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

clean_body: From my run for Congress, to video games, to political rhetoric, to America’s spiritual battle, Tim, his fellow cast, and I had a fantastic conversation, and I would love for you to see some of the highlights. | Hi friend, Last week, I had the privilege of being a guest on Tim Pool’s Timcast IRL podcast. From my run for Congress, to video games, to political rhetoric, to America’s spiritual battle, Tim, his fellow cast, and I had a fantastic conversation, I hope you’ll take a few minutes to watch, Thanks! Marty O'Donnell | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.
**[Peter, can I count on you to contribute a small amount today to help us win the biggest election of 2025? With the polls tightening, your $10 to our campaign and Roy Cooper is urgently needed to turn out the voters who'll flip Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116466081/573511473/-2085417249?amount=10&refcode=ea.b7580d80-ca9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b7580d80-ca9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzU4MGQ4MC1jYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4MukW1NB1tHH68Ho4n7Rcrzs9t1rckusF95Q8Ao80Q=)**

clean_body: Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? | Hi, Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I wanted to be the first to tell you: More than 200,000 votes have already been cast in our race for Governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Abigail Spanberger and Roy Cooper: | = = = = = = The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November. We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable. Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important. But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Abigail Spanberger and Roy Cooper: = = = = = = I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to follow our campaign from here until November 4th. Thank you for the continued support, Abigail Spanberger = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: EMILYs List
subject: Adelita Grijalva won big — now Republicans are trying to silence her
body:
Seat Rep. Adelita Grijalva NOW. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466122/573511590/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ04_20251002_AdelitaRR_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1057148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTA2MmQ2YS1jYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6TxoRvNt5EEDVIPqVmhtwIosY-Uxm8mnATiD4spnMI=) Peter,

Adelita Grijalva just won her special election in Arizona's 7th Congressional District by nearly **40 points**. Southern Arizonans made their voices heard loud and clear: they want Adelita fighting for them in Congress.

But instead of respecting the will of voters, **Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are trying to delay Adelita's swearing-in — playing games with our democracy for their own political gain**. EMILYs List is calling on Speaker Johnson to seat Rep.-elect Grijalva _immediately_. (Did we mention that when two Republicans won special elections earlier this year, Mike Johnson swore them in _less than 24 hours later_?)

Arizona's 7th has been left without representation for too long. With a government shutdown underway and health care for millions on the line, Republicans are showing us exactly why we need more Democratic pro-choice women in Congress: they will never stop putting politics before people.

That's why EMILYs List is fighting not just to seat Adelita, but to elect more women like her who can help **flip the House** in 2026.

[**We can't afford to wait. Chip in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and take back the House:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466126/573511594/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ04_20251002_AdelitaRR_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1057148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTA2MmQ2YS1jYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6TxoRvNt5EEDVIPqVmhtwIosY-Uxm8mnATiD4spnMI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466128/573511597/-1403821653?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFEJ04_20251002_AdelitaRR_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1057148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTA2MmQ2YS1jYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6TxoRvNt5EEDVIPqVmhtwIosY-Uxm8mnATiD4spnMI=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466133/573511599/-1403821653?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFEJ04_20251002_AdelitaRR_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1057148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTA2MmQ2YS1jYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6TxoRvNt5EEDVIPqVmhtwIosY-Uxm8mnATiD4spnMI=)

clean_body: Seat Rep. Adelita Grijalva NOW. | = Peter, Adelita Grijalva just won her special election in Arizona's 7th Congressional District by nearly 40 points. Southern Arizonans made their voices heard loud and clear: they want Adelita fighting for them in Congress. But instead of respecting the will of voters, Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are trying to delay Adelita's swearing-in — playing games with our democracy for their own political gain. EMILYs List is calling on Speaker Johnson to seat Rep.-elect Grijalva immediately. (Did we mention that when two Republicans won special elections earlier this year, Mike Johnson swore them in less than 24 hours later?) Arizona's 7th has been left without representation for too long. With a government shutdown underway and health care for millions on the line, Republicans are showing us exactly why we need more Democratic pro-choice women in Congress: they will never stop putting politics before people. That's why EMILYs List is fighting not just to seat Adelita, but to elect more women like her who can help flip the House in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, we can make sure Republicans don't get away with silencing voters — and that in 2026, we have a House majority made up of women who will defend our rights and our democracy. name: All On The Line - Missouri
subject: This isn’t over.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
A referendum could overturn lawmakers’ assault on representative democracy.
|
---

Peter —
Missouri is on track to become one of the most outrageously gerrymandered states in the nation — but it’s not a done deal.
**That’s because Missouri voters can still veto the bill through a referendum.** It’s a failsafe that can prevent politicians from grabbing unearned power or going against the will of the people. And it’s on the table as a way to stop the new gerrymander that’s passed the legislature.
**While our affiliate works on blocking Missouri’s new maps in court, the All On The Line campaign is working alongside Missouri partners. Hundreds of volunteers have already stepped up to gather petition signatures. If every single one of us steps up, we can stop the gerrymandered maps from taking effect in the 2026 elections. **
[**To keep up the fight in Missouri and across the country, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to continue powering this work. Will you make a contribution today to help stop gerrymandering and fight for fair maps?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466339/573512225/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOBallot_email_20251002-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallot_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251002-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallot_&utm_campaign=MOBallot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDYyZDZhLWNhOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSDfLLDyLjsTNzJ-HC67lTuAkz_xN3G39K2sNtfMVqo=)

Attorney General Eric Holder put it plainly when he applauded California for putting redistricting on the ballot this November: Leaders have got to _**“let the damn voters decide.”**_
But some politicians are so afraid of losing power that they want to stop certain voters from deciding who represents them in the halls of power.
We see it with the brazen new gerrymanders in Texas and Missouri. We see it with voter-suppression legislation like the SAVE Act. And we’re going to keep pushing back.
**Think of how powerful it would be if Missourians used direct democracy to reject a gerrymander that’s designed to silence Missourians’ voices. And it would be a strong reminder that the will of the people is still the backbone of our democracy.**
But it’s going to take sustained grassroots organizing to get this referendum on the ballot and over the finish line. And with more states trying to follow in the footsteps of Texas and Missouri’s extreme gerrymanders, we have to be ready to keep fighting for fair maps nationwide.
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to fuel our pro-democracy work and help make sure voters can make their voices heard.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116466346/573512232/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOBallot_email_20251002-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallot_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251002-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallot_&utm_campaign=MOBallot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0MDYyZDZhLWNhOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSDfLLDyLjsTNzJ-HC67lTuAkz_xN3G39K2sNtfMVqo=)

The team at All On The Line

Texas is under assault, Peter.

From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors.

_**They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York.**_

I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas.

clean_body: I am ready to fight - and win - to protect our Texas way of life. | Texas is under assault, Peter. From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, it's time to draw a line in the sand. That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life. For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination. But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors. They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York. I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas. No more Soros-funded judges and district attorneys putting criminals on our streets. No more judge-made mandates that Texans pay for illegals in our public schools. No more communities built on Sharia law. Texas deserves an Attorney General who is unafraid to fight, unafraid to win, and unafraid to defend Texas. It was my honor to represent Texas and the 21st Congressional District in Washington and defend President Trump's America First agenda, but it's time for a new fight. I'll bring the same fighting spirit I brought to the DC Swamp and Deep State in Austin, but I cannot do it without the support of patriots like you. I am counting on you, Peter. Let's win. name: Team Kelly
subject: We are humbly asking you to personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
From the Navy to NASA to the U.S. Senate, Mark has accomplished a lot. But if you ask him about any of it, here’s what he’ll tell you: “I never did it alone.”
#

Team — in just a moment, we’re going to ask you to sign on to personally endorse Mark Kelly.
Please let us explain why this small action is so important, especially today.
From the Navy to NASA to the U.S. Senate, Mark has accomplished a lot. But if you ask him about any of it, here’s what he’ll tell you: “I never did it alone.”
In the Navy, Mark had the crew of an entire aircraft carrier supporting his mission. At NASA, he had engineers, ground crew, technicians, and other astronauts with him. And in each of his campaigns, he would not have won without help from literally millions of people in Arizona and across the country.
And now, as Mark stands up to Donald Trump and his Administration, he needs your help again. That’s why we’re asking you to personally endorse Mark. It’s a small, simple action, but it speaks volumes about the strength of this team.
[**So, please. If you still have Mark’s back, will you please add your name and personally endorse him today? It’d mean a lot to us, and to Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-oct25-endorse/?source=em251002-1-700k&akid=6208%2E6688874%2Er8l4el)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-oct25-endorse/?source=em251002-1-700k&akid=6208%2E6688874%2Er8l4el)**
Thank you so much,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6208%2E6688874%2Er8l4el).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Shannon Taylor
subject: A message for you from Shannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey Derek,
Shannon here - I wanted to give you a quick update why VA-01 will be one of the most important races this cycle:
30 years
That’s how long I’ve spent taking on tough fights to keep Virginia families safe as a prosecutor and making sure everyone has a fair shot at a good life. From running one of the largest Commonwealth District Attorney offices to becoming the only Democrat elected in Henrico County as Commonwealth Attorney, Virginians know that I will always fight for their safety.
51.5%
That’s how much Trump won this district by. Grassroots donors like you can help us close that gap in 2026. We know that the path to Democratic majority runs through Virginia – and that means grassroots donations like yours will decide the race.
$19.1 million
That’s how much outside GOP groups poured in to win VA House seats last cycle. We’ve seen their playbook before and we know they’ll do it again. again. The only way to compete is to build a strong grassroots war chest.
As your representative, I promise to fight day in and day out for a better life for all Virginians. But I can only do that with your help. Time is ticking and we can’t afford to lose a moment: Will you split a donation with me and Tim Kaine today and kickstart our grassroots movement to flip the House blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-taylor?amount=25]

name: Impending disaster
subject: Dems’ “Blue Wall” will come crashing down if we lose this
body:
On November 4, Pennsylvania will hold a statewide vote for 3 Democratic justices on the state Supreme Court that could determine whether there will be free and fair elections.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f30fmtXRJ7uXnA0nhqev8MhMeQHkjHvEjQArvfi7ZdzNIxisascZPN6qlRWk6ss5Efu4OMlk4AVeP7Kc-hqGeyhjadpjuQNt6c_XJzaGEEd_4dJpLNiXy2zFxDB1AECdlPaNnqQ_1_BP6wKCwdfsxqeBnu5IVk1iPpYruA-feoE_vGlVZIT2GrX6ZZNUZ4KN1cWL334O_v6oB05TkxLVK-k0OE_LlkRXCL-XmTy45ok=&c=y72Pcql2vr85Y7AMmVeAbHKeDRo0_xLqfMhg905kR2P7i9OYeduJfg==&ch=M9LNcoK2JyZl_LadcmZgJa5GFssjSQu3aztdpg2yIgbWFt2hOxBXdw==)
---
| Friend, Pennsylvania's state nickname is the Keystone State. The political importance of this swing state truly cannot be overstated.
As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation.
Remember the vaunted "Blue Wall" that Democrats relied on to shut out extremist Republicans from the presidency? Until Trump exposed major cracks in its foundation, the Blue Wall was the Democrats' saving grace that ensured a competitive edge in the Electoral College.
That's why the entire Republican Party has been working nonstop for years to dismantle this crucial part of the Blue Wall: they know that if they can flip the party registration of enough voters from Dem to GOP, and suppress enough liberal voters and racial minorities in Philly and Pittsburgh that tend to vote against them, MAGA can lock down Pennsylvania's 19 electoral votes for the foreseeable future.
And today, we are standing on the precipice of disaster: MAGA is on the cusp of tearing the entire Blue Wall down for good--unless we stop them.
On November 4, Pennsylvania will hold a statewide vote for 3 Democratic justices on the state Supreme Court that could determine whether there will be free and fair elections in this crucial swing state in 2028 and beyond. The Democratic majority hangs in the balance, but it's our democracy that is on the line.
MAGA is trying to take back the entire PA Supreme Court majority in one fell swoop--ensuring that Pennsylvania goes red and stays red. [Every one of us is the resistance to this illicit scheme. There is no one else coming to save us. We are the vanguard: you, and every single supporter who has rallied to save our democracy in this critical hour. With 32 days left until Election Day, we have to dig even deeper now. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 today to stop MAGA from taking over PA and knocking down the Blue Wall?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f30fmtXRJ7uXnA0nhqev8MhMeQHkjHvEjQArvfi7ZdzNIxisascZPN6qlRWk6ss5Efu4OMlk4AVeP7Kc-hqGeyhjadpjuQNt6c_XJzaGEEd_4dJpLNiXy2zFxDB1AECdlPaNnqQ_1_BP6wKCwdfsxqeBnu5IVk1iPpYruA-feoE_vGlVZIT2GrX6ZZNUZ4KN1cWL334O_v6oB05TkxLVK6hjVYCNCPMrzIZKXxIiW4Q=&c=y72Pcql2vr85Y7AMmVeAbHKeDRo0_xLqfMhg905kR2P7i9OYeduJfg==&ch=M9LNcoK2JyZl_LadcmZgJa5GFssjSQu3aztdpg2yIgbWFt2hOxBXdw==)

clean_body: On November 4, Pennsylvania will hold a statewide vote for 3 Democratic justices on the state Supreme Court that could determine whether there will be free and fair elections. | | | | | == | Friend, Pennsylvania's state nickname is the Keystone State. The political importance of this swing state truly cannot be overstated. As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation. Remember the vaunted "Blue Wall" that Democrats relied on to shut out extremist Republicans from the presidency? Until Trump exposed major cracks in its foundation, the Blue Wall was the Democrats' saving grace that ensured a competitive edge in the Electoral College. That's why the entire Republican Party has been working nonstop for years to dismantle this crucial part of the Blue Wall: they know that if they can flip the party registration of enough voters from Dem to GOP, and suppress enough liberal voters and racial minorities in Philly and Pittsburgh that tend to vote against them, MAGA can lock down Pennsylvania's 19 electoral votes for the foreseeable future. And today, we are standing on the precipice of disaster: MAGA is on the cusp of tearing the entire Blue Wall down for good--unless we stop them. On November 4, Pennsylvania will hold a statewide vote for 3 Democratic justices on the state Supreme Court that could determine whether there will be free and fair elections in this crucial swing state in 2028 and beyond. The Democratic majority hangs in the balance, but it's our democracy that is on the line. MAGA is trying to take back the entire PA Supreme Court majority in one fell swoop--ensuring that Pennsylvania goes red and stays red. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you for joining the fight. name: Tim Walz
subject: A boneheaded approach to government
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Heartland Patriots
body:
As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95844?refcode=em20251002-9515&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9515%2E614464%2Enusmvk)
Peter,
Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering.
He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on.
This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago.
But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it.
**[If you're with me, will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign so we can continue showing the country that there is a better way forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95844?refcode=em20251002-9515&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9515%2E614464%2Enusmvk)**

| Peter,
Pennsylvania's state nickname is the Keystone State. The political importance of this swing state truly cannot be overstated.
As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation.
Remember the vaunted "Blue Wall" that Democrats relied on to shut out extremist Republicans from the presidency? Until Trump exposed major cracks in its foundation, the Blue Wall was the Democrats' saving grace that ensured a competitive edge in the Electoral College.
That's why the entire Republican Party has been working nonstop for years to dismantle this crucial part of the Blue Wall: they know that if they can flip the party registration of enough voters from Dem to GOP, and suppress enough liberal voters and racial minorities in Philly and Pittsburgh that tend to vote against them, MAGA can lock down Pennsylvania's 19 electoral votes for the foreseeable future.
And today, we are standing on the precipice of disaster: MAGA is on the cusp of tearing the entire Blue Wall down for good--unless we stop them.
On November 4, Pennsylvania will hold a statewide vote for 3 Democratic justices on the state Supreme Court that could determine whether there will be free and fair elections in this crucial swing state in 2028 and beyond. The Democratic majority hangs in the balance, but it's our democracy that is on the line.
MAGA is trying to take back the entire PA Supreme Court majority in one fell swoop--ensuring that Pennsylvania goes red and stays red.
[Every one of us is the resistance to this illicit scheme. There is no one else coming to save us. We are the vanguard: you, and every single supporter who has rallied to save our democracy in this critical hour. With 32 days left until Election Day, we have to dig even deeper now. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 today to stop MAGA from taking over PA and knocking down the Blue Wall?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aJkF5gWaq54ZI1adbwZbnEoGl8JEg5V4--gb2ZUyfLl0EuASy0BDtdEzlgIGrZiIWdPIkDXN5kYEIt5MSJ7e6JmavT3JMgPg_LVd8nMFqYFX9V2xLWWeaXT2NeSiCHxb_MgsqNsEeB2vbsX06KV3MUF3k8YbGYvpYSxBBS0J6XMAlqTLX-GR-pAnEgySzhYsrehdzY5ddc4APw-EnlMge0NJ6T1UtDuEGBWqqm4sS8Oirkyypwr2Mw==&c=GtNROduuY9ggQ6JEuqBBUTOt5XPnQPwY7FPsCQIOR7j3urNLt-ET-A==&ch=bBat2OkmrLrsIuM2SPAPKsbcFbuJRcSUvioxsWw9-X7dlut2NjwFvg==)

body:
I can’t believe I’m sending you this email.
1. Republicans officially SHUT DOWN the US Government
2. Democrats need to flip FOUR Senate seats to take back our Majority
3. We can’t afford to lose a SINGLE seat this year – but I fell short of my critical public fundraising deadline, and it’s my JOB to make sure Democrats WIN and can take back the Senate.
