body:
Republicans just shut down the government to fire federal employees and stop affordable healthcare.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251002-1&t=1&akid=2709%2E587540%2EBrUYYq)
Peter,
**Here’s a quick fact-check on the government shutdown:**
* _FACT:_ Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House — a full MAGA government trifecta.

* _FACT:_ With near-unlimited power, Republicans chose to rip health care away and spike insurance costs for millions to fund tax breaks for billionaires — and now they’re choosing to shut down the government.

* _FACT:_ This government shutdown is 100% the responsibility of Trump and MAGA Republicans — no one else.

* _FACT:_ Dems had a simple plan to keep the government open and protect people’s healthcare — and Trump called it _“ridiculous.”_

* _FACT:_ Republicans never wanted a deal — they engineered this shutdown. Speaker Johnson cancelled the last working days in the House before the deadline, making it literally impossible to pass a deal — all so Trump can fire more federal employees and _“cut a lot of the people that... we’re able to cut on a permanent basis.”_

* _FACT:_ Republican lawmakers are getting paid — while TSA agents, public health workers, military families, and more worry about paying bills and affording groceries.

You know we’re not afraid to call out Democrats. But the truth is the truth — **this government shutdown is 100% Trump and Congressional Republicans’ fault.**
There’s a lot of misinformation going around blaming Dems for the shutdown. It’s a symptom of a larger problem: Progressives are struggling to break through the noise and get the truth out there.

Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve

**Nobody likes Democrats.**
Their only path to power is stealing from hardworking Americans by **INCREASING TAXES** \- and then giving **FREE healthcare to illegal aliens.**
_Think about that: you, an American Citizen, are being put LAST!_

We REFUSE to sell out the American people, so they are trying to **SHUT DOWN MAGA.**

name: AOC
subject: We have to stop enabling their abuse of power.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Donald Trump is trying to play this bluffing game of “Well, maybe what we’re going to do is hold the entire federal workforce hostage, and fire everybody.”
Donald Trump _has_ been firing everybody — we saw this with DOGE, we’ve seen this at the State Department, we’ve seen this at the Department of Justice. They are firing everybody. They are completely eliminating the federal workforce.
In order for us to stop this madness, **Congress has to stop enabling their abuse of power**.
This is about people being able to insure their children.
I will say, because I saw some Senators speculating about this, and I saw some Republican Members of Congress saying, “Well, if we have this shutdown it’s because of AOC” — **my office is open, and they are free to walk in and negotiate with me directly**.
Because what I’m _not_ going to do is tolerate 4 million uninsured Americans because Donald Trump decided one day he wants to make sure kids are dying because they don’t have access to insurance.
That’s what's _not_ going to happen.
What we’re _not_ going to do is allow millions of people in this country to not be able to afford their insulin and their chemotherapy.
**Come strike a deal with me if they think that’s what's really going on.**
Our movement for progressive change and real accountability for corruption is going to have to push harder than ever these next few years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251002.ZoKyFf&refcode=em20251002-9875-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9875%2E2526796%2Eb7UJz3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251002.ZoKyFf&refcode=em20251002-9875-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9875%2E2526796%2Eb7UJz3)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251002?refcode=em20251002-9875-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9875_2526796_b7UJz3&akid=9875%2E2526796%2Eb7UJz3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251002-9875-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9875%2E2526796%2Eb7UJz3)**

clean_body: | Peter, Nothing chaps my hide more than seeing Democrats get too comfortable, thinking they have momentum on their side heading into 2026. The biggest pain in my backside is that while Dems think they already have 2026 in the bag, multiple of my Senate colleagues have contacted me about your INCOMPLETE . That's why I'm reaching out to you directly. We've got the fight of our lives coming in 2026, and I don't plan on letting Chuck Schumer and his liberal cronies waltz into victory just because we didn't get our ducks in a row. Best, Senator Kennedy If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Justice Donohue protected rights that hit home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

**Justice Christine Donohue** has authored decisions that directly impact your life — from preserving access to abortion to protecting equality under the law. Her rulings have ensured that your rights are upheld, regardless of your circumstances. She hasn’t been a judge for politics; she’s been a judge for justice.
* In _February 2024_ , she authored a 3–2 majority opinion overturning a decades-old precedent to apply Pennsylvania’s Equal Rights Amendment to laws that burden people based on pregnancy. Her work made clear that laws treating pregnancy differently are sex discrimination. **That means laws denying abortion access or restricting reproductive health access must face stricter review.**
* She joined with Justices Wecht and Dougherty in reviving a lawsuit that challenges a state law limiting Medicaid funding for some abortion services. **This ruling put into motion real legal underpinnings for reproductive autonomy for low-income women.**
* She was also part of the Supreme Court majority in the 2018 decision declaring Pennsylvania’s Congressional district map an unconstitutional gerrymander. **The result was more fair representation in Congress.**

This is exactly the kind of justice we need to retain, especially in the face of the upcoming elections. It's no coincidence that MAGA billionaires are targeting her seat. They know the impact she's had and they're trying to reverse it.

**Your support is crucial in this fight. We can’t afford to sit this one out. We need your resources to counter their ads and defend justices like Donohue._[Can you chip in today to help keep her on the court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116470928/573527638/1737528682?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251002_FR_Justices_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_Donohue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQ1ZTJjYy1lMDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PHhzA3CC_hLfd3H7dxVVRhSdnUTDo5S3zpFIeIpvUvI=)_** | | [Donate now to defend Donohue →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116470929/573527639/1737528682?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251002_FR_Justices_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_Donohue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQ1ZTJjYy1lMDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PHhzA3CC_hLfd3H7dxVVRhSdnUTDo5S3zpFIeIpvUvI=)

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Justice Christine Donohue has authored decisions that directly impact your life — from preserving access to abortion to protecting equality under the law. Her rulings have ensured that your rights are upheld, regardless of your circumstances. She hasn’t been a judge for politics; she’s been a judge for justice. In February 2024 , she authored a 3–2 majority opinion overturning a decades-old precedent to apply Pennsylvania’s Equal Rights Amendment to laws that burden people based on pregnancy. Her work made clear that laws treating pregnancy differently are sex discrimination. That means laws denying abortion access or restricting reproductive health access must face stricter review. She joined with Justices Wecht and Dougherty in reviving a lawsuit that challenges a state law limiting Medicaid funding for some abortion services. This ruling put into motion real legal underpinnings for reproductive autonomy for low-income women. She was also part of the Supreme Court majority in the 2018 decision declaring Pennsylvania’s Congressional district map an unconstitutional gerrymander. The result was more fair representation in Congress. This is exactly the kind of justice we need to retain, especially in the face of the upcoming elections. It's no coincidence that MAGA billionaires are targeting her seat. They know the impact she's had and they're trying to reverse it. Your support is crucial in this fight. We can’t afford to sit this one out. We need your resources to counter their ads and defend justices like Donohue.= | | = Thank you, Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , , and ! disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116471801/573530682/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ3YjI5MC1lMzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmYvCye5hG8lKJsonOWjXiqDpNADmenDogbkPL8okMA=)
**➤➤ NEW: Trump’s DOJ sues SIX MORE states demanding voter registration data** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116471802/573530683/-1865942533?refcode=em-10.2.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ3YjI5MC1lMzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmYvCye5hG8lKJsonOWjXiqDpNADmenDogbkPL8okMA=)**
* * *
**Friend, we have some MAJOR developments on the Department of Justice’s assault on our democracy. ** Six more states — California, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania — have been targeted to force them to turn over full voter‐registration data, including private, sensitive information about every registered voter. **More than 30 states have received requests for information, and now they’re suing six of them to force them into complying.** In states across the country, officials are being threatened if they refuse to comply. Maine and Oregon have already started fighting back, standing by their laws and the privacy of their voters. And now, more states are being pulled into the crosshairs. This is part of an effort to bolster President Trump’s unsubstantiated claims of voter fraud. It’s a dangerous and authoritarian move. **That’s where Democratic Secretaries of State come in.** These are the officials who have long been protective of sensitive voter data., refusing to hand over data without proper safeguards, defending privacy laws, and preserving the integrity of their states’ elections. Without them, DOJ’s overreach would be unchecked. We cannot let the Trump administration erase the boundary between state election systems and federal power. We’ve said it before, but it bears repeating: we can’t win this fight without resources, legal teams, and public pressure in every state. **[Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to support the Democratic Secretaries of State Legal Fund, so we can stand firm in defense of voter privacy and democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116471803/573530684/292117375?refcode=em-10.2.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ3YjI5MC1lMzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmYvCye5hG8lKJsonOWjXiqDpNADmenDogbkPL8okMA=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116471806/573530685/957523928?refcode=em-10.2.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ3YjI5MC1lMzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmYvCye5hG8lKJsonOWjXiqDpNADmenDogbkPL8okMA=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ NEW: Trump’s DOJ sues SIX MORE states demanding voter registration data = Friend, we have some MAJOR developments on the Department of Justice’s assault on our democracy. Six more states — California, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania — have been targeted to force them to turn over full voter‐registration data, including private, sensitive information about every registered voter. More than 30 states have received requests for information, and now they’re suing six of them to force them into complying. In states across the country, officials are being threatened if they refuse to comply. Maine and Oregon have already started fighting back, standing by their laws and the privacy of their voters. And now, more states are being pulled into the crosshairs. This is part of an effort to bolster President Trump’s unsubstantiated claims of voter fraud. It’s a dangerous and authoritarian move. That’s where Democratic Secretaries of State come in. These are the officials who have long been protective of sensitive voter data., refusing to hand over data without proper safeguards, defending privacy laws, and preserving the integrity of their states’ elections. Without them, DOJ’s overreach would be unchecked. We cannot let the Trump administration erase the boundary between state election systems and federal power. We’ve said it before, but it bears repeating: we can’t win this fight without resources, legal teams, and public pressure in every state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** With you and state leaders in the fight, we will push them back. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. | | | | | | | Together, we’ll mobilize a huge grassroots effort to stop Soros and Newsom and save Trump’s agenda.Lets play hardball, | | PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC P.O. name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Nearly fell out of my chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I first stepped into this race for Iowa's First District, it wasn't because I thought it would be easy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116472201/573531842/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdlNTFkMi1lNDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_A6pax3Je2eGVqTak4zV5oqOSu1YaHOW86zuDN5dNjs=)
Peter,

I just got off the phone with my finance team and when I heard the news, I nearly fell out of my chair. We didn't just reach our end-of-quarter goal. **We passed it!**

When I first stepped into this race for Iowa's First District, it wasn't because I thought it would be easy. It was because I knew that after every disappointment from Mariannette Miller-Meeks, our community was ready for change. Iowans are tough. We are resilient. We take care of one another. But one thing we don't do is tolerate nonsense from politicians who put themselves ahead of the people they serve.

That spirit is what has powered this campaign from the very beginning. We launched with incredible grassroots energy, and we've never slowed down. And now, with the latest polls showing this race as a toss-up — and even one poll showing us leading Mariannette Miller-Meeks — it's clear that our work is paying off.

**I am proud of what we're building together, but I am not about to rest easy.** The only time I'll rest is after every single vote is counted and Mariannette Miller-Meeks is out of the picture. Until then, I am going to push harder and fight every single day to build the kind of campaign that can win this race and deliver the change Iowa deserves.

**[Will you stand with me at the start of this new quarter and make a donation? Your support today will give us the resources we need to take this fight all the way to November 2026>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116472202/573531843/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d07e51d2-e49f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdlNTFkMi1lNDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_A6pax3Je2eGVqTak4zV5oqOSu1YaHOW86zuDN5dNjs=)**

With gratitude,

Christina Bohannan

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

Chip in to support her campaign today >> | **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116472203/573531844/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d07e51d2-e49f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdlNTFkMi1lNDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_A6pax3Je2eGVqTak4zV5oqOSu1YaHOW86zuDN5dNjs=)**

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: re: Washington Post report about Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We know we've asked a lot of you lately, but this couldn't be more important

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116472209/573531881/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-02_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmExNjMwZjYtZTQ5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iLERtryQYfr27ZezHAzhHz7H1zOv4yRB9ViHMRt5KYE=)
**Breaking news:** Donald Trump is coming to Virginia, according to a Washington Post report.
A surprise visit weeks before the biggest Governor's race of his presidency... _Peter, we have to prepare for the possibility that Trump endorses Winsome Earle-Sears._
Because, once that happens, the President could start unloading his billion-dollar war chest against Abigail Spanberger. He's already attacked us from inside the White House and directed his press secretary to spread lies about us in the press.
_But that would pale in comparison to what's in store._

subject: you trust the Supreme Court?? (is this right?)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z) Did you see the news, friend?? → [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=3&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z) The Supreme Court’s latest string of decisions are DISGUSTING.

So, we’re counting on your response before 11:59pm, friend: [ **Do you trust the current Supreme Court? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=4&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=5&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
| | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=6&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=7&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=8&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
* * *
This is getting incredibly scary, friend.

According to the _New York Times_ , the Supreme Court [ **“allowed the Trump administration to withhold $4 billion in foreign aid that had been appropriated by Congress, in [...] President Trump’s efforts to wrest the power of the purse from lawmakers."** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=9&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)

_We can’t believe this!!!_

The Supreme Court is supposed to be a non-partisan branch of government that upholds the Constitution and keeps our leaders in check.

Instead, Donald Trump packed it with conservative, extremist Justices that allow him to yield power like a dictator!!!

We need to hold them accountable, friend. That’s why we’re launching an emergency poll to see what Democrats in your area think of the Supreme Court. But last time we checked, we didn’t see your response...

[ **So please, friend, tell us before 11:59pm tonight: Do you trust the current Supreme Court? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=10&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=11&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=12&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=13&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=14&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
---
[ **If you opened this email and failed to respond, you will be marked as:
“Yes, I trust the current Supreme Court”. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69266?t=15&akid=23452%2E4449941%2EcUwX-Z)
Thank you,

Fight For Reform

What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government?
And what if you knew that one of our self-funder opponents just launched the first TV ads of this race — raising the stakes and making it clear that we can’t afford to fall behind?
And what if I told you, I’m gearing up to publicly report our fundraising totals for the last time this year — and everyone, including National Republicans eyeing this race, will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win.
Or what if I said that our October fundraising deadline is just days away and I’m worried because we aren’t on track to hit our fundraising goal?
**We can’t let that happen – and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why I have to ask:**

clean_body: | | | | Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country? What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government? And what if you knew that one of our self-funder opponents just launched the first TV ads of this race — raising the stakes and making it clear that we can’t afford to fall behind? And what if I told you, I’m gearing up to publicly report our fundraising totals for the last time this year — and everyone, including National Republicans eyeing this race, will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win. Or what if I said that our October fundraising deadline is just days away and I’m worried because we aren’t on track to hit our fundraising goal? We can’t let that happen – and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why I have to ask: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you, Deb P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand. The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: the Global Sumud Flotilla
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While the Israeli government continues to block aid from entering Gaza,
the Global Sumud Flotilla courageously tried to break through.

Brave, everyday people from across the world are having to do what their
governments refuse to: deliver food, clean water, baby formula, medical
supplies, and other aid to millions of Palestinians being starved and
bombed.

Justice Democrats like Rep. Rashida Tlaib directed a letter to Secretary
of State Marco Rubio earlier this week, calling for the safe passage of
this flotilla and for an end to the blockade and genocide.

In the last 24 hours, more than 500 people on 44 boats and ships attempted
to reach the shores of Gaza — all but one were stopped by Israel’s
blockade. For the first time since 2009, a single ship reached Palestinian
waters, but reports indicate it’s unlikely they made it to shore.

Since intercepting the rest of the flotilla, the Israeli military has
kidnapped at least 450 humanitarians, including parliamentarians, lawyers,
and everyday people standing up to Israel’s genocide, illegally detaining
them.

We need to make ourselves loud and clear to those in power in Washington:
No more aid to Israel. No more funding genocide. Free these humanitarians.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20251002-signon-flotilla/?refcode=em20251002-37072&akid=37072%2E1203867%2EC0ynwm ]Demand that your member of Congress call on Israel to stop blocking
humanitarian aid to Gaza and release the flotilla activists NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20251002-signon-flotilla/?refcode=em20251002-37072&akid=37072%2E1203867%2EC0ynwm ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, While the Israeli government continues to block aid from entering Gaza, the Global Sumud Flotilla courageously tried to break through. Brave, everyday people from across the world are having to do what their governments refuse to: deliver food, clean water, baby formula, medical supplies, and other aid to millions of Palestinians being starved and bombed. Justice Democrats like Rep. Rashida Tlaib directed a letter to Secretary of State Marco Rubio earlier this week, calling for the safe passage of this flotilla and for an end to the blockade and genocide. In the last 24 hours, more than 500 people on 44 boats and ships attempted to reach the shores of Gaza — all but one were stopped by Israel’s blockade. For the first time since 2009, a single ship reached Palestinian waters, but reports indicate it’s unlikely they made it to shore. Since intercepting the rest of the flotilla, the Israeli military has kidnapped at least 450 humanitarians, including parliamentarians, lawyers, and everyday people standing up to Israel’s genocide, illegally detaining them. We need to make ourselves loud and clear to those in power in Washington: No more aid to Israel. No more funding genocide. Free these humanitarians. [ ]Demand that your member of Congress call on Israel to stop blocking humanitarian aid to Gaza and release the flotilla activists NOW! # [We Have Evidence MAGA's Govt Shutdown is American Sabotage](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=175126968&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTI2OTY4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk0NDc4MDksImV4cCI6MTc2MjAzOTgwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NLax4TAvHtP1dB7bXCW8WrBAfWPuTVeM0PPlJmhUqoE)

* * *
## [The GOP Shutdown Circus, Lies About Healthcare & Why Democrats Must Start Swinging](https://substack.com/redirect/23ae998b-259b-46ea-9534-88220a9330f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
If you thought American politics couldn't become more absurdist art, today's episode of _Amped Up_ definitely proved otherwise.
Before we start _we need to make clear that we took and take all these issues deadly seriously._ But we also believe in humor as a means to both keep our heads up and to satirically mock MAGA mouth-breathing mediocrities, exposing them for who they are.
So you'll see that we had a damn good time ripping into them in this episode while also sharing all the knowledge we could. Ok, let's get to it!
### 1\. [Mike "Grindr" Johnson & The Shutdown from Hell](https://substack.com/redirect/23ae998b-259b-46ea-9534-88220a9330f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We opened with Speaker Mike Johnson, Donald Trump's traveling bellhop, leading Republicans into a government shutdown while peddling lies about healthcare.
The GOP line?
That Democrats want to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies to "illegal immigrants." Reality check: by law, undocumented workers _cannot_ access ACA credits, Medicare, or Medicaid.
That Bible you wave around like a monitor to track your son's porn, Mike, has a few things to say about lying--and none are what you'd call "good."
What Johnson's doing is racist scapegoating, pure and simple. Republicans are tanking the economy and blaming migrants to distract from their own long list of failures.
And...their may have been just a few jokes about the rumor hypocrite Mike Johnson has a Grindr profile. We cannot confirm this. We also cannot deny it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rep. Madeline Dean gives Speaker "Grindr" Johnson a piece of her mind. Credit: MSNBC
### 2\. [J.D. Vance: From "Hold My Nose for Hillary" to MAGA's Mouthpiece](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Cliff reminded us that in 2016, J.D. Vance admitted he'd have to "hold his nose" and vote for Hillary Clinton while they were actually on an NPR show together!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Fast forward, and now he's Trump's little attack puppy (beware of Kristi Noem's "gravel pit," JD), demonizing immigrants--despite being married to the daughter of immigrants and raising biracial kids. Hypocrisy doesn't even begin to cover it.
As Cliff said: Vance is willing to put his own family--his own children--at increased risk for hate crimes and bigotry to climb the MAGA ladder.
What a guy!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4psCGzQo2FV9sWIT_3VPf3eXfsuQwL9cNCOLbq4a6-8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175126968)
### 3\. [Joe Walsh Joins: Why He Left the GOP](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Former GOP congressman Joe Walsh--now a proud Democrat--jumped in. His core message: the [Republican Party has abandoned democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/ad84e496-5a16-49f9-9cd0-a89f229bc3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and pluralism. They're pushing Christian nationalism, a whitewashed fantasy of 1950s America where women knew their place and diversity didn't exist.
Walsh admitted immigration demagoguery is the GOP's ace card, and Democrats keep ceding the field by failing to fight back with clarity and conviction.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Three Democrats who are definitely not on Grindr. Seriously.
### 4\. Democrats' Failure to Message (Again)
Walsh and Cliff were in agreement: Democratic leadership--looking at you, Schumer and Jeffries--still can't tell a story to save their lives (or a republic). Republicans scream "illegals stealing your healthcare" while Dems mumble through talking points.
What works?
Ads like the one Bernie Sanders and AOC released--it is clear, sharp, authentic, emotional and filled with human stories that tug at heartstrings.
Who's the villain? Who's the hero? What's at stake? A good story--or political narrative needs all of these questions to be answered, or you're failing. That's how you fight, not with half-hearted press conferences and dangling-participle messages.
### 5\. [Trump the Fascist-in-Chie](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)f
The crew reminded us that [Trump literally stood before generals in the U.S. military and floated firing on "the enemies within](https://substack.com/redirect/72e23c08-b6a9-4426-b711-3c91388c7e8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." This was a direct call to turn our own military on Americans.
Trump threatened to purge officers who refused illegal orders, telling them they could leave if they didn't like it, but "good luck your careers. That this doesn't dominate headlines like Hillary's stupid f*king emails once did as reminder #46,281 that our corpporate media sucks and every corporate monopoly should be broken into 1,000 pieces.
Democrats, again, risk being lulled into passivity by the silence of generals or the occasional court ruling, thinking "they got this." Cliff, Joe, and David hammered home: this is fascism happening at a breakneck pace in real time, [and treating lawbreaking with policies like troops in our cities](https://substack.com/redirect/4313251f-fcde-4c2c-b1c4-07cf82defb2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as politics-as-usual, is not only stupid, but suicidal.
### 6\. [The Economic Sabotage Strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Cliff laid out Trump's "wreck the economy" playbook: erratic tariffs, mass deportations causing labor shortages, attacks on the Fed, undermining U.S. credit--all moves straight out of Putin's "burn it down" strategy so he and his allies could buy up the state's assets for pennies on the dollar.
Walsh added: MAGA wants collapse. They believe democracy has failed, and only a "strongman" can rebuild America in their authoritarian image.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4psCGzQo2FV9sWIT_3VPf3eXfsuQwL9cNCOLbq4a6-8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175126968)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### ⚠️ [The Big Picture](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This isn't just about subsidies or shutdowns. It's about a Republican Party that lies like it's a bodily function, cheers on cruel autocracy, and is actively sabotaging the nation.
And it's about Democrats who, unless they find their spine and start speaking like real people--see GET NEW LEADERSHIP NOW--risk losing the fight of our lifetimes, and American democracy. They may have had a fund time, but this was an important discussion by Joe, David and Cliff.
* * *
👉 That's it for today's edition of _Amped Up_! The stakes could not be higher. Stay angry, stay focused, and most of all--[stay in the fighthttps://www.blueamp.co/subscribe?coupon=5e9367d5&utm_content=175053600](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae15eef-a889-4410-af3b-e4a1515db91e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
--Cliff

A good story--or political narrative needs all of these questions to be answered, or you're failing. That's how you fight, not with half-hearted press conferences and dangling-participle messages. 5\. The crew reminded us that ." This was a direct call to turn our own military on Americans. Trump threatened to purge officers who refused illegal orders, telling them they could leave if they didn't like it, but "good luck your careers. That this doesn't dominate headlines like Hillary's stupid fking emails once did as reminder #46,281 that our corpporate media sucks and every corporate monopoly should be broken into 1,000 pieces. Democrats, again, risk being lulled into passivity by the silence of generals or the occasional court ruling, thinking "they got this." Cliff, Joe, and David hammered home: this is fascism happening at a breakneck pace in real time, , as politics-as-usual, is not only stupid, but suicidal. 6\. Cliff laid out Trump's "wreck the economy" playbook: erratic tariffs, mass deportations causing labor shortages, attacks on the Fed, undermining U.S. credit--all moves straight out of Putin's "burn it down" strategy so he and his allies could buy up the state's assets for pennies on the dollar. Walsh added: MAGA wants collapse. They believe democracy has failed, and only a "strongman" can rebuild America in their authoritarian image. | | ---|---|--- ⚠️ This isn't just about subsidies or shutdowns. It's about a Republican Party that lies like it's a bodily function, cheers on cruel autocracy, and is actively sabotaging the nation. And it's about Democrats who, unless they find their spine and start speaking like real people--see GET NEW LEADERSHIP NOW--risk losing the fight of our lifetimes, and American democracy. They may have had a fund time, but this was an important discussion by Joe, David and Cliff. 👉 That's it for today's edition of Amped Up! The stakes could not be higher. Stay angry, stay focused, and most of all--. --Cliff ** | A guest post by| Walsh is a former U.S. Congressman and conservative talk radio host who waged a Republican primary challenge against Donald Trump in 2020. He is currently the director of The Social Contract and host of the "White Flag with Joe Walsh" podcast. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

Hey Peter, Yassamin here. I wanted to reach out and extend a sincere thank you for your support leading up to my campaign’s end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday. Your participation in this campaign helps me fight for what’s right in Congress — for accountability from the most corrupt and authoritarian administration in American history, for an affordable and livable Phoenix, and for better opportunities for all Arizonans. That work has never been as important as it is now. Our president is an authoritarian who is jacking up prices, ripping away healthcare from millions of Americans, and shutting the government down for kicks. He threw us into this shutdown to prevent Democrats from defending working people’s healthcare and prolong the White House’s Epstein cover-up. I refuse to back down and enable Trump’s authoritarianism — and thanks to your support, we’re in a better position to do so. body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q4-2025?refcode=em-10.2.25-all-b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q4-2025?refcode=em-10.2.25-all-b]

We did it.

I am blown away by what we achieved together. Thanks to you, we not only exceeded our fundraising goal, we also hit an incredible milestone: 5,167 people have contributed to our campaign.

Think about that for a moment.

Thousands of people -- right here in the Central Valley and across the country -- chipped in to build a campaign that puts working families first. No corporate PACs. No billionaire donors. Just real people who know the Valley deserves better.

Election experts are calling CA-22 one of the most competitive races in the nation, and our momentum proves we have the power to flip this seat and deliver real representation to this community.

But we are building something bigger than one campaign. We’re building a movement that says our future in the Central Valley will be decided by US -- not the corporate PACs or special interests ripping us off.

From the bottom of my heart: thank you for standing with me.

Now let’s win this race together.

- Randy

Dear friends,
Our government is currently shut down as a direct result of Donald Trump refusing to reverse devastating health care cuts — with House Republicans marching in lockstep right behind him.
We have already seen how Trump has recklessly imposed tariffs and hurt California families, denied disaster assistance to fire victims, and ordered mass arrests without warrants.
Now, the federal government has slid to a halt.
This new low in Donald Trump’s never-ending chaos is another reminder of how important it is to flip the U.S. House majority and finally put a constitutional “check” on President Trump.
But we can’t do that without stopping the Republican plot to rig next year’s midterm elections before they ever begin. That means passing Proposition 50 — the Election Rigging Response Act. Will you rush a donation to fuel our work right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]Donald Trump and extremist Republicans are making an unprecedented power grab to steal congressional seats and rig next year’s midterm elections before voting even begins.
They plan to steal enough seats to control Congress even if voters overwhelmingly reject their agenda.
Republicans just shut down the government because they refused to reverse devastating healthcare cuts. They know their backwards policies are unpopular and bad for Americans.
But they aren’t afraid to shut down the government because they think they can stack the deck with gerrymandered maps enacted by MAGA politicians.
With Prop 50, Californians have the chance to level the playing field and stop Trump’s election-rigging scheme.
The California Democratic Party is working day and night to pass Prop 50 and retake the House. Right now we are running countless canvasses, holding phonebanks six nights a week, and organizing massive outreach efforts at community events. But with just over a month until Election Day, we need to expand our efforts. Will you rush a donation of $ or more right now? subject: Is Marjorie Taylor Greene breaking up with Trump?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
When even Marjorie Taylor Greene, one of Donald Trump’s most loyal allies, starts openly feuding with him and railing against his team, you know the Republican Party is fractured at its core.
This week, MTG made headlines for blasting Trump’s White House aides, calling them “scary” and saying flat out: “I don’t work for you.”
The MAGA movement is splintering, but while they fight with each other, they’re still united on one thing, trying to dismantle our democracy and drag this country backward.
That’s why GOTV PAC is focused on what really matters: turning out Democratic voters in every race, in every state, and building the path to take back the House in 2026.
Can we count on you to pitch in $15, $25, or whatever you can today to strengthen our movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10022025]

In the fight,
-GOTV PAC

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Your Voice Matters More Than Ever
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
Boysko Bulletin: Your Voice Matters More Than Ever
Dear Peter,
You can vote now for the November 4 election. I urge you to do your research, select the candidate that you most align with, and use your voice by casting your ballot. The differences between the candidates are profound. Every year, there are some elections decided by just a handful of votes. You may recall that in my first race, I lost by only 32 votes. Your participation matters. I have already voted and am supporting the candidates Abigail Spanberger for Governor, Ghazala Hashmi for Lt. Governor, Jay Jones for Attorney General, and my delegate Irene Shin to represent me in the House of Delegates.
I’ve been working hard to prepare for the 2026 General Assembly Session, with more than 20 bills being drafted and several more in the works. My legislative slate so far includes healthcare workforce bills, screening for a rare disease at birth, and protections in assisted living facilities, employment benefits, closing the wage gap, criminal justice reforms to protect children and people with disabilities, public safety, reproductive freedom, antibullying protection in private schools, and protections for renters (half of all housing in Virginia).
Meanwhile, I continue to push against the harmful and often cruel actions of our current federal administration. With all the talk about who is responsible for this federal government shutdown, it’s important to remember what’s at stake here: thousands of dollars in healthcare benefits for those who need it most are at risk, and Republicans would rather shut the government down than provide for Americans who desperately need access to affordable healthcare.
It is heartbreaking that we continue to see violence against people practicing their religion. Violence creates fear and division; it does not persuade or even inform or solve problems. We can disagree without dehumanizing each other. We can protest without violence. We can pass laws that keep guns out of the hands of people who are not legally allowed to have a gun or are suffering a mental health crisis. I will continue to fight for peace and a welcoming, diverse community.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)
PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb27-website] .

At the Food and Resource Rally at the Cornerstones FREE from Hunger Center

Speaking at the Shouse Village Community Center, with Supervisor Bierman and Delegate Sullivan
Legislative Updates
Work continues on building my 2026 legislative slate. I’ve been meeting with advocates in Richmond and in my district office and virtually. Please reach out to me by email at SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov [SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov] if you would like to discuss legislation.
November 4 General Election
Offices on the ballot for November 4th include Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, Virginia House of Delegates, and Local Offices (not in Fairfax County this year). You can vote early in person [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/elections/early-voting] or by mail [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/elections/vote-by-mail] .
Early Voting Now Thru November 1
Fairfax County Government Center
Monday – Friday: 8 a.m. – 4:30 p.m.
Saturdays (Sept. 20, Oct. 25, Nov. 1): 9 a.m. – 5 p.m.
Sunday (Oct. 26): 1 p.m. – 5 p.m.
OPEN Monday, October 13 (Columbus Day): 8 a.m. – 4:30 p.m.
North County Governmental Center
Monday – Friday: 1 p.m. – 7 p.m.
Saturdays (Sept. 20, Oct. 25, Nov. 1): 9 a.m. – 5 p.m.
Sundays (Oct. 26): 1 p.m. – 5 p.m.
OPEN Monday, October 13 (Columbus Day): 1 p.m. – 7 p.m.
For more locations and hours for voting, including expanded early voting starting October 23, check out the Fairfax County Office of Elections website [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/elections/early-voting] . Expanded locations in District 38 include the Great Falls Library, the Herndon Fortnightly Library and the McLean Governmental Center.
Constituent Services [https://jenniferboysko.com/constituent-services/]
For detailed information on constituent services offered by my office, see my website, https://jenniferboysko.com/constituent-services/ [https://jenniferboysko.com/constituent-services/] . Information available includes:
* Resources for Those Impacted by DOGE
* Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment
* Help Paying Bills
* Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients
* Reach Out for Mental Health Support - 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline [https://tinyurl.com/2jmjetw6]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20August/graphic%20mental%20health%20support%20newsletter.png]
* Addiction Recovery
* Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants
Opportunities
Affordable Housing Waitlist Open October 6 through October 12
Check back on October 6, 2025 at 8 am. when you can apply to join the waitlist for select affordable properties. View the informational flyer [https://tinyurl.com/5282eum2] and learn more on the Fairfax County website [https://tinyurl.com/4jztbewr] .
Indigo at McLean Station at 1750 Old Meadow Road, McLean, VA 22102, two-bedroom units (8 Project Based Vouchers units)
Fairfax Crest at 12020 and 12040 Government Center Parkway, Fairfax, VA 22030, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom units. (14 Project Based Vouchers units)
Enjoy Our Beautiful Parks and Recreation Facilities
Our Fairfax County parks and recreation facilities remain open during the federal government shutdown. This is the perfect time to get outside and go for a walk or bike ride. Check out the Park Authority website [https://tinyurl.com/yc78pjdk] . There are over 334 miles of trails in the County park system alone. You can search for a trail with Trail Buddy [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/parks/trails/trail-buddy] . We also have access to parks via NOVA Parks [https://www.novaparks.com/] . And Virginia has 43 state parks [https://www.dcr.virginia.gov/state-parks/] with thousands of campsites, hundreds of cabins, more than 700 miles of trails and convenient access to Virginia's major waterways. You’ll find beaches, picnic shelters, lodges, meeting facilities, festivals, concerts, nature programs, and cultural events.
Give Back
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20September/wrl-logo-blue-600-1.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20September/IMG_8986.JPG]
Wildlife Rescue League operates a wildlife assistance helpline that provides the public with advice, resources and referrals to licensed wildlife rehabilitators. Wildlife Rescue League is committed to educating the public about the natural history of native wildlife, how to exist with our wild neighbors and preventing the need for wildlife rehabilitation.
I found the bird in the photo above, kept it overnight and then delivered it to a bird rehabber in Annandale. Hopefully the bird makes a full recovery with the help of the Wildlife Rescue League rehab volunteer.
If you are in Northern Virginia (as far south as Fredericksburg and west as Fauquier County) you can get assistance by contacting WRL Wildlife helpline , 703-440-0800, between 9 am and 7 pm (7 days a week).
Wildlife Rescue League does not receive any local, state or federal funding. They are totally dependent on donations to provide life-saving food, medicine and supplies. Please support them by making a donation today [https://www.wildliferescueleague.org/support-us/donate/] or ordering from their wishlist [https://www.wildliferescueleague.org/support-us/wishlist/] .
In the News
Federal funding repeals could halt rural broadband expansion [https://tinyurl.com/3xu3njbk]
This is What a Hero Looks Like [https://tinyurl.com/33hwrcpv]
Virginia Board of Elections approves ban on personal use of campaign funds [https://www.wvtf.org/news/2025-09-29/virginia-board-of-elections-approves-ban-on-personal-use-of-campaign-funds]
Lawmakers Show Support for Virginia’s BEAD Final Proposal; Urge Swift Approval from Assistant Secretary Roth [https://www.benton.org/blog/lawmakers-show-support-virginia%E2%80%99s-bead-final-proposal]
Events
Thursdays, May - October, 8 - noon/ Herndon Farmers Market [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/parks/farmersmarkets/herndon] at 765 Lynn St. in Herndon
Fridays, May - October, 8 am - noon/ McLean Farmers Market [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/parks/farmersmarkets/mclean] at 1659 Chain Bridge Rd in McLean
Saturdays, April 26 - November 22, 8 am - noon/ Reston Farm Market [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/parks/farmersmarkets/reston] at 1609 Washington Plaza N in Reston
Saturdays, Now - November 22, 8 am - noon/ Reston Farm Market [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/parks/farmersmarkets/reston] at 1609 Washington Plaza N in Reston
Saturday - Sunday, October 4–5/ Celebration of the Arts [https://tinyurl.com/33aydusf] , presented with Tephra Institute of Contemporary Art (Tephra ICA) and Capital One Center, multi-block celebration of the arts—featuring interactive installations, hands-on workshops, live music, and culinary experiences for every generation at the Capital One Center. Free.
We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost.
Keep in Touch
I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Friend me on Facebook [https://bit.ly/2PskgOp] and follow me on X. [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe.
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/LakmKKqoaEa-z1agKTAOVw2?unsubscribedata=0UqypzvHm2ghkCGM5dSwO9AVYppH%2BR%2Fx5va%2BelWhjZzTnLldomzQ80SSGgMWPRgEx5TnhgI4UkFX27%2BrKYipgABzqQJ0G61M8IRuR8%2FY96PbxzKw8unZLeTZYdFDfyTrrnoccSn%2FaunYOTNqpZjGOR%2B0aFJG1hhL5mPPUiv1E8kiMkT2lBcinHJ8xFRj4kB2501m%2Bgbab1gO1oqw%2BiVqaRhdLqFrT1%2FRtaRFAl6%2FqWgc%2BPKLERuIGFfRmSDAaUnJeWlOWCmaglpDTnDAJj02wfVnGa8rgn4AjQOB6cdBBTCnZ65HPQgj2cFYwD0T%2BzVO%2FM6WhAfCwQ3gw%2B1TZNdgkDRrAiiOPlh3s2rPTvCQ7j6osMnWyRcRZr7adQQcQzSY074BIrWD4HcbRMAycDKooCwILLg7Xw9Wk9KG8hVxgwQY8vArwYtul1Vgd7RnGU7S .

body:
House Majority PAC is the only organization solely focused on defeating Republicans and reclaiming our Majority. We’d hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/24Z_uglcS0W47A1eQlEQag2?unsubscribedata=8sbzGHaMFph98JtXFn1FFYLKBJSS6owKcmH0mx6x%2B0zdHu6psNnBaSfl4gKjMaw4ajj6Q5cpe3AfQIwRvBNsgo5hvAW%2BQQIIUd6OKqyraB1ImvQFjsPZNPBcM%2F%2F64Onc3KoZvLO0Q7fUujcyxLTZR%2F%2BvYb8QH8QHfLdzej4wCYxFIzZLWIuSiN3AgjCQv%2BQ1V8mVvcgHjAsrQV3GawkhNUx0ONsQIR2IGMG5%2FYV7Nh11DD2SapH8oAiVXGqsK%2BuU5Pb4MMJnpvVruo5BVny39SKlJc5TolqNM4Eqtafl5LKTr5L78HTIsztxVKQlu9fygKDJGHSH%2BNBHxxOQiorXatGw29wpd6R3o5d2uj1Iz3PV3nu%2Fqe0%2B47IvD5iWU4J0mLC%2BQhXSqfgJYDhPhNFchR%2BKa7X4%2FWHQLe%2BV22vWX1rp8itz%2Fd6AtKXVlFUMnF%2BT]
We’re floored.

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Government SHUT DOWN: Democrats Choose Illegals Over Americans
body:
Plus, New Mexico Legislator: "ICE is the KKK" \- Police Chief Responds. New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e682d4993d&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
The federal government officially shut down because Senate Democrats refuse to pass a clean continuing resolution. [Their demand?](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2b3fc9cf7f&e=567664f14c) MORE spending for Obamacare and illegal alien healthcare while America drowns in $37 trillion of debt.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8283190d68&e=567664f14c)
| |
🚨 **DEMOCRATS SHUT DOWN GOVERNMENT OVER EXTRA SPENDING**
Republicans proposed a simple seven-week continuing resolution keeping Biden budget levels exactly where they are - not cutting anything, just maintaining current spending until they can work out a proper budget.
Democrats said no. They're demanding hundreds of billions more for enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies and healthcare benefits that Republicans say will go to illegal aliens.
Martin Heinrich voted to shut it down. Ben Ray Lujan voted to shut it down. Only John Fetterman and Catherine Cortez Masto crossed party lines to keep government open.
Every other Democrat chose shutdown over keeping current spending levels.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=533f0665b6&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🧬 **NEW MEXICO REMOVES CDC FROM VACCINE DECISIONS**
The special session starting Wednesday includes alarming legislation removing CDC from vaccine recommendation authority for New Mexico children. Instead, they're giving sole authority to the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP).
The problem? AAP's top corporate donors are Merck, Moderna, Pfizer, and Sanofi - the four companies making virtually every vaccine on the CDC childhood schedule.
RFK Jr. called them out: "AAP should disclose conflicts of interest so Americans may ask whether recommendations reflect public health interest or are just a pay-to-place scheme to promote commercial ambitions."
AAP's track record includes advocating for transgender surgery and puberty blockers for kids, supporting removal of religious vaccine exemptions, and flipping their school reopening position after Trump supported it.
We need MORE scientific voices on vaccine policy, not fewer. Removing CDC input and relying on one Big Pharma-funded group is dangerous for New Mexico's most vulnerable children.

---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=76699ff478&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
We also cover Eleanor Chavez calling ICE "the KKK" and getting demolished by a police chief, Albuquerque sanctuary city polling showing 51% oppose working with ICE, and Trump's prescription drug plan delivering 80-85% discounts starting 2026.
Spoiler alert: Tim Keller created a hotline for residents to call and get warnings when ICE is operating in their neighborhood - putting federal agents in danger.
Contact your New Mexico legislators TODAY - the special session moves fast and they're voting on the vaccine bill within days.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=93fe1d07af&e=567664f14c)[
](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d122775172&e=567664f14c)

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8255eb1dcf&e=567664f14c)

name: Democrats.org
subject: Please don’t click away
body:
---
Derek — Please don’t click away from this message just yet. We’ve got something very important to ask:
With time running out before Election Day in Virginia, your support is imperative to electing a Democratic trifecta to help Virginia families. [**Will you split a $20 donation between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC to help us power this work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?refcode=em_20251002_4699_fr&amount=20&refcode2=4699_22930333_wcQQQw&akid=4699%2E22930333%2EwcQQQw) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_**[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=7&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20251002_4699_fr&refcode2=4699_22930333_wcQQQw&akid=4699%2E22930333%2EwcQQQw)** If you’re not quite ready to pitch in, we’ll take a second and explain why your support is so important right now:
Virginia is the **_only_ opportunity we have this year to flip a governor’s seat blue,** making it one of the most important races in the country. If we can win that race and others up and down the ballot, we’ll have a statewide defense against Trump and Republicans’ disastrous agenda. We’ll also send Trump and his Republican allies a strong message that _Democrats aren’t done fighting._
The DNC and the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign are organizing to reach and persuade voters, activate volunteers, and protect ballot access — _but these elections will be close, so it’s crucial we have the resources necessary to contact the undecided voters we need to win big up and down the ballot._ [**So, Derek, we’re asking for your help. Will you split a $20 donation between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC to fuel our work and get Democrats elected statewide this November?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?refcode=em_20251002_4699_fr&amount=20&refcode2=4699_22930333_wcQQQw&akid=4699%2E22930333%2EwcQQQw)** _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251002_4699_fr&refcode2=4699_22930333_wcQQQw&akid=4699%2E22930333%2EwcQQQw)**
